## Partner’s Cabinet 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391592-Partner-s-Cabinet

/[Advertise](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391592-Partner-s-Cabinet-) / Partner’s Cabinet

**Content **

[1 Filters ](#h_01ERB29EAFCM3PD2GJ2G328BZB)

[2 Favorites ](#h_01ERB29KGBAGM20F0ZM5BCYNR0)

[3 Deleting the Affiliate’s Program ](#h_01ERB29S270ZYF9A6XYD3VP2SG)

[4 Transfer to the Selected Affiliate’s Program ](#h_01ERB29YY8DT5J5Z26RDQKXGE8)

The main page of the partner’s cabinet contains the affiliate’s program list you are a member of.

 **![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/01-41.png)**

You can look over the summary statistics for each program.

## Filters

By default, the data for the whole period of time is displayed. The filters allow you to set the period.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2018-07-18_13-48-15.png)

You can also select data for a particular affiliate by specifying the name in the appropriate line.

You do not have to fill in all the fields of the filter. After entering the data, click on the **Search** button to apply the filters. To display the entire table, use the **Clear button**.

## Favorites

Clicking on the Star in the first column adds the affiliate program to the Favorites program. The star becomes yellow. The programs from Favorites are displayed at the top of the page.

A second click deletes the program from Favorites. The star becomes gray again.

## Deleting the Affiliate’s Program

To delete the program, click on the cross mark in the last column.

## Transfer to the Selected Affiliate’s Program

Clicking on the name of the selected program allows you to work on it.

The menu will change the way it looks.

**From th****is****:**

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-12-18_15-13-33.png)

**To that:**

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2021-02-09_05-14-58.png)

Clicking on the **Catalog** button returns you to the main page of the partner’s cabinet.

## Promotional Drafts for Free Products

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050853051-Promotional-Drafts-for-Free-Products

/[Advertise](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245531-Advertise) / Promotional Drafts For Free Products

#### Content

[1 Getting an Affiliate Link](#h_01ER6YYNVVWZZFJ3JSVCNTHZS1)

[2 Adding Advertising Tags ](#h_01ER6Z099BK2P0C3X1BCVQ0NVS)

[3 Advertising Banners ](#h_01ER6Z0RKV89BV968094A0TTX8)

[4 Advertising Articles ](#h_01ER6Z13P36BYC027C6G07PFDD)

[5 Subscription Form Generator ](#h_01ER6Z1HRTNC26EARCBWVM456T)

[6 Additional Fields ](#h_01ER6Z1WSTMCWKFDR6W1AR481K)

[6.1 Block Type ](#h_01ER6Z25DA5D9G8PZCQJPN0YDH)

[7 Form View ](#h_01ER6Z2H0ARFH54HHCBM3FDQGA)

[8 Button View ](#h_01ER6Z2S4W59CE3Q625E5YDF76)

[8.1 Advertising Tag ](#h_01ER6Z3BMKETZJXD1DZNFFK5T0)

On this page you can see the advertising drafts added by the author of the program.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919249556)

#### Please note! that the number of tabs depends on the availability of one or another promotional material.

## Getting an Affiliate Link

The available affiliate link for advertising is contained in the **Link** field at the top of the page of each tab.

## Adding Advertising Tags

Clicking on the **Add Advertising**** Tag** button opens the **New ****C****ampaign** window that allows you to add UTM-tags for calculating the advertising channels.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919261460)

You can specify the source of traffic here. If you advertise a partner in your mailing list, it can be email on the site – site; if it is contextual advertising, it can be through Google or others.

You do not have to set the advertising campaign, ads, and keywords. But if you want to get more detailed statistics, you should.

Depending on the source, you can determine their values. For a site, it can be a page with an advertising banner or image; for a mailing list, it can be a group of contacts and/or a subject of a letter, and so on.

Once the link is formed, you can copy it into **Your Reference-Counting of Clicks** field and use it in the corresponding advertising campaign.

## Advertising Banners

This page contains graphic advertising materials

Under the image, you can find the HTML code. When you insert it into the page, you add the image with the built-in affiliate link. When you click on the banner, you will be directed to the advertising page.

## Advertising Articles

Advertising texts can be found on this page.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919264532)

Under the text, you can find the HTML code. When you insert it into the page, you add the text with the author’s formatting and with the built-in affiliate link. As you click on the link, you will be directed to the advertising page.

## Subscription Form Generator

The affiliate’s subscription form contains the partner’s tag. When someone subscribes using this form, they are assigned to the particular partner. You can place this form on your website.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896861743252)

The author sets general settings, while design is set up in this tab.

At the end of the tab, the current view of the form is displayed. At the very end, you will find the
HTML code for inserting the form into the page

## Additional Fields

This block allows you to enable or disable field names within the input field.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919275796)

## Block Type

The block allows you to set up the view of the subscription block as a whole.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919277588)

You can select textures, round the corners, and make the block 3D using shadow.

## Form View

The block allows you to set up the width and the form of the input fields. Also, you can specify if the subscriber’s statistics are displayed.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919282708)

## Button View

The block allows you to set up the button.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896861760404)

You can select its color and change its name, or you can upload your button.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919286292)

## Advertising Tag

The block allows you to add the same advertising tags to the form as the** Add Advertising ****T****ag **button.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38896919292948)

After all settings, copy the code of the form and insert it into the necessary part of the page.

## Getting an Affiliate Link

At the top of each tab, the **Link** field contains an affiliate link that you can use for your advertising.

## Adding Advertising Tags

Clicking on the **Add ****Advertising t****ag** button opens the **New ****C****ampaign** window that allows you to add UTM-tags for calculating the advertising channels.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38893131049236)

You can specify the source of traffic here. If you advertise a partner in your mailing list, it can be through email, on the site – site; if it is contextual advertising, it can be through Google or others.

You do not have to set the advertising campaign, ads, and keywords. But if you want to get more detailed statistics, you should.

And depending on the source you can determine their values. So, for a site, it can be a page with an advertising banner or image; for a mailing list, it can be a group of contacts and/or a subject of an email, and so on.

Once the link is formed, you can copy it into **Your Reference-Counting of Clicks** field and use it in the corresponding advertising campaign.

## Advertising Banners

Graphic advertising materials are found on this page.

Under the image, there is the HTML code. When you insert it into the page, you add the image with the built-in affiliate link. As you click on the banner, you will be directed to the advertising page.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/38893104144404)

## Referrals 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050853351-Referrals

/ [Advertise](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245531-Advertise) / Referrals

On this page you can see the number of referrals and the page followers using your affiliate link.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2018-07-19_12-04-03.png)

At the end of the page, the graph of the number of referrals by day (without calculating the pages) is displayed.

By default, the data for the last calendar month is displayed.

Filters allow you to change the output settings.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2018-07-19_12-04-56.png)

You can set up the output for a particular page and for a particular period.

You do not have to fill out all the filter fields. Click on the **Search **button to apply the filter. To see the whole table, click on the **Clear **button.

# § Affiliates

Section URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates
Section ID: 360009245511


## Adding and Editing Free Products

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526631-Adding-and-Editing-Free-Products

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Adding and Editing Free Products

The page allows you to add and edit a free product available for affiliate promotion.

#### The Adding and Editing pages are identical except for their names.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/41416991236500)

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/41416991236628)

Enter the name of a free product and select its category.

The **Description** field contains information for the partners about the product and the conditions of its advertising.

Enter the link of a free product in the** Link** field.

The **Display ****a**** ****D****irect ****L****ink ****f****or ****P****artners** checkbox allows you to set up the direct affiliate link.

***Please note!**** You **must** copy a script code and insert it on the advertising page for the direct link to work.*

The **Add Material Link** field allows you to enter additional information for the affiliates.

Click the **Save** button after filling in the form. The project will be added to the [Promotion Free Product Materials](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525831-Promo-for-Affiliates-Free-Product-Promotional-Materials-) page.

## Adding the Commissions for the Selected Partner 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050065912-Adding-the-Commissions-for-the-Selected-Partner

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Adding the Commissions for the Selected Partner

On the page you could set up the individual commissions rate for the selected partner.

*The Adding and Editing commissions pages are identical except for their names.*

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-43-3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-43-3.png)

Select a paid **product** from the drop-down list.

After that, set up necessary values in the **Commision** field. It could be a fixed amount or a percentage of the product cost.

You can set up multi-level affiliate commissions, if necessary. By default there are 2 levels of commissions at the page.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-44-3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-44-3.png)

The **Save** button adds a custom commission to the Edit Commissions page.

## Affiliate Management and Reporting 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050057752-Affiliate-Management-and-Reporting

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Affiliate Management and Reporting

**Content **

[1 Affiliates Links ](#h_01ERBS8MW0YGH0K88M0CHSXP9Q)

[2 Summary Statistics ](#h_01ERBS8TDA4YBD2G0VFJFPQZFT)

[3 Filters ](#h_01ERBS90JCCN2ZTWTXM1JYPTEX)

[4 Payment of Commissions ](#h_01ERBS96RVSQR5KZP6H34123YC)

[5 Statistics on Affiliate ](#h_01ERBS9D8AS2T6E846AMCFKQBQ)

The page contains the summary statistics for the affiliate program.

 ![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576067796430.png)

## Affiliates Links

The upper right corner contains affiliate links for registering new partners and for entering the [partner’s cabinet.](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391592-Partner-s-Cabinet-)

## Summary Statistics

At the top of the page, you can find the summary statistics on your affiliates:

-
Number of affiliates;

-
Amount of partner commissions earned;

-
Amount of partner commissions to be paid;

-
Number of clicks on partner links;

-
Number of the subscribers from partners;

-
Percentage (%) of the conversion to a contact;

-
Number of payments from partners.

## Filters

Filter allows you to select the data for a particular affiliate and/or for a specified period of time.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-41-3.png)

To retrieve the statistics on a particular affiliate, specify their login or email.

To retrieve the statistics on a particular period, select the start and end dates using the calendar.

You do not have to fill out all the filter fields. Click on the **Search **button to apply a filter. To see the whole table, click on the **Clear **button.

## Payment of Commissions

Clicking on the partner’s login or the **Payout **button opens the [payout partner’s ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525811-Paying-Off-the-Commissions-to-the-Partner-)commission page. Here you can send a payment notification, see the history of mutual transactions, and get affiliate links for a particular partner.

#### Only the affiliates that have arrears to be paid have the Payout button. By default, the table shows the data from yesterday. So actually, the payments could be a little more than in the table.  This is due to the fact that the table is only updated once a day.

## Statistics on Affiliate

There is information about each partner in the table as follows:

-
Earned – the amount of the commissions;

-
Pay off – the amount of the commissions to pay;

-
Clicks – clicks on the affiliate's links. Clicking on the numbers opens the chart;

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/editedimage.png)

-
Contacts – the number of subscribers from the selected partner. Clicking on the number in the table opens the [Subscribers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers-) page with the data filtered for the selected partner;

-
Payments – the number of invoices from the partner’s subscribers. Clicking on the number in the table opens the [Invoices](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851031-Orders-) page with the data filtered for the selected partner;

-
Partners – the number of 2nd level partners attracted by the selected partner.

## Drafts for Partners. Adding and Editing a Subscription Form 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050852111-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-a-Subscription-Form

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Drafts for Partners. Adding and Editing A Subscription Form

**Content**

[1 The Main Parameters ](#h_01ERA7RBKXANF9XGMT7DE0GAJ9)

[2 The Additional Fields ](#h_01ERA7RJD4KR4X3GHMYAGG9NY0)

This page allows you to add and edit a subscription form for partners.

There is the partner’s login in the form by default, so the people who have subscribed using this form are assigned to the partner.

The Adding and Editing pages are absolutely identical except for their names.

On this page you set up the main form settings. Each partner can adjust for themselves the way the form will look in the [partner’s cabinet.](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391592-Partner-s-Cabinet-)

The page contains 2 tabs:

- The Main Parameters;

- The Additional Fields

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/11-3-1.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/11-3-1.png)

## The Main Parameters

The **Subscription Form Description** allows you to set up the comments on the subscription form for partners.

Select the group that subscribers will go into after filling in the form. If necessary, you can set up if the subscriber should be excluded from any groups in case they have been added there previously.

Click on the blue folders to move around the categories. To select a group, click on the check-box. To select all the groups in the category, click on the category check-box.

Using the tariff “Guru”, you can tick off the **Subscription Activation** checkbox, so the subscribers will be added to the database without the activation letter. But even if you can, you are advised not to do this, because of two reasons: 1) It increases the number of the wrong addresses in the database. 2) Without the double confirmation the risk of getting into spam increases.

**URL after the subscription** and** URL after activation** may stay unchanged. But if you have the finished pages for the subscribers, you can show these addresses.

You can also allow using partner’s UTM-tags in the URL after the activation to get more detailed statistics. Adding a tag allows you to track the efficiency using the same forms on different pages.

## The Additional Fields

On this tab you can set up the form fields.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/22-2-1.png)

To select a necessary field, tick the relevant check-box.

After selecting the fields in the **Required** block, you can tick all the fields required.

After you have clicked on the **Save** button, the form will be added to the [promotional materials list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050852291-Selected-Free-Product-Promotional-Materials-).

## Drafts for Partners. Adding and Editing an Advertising Banner 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390452-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Banner

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Drafts for Partners. Adding and Editing An Advertising Banner

This page allows you to add and edit graphical advertising materials.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576069340261.png)

*The Adding and Editing pages are absolutely identical except for their names.*

Upload the image from your computer (the **Select file **button) or enter the **URL ****address** (if it’s an image from the Internet).

At the **Banner Description** window you can enter the explanatory text for the image.

Click on the **Save **button and the banner will be added to the promotional materials list.

## Articles

## Drafts for Partners. Adding and Editing an Advertising Text 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390592-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Text

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Drafts for Partners. Adding and Editing an Advertising Text

This page allows you to add and edit text advertising materials.

*The Adding and Editing pages are absolutely identical except for their names.*

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576069476775.png)

Add the advertising text to the **Article Text** window.

The **Insert affiliate link** button allows you to add a link to the text. Select a piece of the text that will be the anchor of the link and click on the button. The selected text will be “wrapped” in tags *#a#link#/a#.*

The **Article ****t****ext** window allows you to enter the explanatory text (for example, newsletter, social networks slogan).

Click on the **Save **button and the text will be added to the promotional materials list.

## How to Setup an Affiliate Program

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390812-How-to-Setup-an-Affiliate-Program

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / How to Setup an Affiliate Program

**Content**

[1 Main Settings ](#h_01ERBEV56E3JAYZ3JCHWX6DNFM)

[1.1 Store Name](#h_01ERBEVBPYKKAGZYBHENN6J6P4)

[1.2 MoneyBack ](#h_01ERBEVGVY9D0N76ES4Z47SFGX)

[1.3 Ways of Payout ](#h_01ERBEVPD0MB8YQZCZ5FYW9BMC)

[1.4 Commissions ](#h_01ERBEVXBD9VK0AER20PKRTQ8F)

[1.5 The Period and Rules of Calculating Commissions ](#h_01ERBEW4ANJNJ4VVY00VPBQ0X0)

[2 Registration Page ](#h_01ERBEWBQZJHWVMRBQ2TVYGAMW)

[3 Instructions for Partners ](#h_01ERBEWJ4JCJ0A33VR32WKPYY0)

[4 How It Works ](#h_01ERBEWSTPH47XHH4BGP312R7W)

[4.1 Technical Principles in Simple Words ](#h_01ERBEX0QDT1EABJX50M5VGP7D)

[4.2 How A Partner Is Attached ](#h_01ERBEX7PJYR10JWRX3SXR6MPQ)

[4.3 For the Developers ](#h_01ERBEXEEXH3D9620X0ZA9YQB2)

This page allows you to set up general settings for the affiliates program (some of them can be changed for the specific product).

## Main Settings

### Store Name

This name will be displayed to your partners at the registration stage.

### Money Back

The Subtract Commission in the Case of Moneyback checkbox determines whether the partner’s commissions will be taken away if the customer has requested a refund for any reasons.

The status of the checkbox is remembered at the time the bill is generated. If the checkbox is inactive when the billing occurred, then the partner commission for the bill will not be deleted, even if you change the settings. You may edit the commission in the order card manually.

### Ways of Payout

The ways of payout are displayed during registration in the affiliates program. The more options you offer, the more likely your potential partner will find the suitable option and want to cooperate with you. Some options are as follows:

-
PayPal wallet

- Bank details

### Commissions

The commissions of the selected level by default is the amount of money you promise to pay a partner in the case of a purchase via the affiliate’s link. It can be a fixed sum and/or with a discount, or a percentage of the product cost.

The two-level affiliates program is displayed by default. But the **Add** button allows you to add the settings for the third and further levels of the affiliates program.

The number of levels is currently limited to two.

Clicking on the **Delete** button deletes a level.

The default commissions can be changed in the [settings of a selected product](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850851-Adding-and-Editing-a-Product-) or partner.

### The Period and Rules of Calculating Commissions

-
** Fee period. **The affiliate program is created in such a way that the partner does not need to advertise paid products. He can advertise free materials and give subscribers. The system assigns such subscribers to the partner for a certain period. If during this time the subscriber makes a purchase, the system will automatically charge the payment to the partner.

The period of calculating the commission after the partner’s click numbers in days and can be set from 1 to 365 days, or forever.

-
** Which partner should a fee be accrued for? **There can be a situation when a person follows first the affiliate link of one partner and then of another. Depending on who the commissions have been set to be paid out to, the system will determine a person to charge commissions.

Most commonly it is the last partner, when partners advertise a paid product straight off, so it is fair that the partner having advertised the product in a more colorful way and pushed the customer to buy will receive the commissions.

-
** What if a customer is already in your database? **It may happen that the client first comes directly without an affiliate link and have signed in or billed a payment, and then have come following someone’s affiliate link afterwards. The checkbox allows you to avoid having to pay affiliate commissions for customers you already have in your database.

-
** The purchase was successful but not via a partner’s link? **The last checkbox allows you to set up whether to pay commissions in case the person first comes following an affiliate link and then clicks on a direct link to make a purchase.

#### Please note that the cases below illustrate possible(!) customer behavior scenarios. We will add more below.

**Case 1:** If you introduce a preliminary registration for an offline seminar which is to start in 3 to
4 months, then it is highly probable that a user will visit your website several times via the contextual advertising links (just an example) after following the partner link and before the payment. However, the partner role, which does the preparatory work and prepare the customer, is still very substantial. It would not be a good idea to activate the final setting of the partnership program in this case.

**Case 2:** A user can subscribe to the mailings on his own and receive them for a year with no further purchases. And then this user can see a very attractive description of your services at the partner’s website and decide to pay something. Will it be fair not to grant the fee by using the third setting on the screenshot below? We have no answer to these questions.

You should tailor the settings to your services, features of your target audience, and the model of a partnership program that you want to promote.

## Registration Page

The** ****Link to the Partner Registration Page **will allow you to register in your affiliate program.

By clicking on the **Add ****a d****escription**** to the page**** **button, the website builder will open and allow you to create a beautiful and informative partner registration page.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360081876892)

After adding a description, two new buttons will appear – **Edit ****D****escription** and **Clear ****D****escription**.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360081876992)

The **C****lear Description** button will return the page to its standard view, and the **E****dit Description** button will open the [Template Designer](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder).

## Instructions for Partners

On this page you can set up the affiliate program description. For example, you can specify the conditions of the affiliates program – i.e. the terms of the client’s assignment to the partner, commissions percentage, levels, and so on; or to add rules, for example, ban affiliate links advertising using spam methods.

To add an instruction, use the InfluencerSoft text-based editor:

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/40912773510164)

You can also add the **Additional ****i****nstruction****s**:

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/40912773512084)

The main instruction is displayed at the Promotional Materials section in the partner’s cabinet. The additional one is in the Instructions section.

## How It Works

### Technical Principles in Simple Words

A click in the context of advertising (and partnership program) is about following the link with an advertising (partner) UTM-tag. This is not just clicking the mouse.

Why should we write about this? The point is that a click is the key aspect of our partnership program. The partners are attached by the data which is collected by a click-event.

Four factors make the event happen and counted:

-
An inserted click reference code;

-
The UTM-tags, which are in the URL-bar, but could also be inserted in a [button](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850991-Order-Buttons-#h_01ERBQ323KNZ2417Q9GT0BSSPF) or a[ form](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050394552-Form-Constructor-Subscriptions-and-Orders-#h_01ERBMZXQD2NKECMYR19TRCK4F)[;](https://help.justclick.ru/archives/773#i-3)

-
A user following a link with UTM-tags or clicking the button/form with the inserted tags; and

-
The one more option, which does not require any of the above actions — generating an invoice with a[ discount coupon](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360044766911-How-to-Create-to-Edit-a-Discount#h_01ERBJN46DK1Z2A8NKHB3V2C7P).

In other words, a website (a website page) user clicks the link or a button, and the click data goes to your browser cookie, if the above-mentioned events are successful. The following data is recorded: click date (clicking the link/button), click time and content (UTM-tag). When a client subscribes or generates an invoice, the click data is transferred to our service and becomes available in a lead card.

### How A Partner Is Attached

When a website user purchases a product or subscribes, we check his click records (previously transferred to the system and transferred together with the subscription/invoice generation) and the settings of your partnership program. If the data matches the partnership program settings, the partner will be attached, otherwise the attachment would not work, but the lead history will contain the information about the clicks.

### For the Developers

A Click.js script placed on the page parses the URL-bar and divides the parameters from UTM-tags into key-value pairs. They will be transferred to our database in case of subscription or form-based order generated in a personal profile.

The cookies are also uploaded just in case a user does not immediately subscribe or subscribes from another page.

The system defines a partner by the time of the clicks which have already been transferred to the database and makes the decision under the algorithms described above.

## Paying Off the Commissions to the Partner 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525811-Paying-Off-the-Commissions-to-the-Partner

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Paying Off the Commissions to the Partner

**Content**

[1 Paying Off ](#h_01ERBN3VJQTGD8BW66PYSQQNYP)

[2 The History of Mutual Transactions ](#h_01ERBN41F7VMRYPTTZQ43M1ZKY)

[3 Payment Details ](#h_01ERBN46K05E0D3YX827EAXMRE)

[4 Affiliate Links ](#h_01ERBN4CD64K1EKASX4RGH63XG)

[5 Editing Commissions ](#h_01ERBN4K0DKM2M42P9XWYCAAQC)

On this page you can send a payment notification, see the history of mutual transactions, get affiliate links for a particular partner and adjust individual commissions for the selected affiliate.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576068310053.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576068310053.png)

The page has three tabs:

- paying off;

- the history of mutual transactions;

- payment details.

## Paying Off

On this tab you can form and send a partner a notification to pay off the commissions.

***Please note!** Clicking the **Pay Out** button doesn’t send your partner any money. You proceed to a real payment from your wallets, not from your InfluencerSoft balance.*

## The History Of Mutual Transactions

This tab allows you to look through the transactions history and pay off the commissions to the selected affiliate.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-47-4.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-47-4.png)

You can also change partner’s full name, if necessary. Just enter a new **full name** and click the **Change** button.

Clicking the invoice number in the **Description** column opens the Invoice #… page.

## Payment Details

The Payment Details tab allows you to look through the partners’ payment details.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-48-3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-48-3.png)

## Affiliate Links

Clicking the **Affiliate Links** button opens the user’s Affiliate Link page. There you can see all the affiliate links with a built-in identifier of the selected partner.

The page contains 2 tabs  – for free products

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576068402017.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576068402017.png)

and for paid products:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-50-3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-50-3.png)

To return to the Paying Off Commissions page click the button with the same name at the bottom of the page.

## Editing Commissions

Clicking the **Edit Commissions** button opens the [Edit Affiliate Commissions](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526431-The-Commissions-for-the-Selected-Partner-) window where you can set up individual commissions for the selected partner.

## Promo for Affiliates. Free Product Promotional Materials 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525831-Promo-for-Affiliates-Free-Product-Promotional-Materials

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/archives/category/partner) / Promo for Affiliates. Free Product Promotional Materials

**Content**

[1 Filters ](#h_01ERBPD4AZ85MSHR9CRMM7JG6J)

[2 Adding and Editing a Free Product ](#h_01ERBPD9WY84YQQ4QA6316DJ9G)

[3 Deactivation and Deleting a Free Product ](#h_01ERBPDFFP82WG10E8PV9D71ZW)

[4 Promotional Materials ](#h_01ERBPDMM9CP9C5E98KGPZEXKA)

[5 Others ](#h_01ERBPDX1FRCVY9SKPN4X6KG4T)

The Affiliate Program InfluencerSoft stores the link from which a person came to the page. Even if it is a subscription page for a free “magnet” and the purchase is made after a certain period, the partner will be charged commissions for it.

The page is for adding free magnets and their promotional materials.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-53-2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-53-2.png)

## Filters

Filters allow you to select promotional materials by particular criteria.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-54-2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-54-2.png)

You can select products by the identifier, name, description, or category.

You do not have to fill out all the filter fields.

Set the filter points and click on the **Search **button. The corresponding information will be displayed in the table. To display the full table, click on the **Filter **button, and then click on the **Clear **button.

## Adding and Editing a Free Product

To [add a new free product](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526631-Adding-and-Editing-Free-Products-) available for the promotion, click on the **Add** button.

To [edit a free product](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526631-Adding-and-Editing-Free-Products-), click on its name.

## Deactivation and Deleting a Free Product

Move the slider to the left in the **Status **column to make a product temporarily unavailable for partners. The button changes color to dark gray, partners in them will no longer see this product. To turn it back on, move the slider to the right. The product becomes available for the partners to promote.

Click on the cross mark in the last column to delete a product from the affiliate program.

***Please note!** When you delete a product from the affiliate programme, you don’t delete it from InfluencerSoft system, but just make it unavailable for your partners.*

## Promotional Materials

#### Please note! When you delete a product from the affiliate program, you do not delete it from InfluencerSoft system, but just make it unavailable for your partners.

## Promotional Materials

You can prepare promotional materials such as[ banners](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390452-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Banner-) and[ text ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390592-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Text-)for each product. Click on the number in the Offers column to work on them.

The number in the button shows the number of promotional materials added.

## Others

Clicking the **Paid **or **For Partners** button allows you to go to the relevant pages. There you can adjust promotional materials for the [paid](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525951-Promo-for-Affiliates-Paid-Product-Promotional-Materials-) or [multi-leveled affiliates ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050065192-Promo-for-Affiliates-Multi-leveled-Affiliates-Program-Promotional-Materials-#h_01ERBKRV8WMGV5B2MSBJ1SW4VQ)products.

This page allows you to adjust promotional materials of the multi-leveled affiliates program.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576069118427.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576069118427.png)

## Editing Descriptions

To edit a description of the affiliates program, click on its name.

## Deactivation

Move the slider to the left in the Status column to make a registration temporarily unavailable for the low-level partners. The button changes color to dark gray and your partners would not see this link in their cabinets. To turn it back on, move the slider to the right. ## Promo for Affiliates. Paid Product Promotional Materials 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525951-Promo-for-Affiliates-Paid-Product-Promotional-Materials

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Promo for Affiliates. Paid Product Promotional Materials

**Content**

[1 Filters ](#h_01ERA8H7Y6NCCAR5D2ZR1NMBWN)

[5 Others ](#h_01ERA8J1VXD4C7GKNDWZ4X5F6R)

The page allows you to adjust paid product promotional materials.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-55-3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-55-3.png)

## Filters

Filters allow you to select promotional materials by particular criteria.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-56-2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-56-2.png)

You can select products by the identifier, name, description or category.

You do not have to fill in all the filter fields.

Set the filter points and click on the **Search **button. The corresponding information will be displayed in the table. To display the full table click on the **Filter **button and then the **Clear **button.

## Adding and Editing A Paid Product

In contrast to the free products for partners, the paid ones are added at the moment it is created/edited. To add a product to the page, tick the **Display to partners** check-box in the **Affiliates **tab.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-57-3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-57-3.png)

To edit a paid product click on its name. You will go to the page for [editing the product](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526631-Adding-and-Editing-Free-Products-).

## Deactivation and Deleting a Paid Product

Move the slider to the left in the **Status **column to make a product temporarily unavailable for the partners. The button changes its color to dark gray. To turn it back on, move the slider to the right. The product becomes available for the partners to promote.

Click on the cross mark in the last column to delete a product from the affiliate program completely.

## Promotional Materials

You can prepare promotional materials such as [banners](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390452-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Banner-) and [texts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390592-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Text-) for each product. Click on the number in the [Offers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050852311-Selected-Paid-Product-Promotional-Materials-) column to go to work with them.

The number in the button shows the amount of the promotional materials added at the moment.

## Others

Clicking the **Free **or **For Partners** buttons allows you to go to the relevant pages. There you can adjust promotional materials for the[ free](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525831-Promo-for-Affiliates-Free-Product-Promotional-Materials-) or [multi-leveled affiliates products](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050065192-Promo-for-Affiliates-Multi-leveled-Affiliates-Program-Promotional-Materials-).

## Promotional Materials for Attracting the Partners 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526011-Promotional-Materials-for-Attracting-the-Partners

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Promotional Materials for Attracting the Partners

This page allows you to add promotional materials for attracting partners. They will be displayed in the [partner’s cabinet](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391592-Partner-s-Cabinet-).

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/77-3-1.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/77-3-1.png)

You can add two kinds of products:

-
[Banner](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390452-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Banner-) (the **Add Banner **button);

-
[Text](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390592-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Text-) (the **Add Text **button).

Clicking the name or image in the **Material **column allows you to go to the page to edit the selected promo.

The arrows in the **Sorting** column allow you to change the order of the materials output.

Clicking the cross mark in the last column will delete the promotional material.

To return to the [Promotional Materials for Paid Product](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525951-Promo-for-Affiliates-Paid-Product-Promotional-Materials-), click the** **button with the same name at the bottom of the page.

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Selected Free Product Promotional Materials

The page allows you to add promotional materials for the selected free product. They will be displayed in the [partner’s cabinet](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391592-Partner-s-Cabinet-).

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/22-6.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/22-6.png)

You can add three kinds of products:

-
[Banner](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390452-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Banner-) (the **Add Banner **button);

-
[Text](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390592-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-an-Advertising-Text-) (the **Add Text **button);

-
[Subscription forms](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050852111-Drafts-for-Partners-Adding-and-Editing-a-Subscription-Form-) (the **Add Subscription Form **button).

- button).

*You can add as many banners and texts as you want. The subscription form can be added only once. If you already have it in your promotional materials, the button becomes inactive and changes color from dark-green to light-green.*

Clicking the name or image in the **Material **column allows you to go to the editing page for the selected promo.

The arrows in the **Sorting** column allow you to change the order of the materials output.

To return to the [Promotional Materials for Free Product](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050525831-Promo-for-Affiliates-Free-Product-Promotional-Materials-), click the button with the same name at the bottom of the page.

The page allows you to add promotional materials for the selected paid product. They will be displayed in the partner’s cabinet.

## Settings of the Partner Profile

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051189571-Settings-of-the-Partner-Profile

/ [Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / Settings of the Partner Profile

**Content**

- [Partner profile ](#h_01EREMHWCH9J6QA4S4AHS4VBQD)

-
[Main settings ](#h_01EREMJEXZYV2ZGMBJCK94H7QG)

[How to change the name? ](#h_01EREMJQH2DWTV68S8ARCMYT08)

- [How to change an account e-mail? ](#h_01EREMJYFYWW42BKXKGZXSC0BN)

- [How to change a telephone number? ](#h_01EREMK6BPZYMWDY1C188MHATY)

-
[Bank account details to receive payments ](#h_01EREMKEQWJRPEJNQ0KZ0VJF7B)

[Payment methods ](#h_01EREMKPFVF062PK9RA7XXK2ZM)

- [Change password ](#h_01EREMKYHHPT8AF8W81C6J29WS)

## Partner profile

The key purpose of the profile is to enter the bank account details to get the payments from the partnership program authors. You can also change the account password in the profile.

To go to profile, click the top right checkmark in your account and select Profile in the opened menu.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073374451/blobid0.png)

## Main settings

You can change the name and the telephone number in this tab.

### How to change the name?

To change the name, delete the old name and enter a new one into “Your name” field. Click Save to save the changes.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073108092/blobid1.png)

### How to change an account email

You cannot change an account e-mail for security reasons. To change an e-mail address, please contact the client support service.

### How to change a telephone number

To change a telephone number, click “Your telephone number”, a confirmation code will be sent to your address. Enter the code on the page which is opened upon clicking “Your telephone number”, and enter a new phone number.

Enter your valid phone number, else we can’t identify you and your phone number.

## Bank account details to receive payments

Enter your bank account details to receive the payments from the authors of the partnership programs.

### Payment methods

You can use PayPal and bank account details.

Enter the wallet number or the bank account details as your payment details, it will be displayed to a partnership program author. Click Save once you enter the payment details.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073374491/blobid2.png)

## Change password

To change your current authorization password, enter it in the “Current password” field, then enter the password you would like to use in the future in the “New password” and “Confirm new password” fields.

## The Commissions for the Selected Partner 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526431-The-Commissions-for-the-Selected-Partner

/[Affiliates](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245511-Affiliates) / The Commissions for the Selected Partner

The application allows you to manage the individual affiliate’s commissions for the selected partner.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-45-3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-45-3.png)

The table contains a list of products with customized individual commissions for the selected affiliate.

The **Add** button allows you to [add a new individual commission](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050065912-Adding-the-Commissions-for-the-Selected-Partner-).

As you click the product name, you go to the page of [editing commission rates for a partner](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050065912-Adding-the-Commissions-for-the-Selected-Partner-).

To delete the selected commission, click on the cross mark in the last column.

# § Reports

Section URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports
Section ID: 360009133772


## Advertising (The Efficiency of the Advertising Campaign)

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051073692-Advertising-The-Efficiency-of-the-Advertising-Campaign

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / Advertising (The Efficiency Of The Advertising Campaign)

**Content **

- [Filters ](#h_01ERE9H2RAB6Z7M2ZTD095Q1D9)

- [Visible fields ](#h_01ERE9JRP3HPPBJ7ZPSTYNG7WW)

- [Sources ](#h_01ERE9JZH0AYEMG2YQ2MQF1758)

- [Expenses data import ](#h_01ERE9K5FJFJDRHT1KK3P8074Z)

- [Data export ](#h_01ERE9KBFRS5QPKVTYE2EGSR9E)

 |

The efficiency of the advertising on all the channels in total, and efficiency broken down into channels.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975572/blobid0.png)

## Filters

The filters allow you to set up the period of retrieving the statistics. (The **Retrieve statistics from…to** block).

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360074195711/blobid1.png)

For convenience, the filters for the most frequent periods are contained at the top of the page.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975592/blobid2.png)

 The filter also allows you to adjust the output on a particular advertising channel, or to retrieve the data in several ways by the first click or by the last click, or by days after the click.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975612/blobid3.png)

The **Read the interval analysis **checkbox** **expands additional fields.

Select the parameter and set the interval to output data.

Depending on the tick’s presence or absence in the **Cumulative data in the statistics** checkbox, the information will be output in cumulative total.

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360074195751/blobid4.png)

or by individual periods.

![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975672/blobid5.png)

## Visible fields

The **View **button allows you to set the displayed columns of the table.

![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360074195791/blobid6.png)

Tick the checkbox with the name of the column to display it in the table. Remove the tick to hide
the column.

## Sources

The Sources button allows you to retrieve the data broken down into the sources inside the channel
(if they have been set). A second click on the button returns the table to its original form.

**![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975732/blobid7.png)**

## Expenses data import

To calculate the efficiency of the advertising, you need both income and expenses data. The **Import **button allows you to add the expenses data to the selected advertising channel manually.

## Data export

The Gear button allows you to export data from the table to your computer in the CSV format.

![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975752/blobid8.png)

## How to Import Expenses into your Reports

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051073652-How-to-Import-Expenses-into-your-Reports

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / How to Import Expenses into your Reports

To calculate the efficiency of the advertisement, you need both the income and expense data. This page allows you to add the expense data to each advertising channel.

![mceclip0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360079866032/mceclip0.png)

You should upload the expenses list according to the given pattern:

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360074195551/blobid1.png)

Or you could upload a CSV file with the same data structure.

Click the **Add **button. The expenses will be added to the **Advertising **page.

The **Expenses Editor** button allows you to change the earlier expense data.

Select the necessary channel in the filters and make changes.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360074195591/blobid2.png)

## Articles:

*[The Sales Funnel. Additional Fields ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050699852-The-Sales-Funnel-Additional-Fields)*

## New Campaign 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550771-New-Campaign

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / New Campaign

This page allows you to add the UTM-tag to the address of the advertised page to calculate the statistics of each channel individually.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975252/blobid0.png)

Enter the address of the advertised page at the entry field and click the Check the possibility to count clicks button. If the page calculates clicks, you can specify tags.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975272/blobid1.png)

You must specify the source of traffic using Latin letters and numbers.

If you advertise a partner in your mailing list, it can be emailed on the website – site; if it is contextual advertising – Google.

The campaign, ad, and keywords may not be specified. But if you want more detailed statistics, you should do this.

Depending on the source, you can set up its values yourself — e.g., for a website, it could be the page with an advertising banner or image; for the mailing list, it could be groups of contacts and/or the subject of the message, and so on.

After you have formed your link, copy it to the **Your link for calculating clicks** field and use it for the appropriate advertising campaign.

## Payments to the Managers

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051187591-Payments-to-the-Managers

/ [Reports ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports)/ Payments to managers

This page allows you to look over the information on payment amounts to managers and how to make the payments.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073106652/blobid0.png)

Use the filter to search for the manager. You can search for a manager by login or email.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073106672/blobid1.png)

Clicking a manager’s name opens the page for editing the employee’s information. Here, you can change the rights and other settings of the selected manager.

If there is some money to be paid to the employee, the **Payout** button will at the last column to make a payment.

## Sales Department Statistics

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050698152-Sales-Department-Statistics

**/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / Sales Department **

**Content **

- [Visible fields ](#h_01EREKETWDNDN2N5GWM8A1XNMB)

- [Filter ](#h_01EREKF0S6M1JE6F5YTA4XQC1Q)

- [Payments to the managers ](#h_01EREKFYAPM0RY8T3Q8HBMAAQ8)

This page allows you to see the sales department statistics for an individual manager.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073373151/blobid0.png)

## Visible fields

The **View **button allows you to set up the columns of the table.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073373171/blobid1.png)

Tick the checkboxes to add the column or remove the tick to delete it.

## Filter

Filters allow you to set up the period of the data output.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073106392/blobid2.png)

You can specify a period by billing or collecting payment.

You do not have to fill in all the filter fields. Click on the **Search** button to apply a filter. To see the whole table, click on the **Clear **button.

## Payments to managers

Clicking on the **Payments to**** the**** managers** button opens the page of the same name. Here, you can see the earnings data of each manager and pay the required amount.

## Sales Funnel Analytics

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185591-Sales-Funnel-Analytics

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / Sales Funnel Analytics

**Content **

-
Filter

-
Adding, editing, and deleting the sales funnel

-
Adding the funnel to the favorites

-
Detailed analytics

The page is intended for operating with sales funnels.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073104952/blobid0.png)

You can:

-
add, edit and delete funnels

-
view statistics for each funnel

-
go to detailed information by the selected funnel

-
adjust the visibility of statistics data of the funnels

## Filter

The filter allows you to set up preferences of the output for statistics by funnels.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372171/blobid1.png)

The **Funne****l**** ****name **field allows you to find the funnel by its name. If you enter a part of a name, all of the funnels that contain this part will be displayed.

The **0-step period fro****m ****and to** field allows you to set a period to calculate the statistics.

The most popular periods of time (today, yesterday, this month, last month, 30 days) are contained in the quick filter at the top of the page.

The **Show by ****click** field allows you to retrieve statistics by the first and last click.

The **Only in favorites **check-box allows you to display the funnels from your favorites.

The side filter menu contains the **Advertising** and **Tags **tabs, that allow you to retrieve statistics not from the whole funnel but just by particular parameters.

From the **Advertising **tab, you can retrieve statistics by the particular [channel/source/campaign/ad/keys](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550771-New-Campaign-).

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105052/blobid2.png)

At the [Tag ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177191-Tags)tab in the field with the same name, you can specify a tag to retrieve the statistics of the funnel.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372231/blobid3.png)

## Adding, editing, and deleting the sales funnel

The **Add **button allows you to go to the [Add Sales Funnel page](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185531-The-Sales-Funnels-Making-a-Funnel).

Clicking the name of the funnels will take you to the Editing page.

To delete the selected funnel, click the cross mark in the last column.

## Adding the funnel to the favorites

To add a funnel to the favorites, click the star in the first column. The star will change its color from grey to yellow. The funnels added to favorites are displayed first in the list.

## Detailed analytics

Links:

-
Sources

-
Cohorts

-
Additional fields

These allow you to go to the in-depth analytics view of the selected funnel.

## Sales Statistics (Sales Report)

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051187031-Sales-Statistics-Sales-Report

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / Sales Statistics (Sales Report)

**Content**

-
[Chart](#h_01ERE948G2B2XYR4DX8ET90GEY)

-
[Filter ](#h_01ERE94H0ZXX4RMZYJCP58C2SM)

On this page, you can see the statistics for the particular period and for the selected products.

The page is available from the menu **Analytics **⇒ **Sales ****R****eport**. Also, it opens every time you log into the account.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073106172/blobid0.png)

As you click on the blue numbers in the Created, Confirmed, and Paid columns, it opens the [Bills](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851031-Orders-) page (with the filter by date and the state of a payment).

## Chart

The** Show the chart** button expands a graphic interpretation of the main parameters at the top of the page:

-
green bar – income

-
red bar – expenses

-
green line – profit

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073106192/blobid1.png)

## Filter

The filter allows you to set up the way the table looks.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073373071/blobid3.png)

Select the period and the products to display the statistics.

Data on all the products for the last months is displayed on default.

Also, you can select the type of grouping – by days, weeks, or months.

You can specify the necessary filter settings and click the **Search **button. To return to the default settings, use the **Cancel **button.

## Statistics via Email

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050696792-Statistics-via-Email

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / Statistics via Email

On this page, you can set up receiving statistics on subscriptions to your email.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105252/blobid0.png)

Select the frequency of receiving the statistics by ticking the checkboxes.

Statistics are sent to the email from the **Your Email** field of your **private account**.

## Subscription Statistics 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050855011-Subscription-Statistics

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / Subscription statistics

**Content **

- [Filter ](#h_01EQ05FCVY2YTTMY5RE301N420)

- [Statistics via Email ](#h_01EQ05FJF5NMYDEKJ5E72RA3S4)

- [Data Export ](#h_01EQ05FS9DYEXDHQ51ZCEF1RNM)

 |

On this page, you can track the changes in the subscription base.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/001-1.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/001-1.png)

At the top of the table there is information that summarizes subscriptions for the selected period.

The numbers in the **Subscribed** and **Unsubscribed **columns are clickable. When you click it, the [Subscribers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers-) page opens. The data on this page is filtered according to the relevant conditions, so you can see who exactly has subscribed or unsubscribed.

## Filter

The filter allows you to set up a type, period, and format of data in the table.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-12-16_15-15-22.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-12-16_15-15-22.png)

You can specify the groups and categories of statistics to be displayed. It is all in the groups by default.

-
The **Visibility **button allows you to set up the grouping of the data in the table by days, weeks, or months.

-
The **Period from**** and**** ****to** block allows you to select a period to show the statistics. It is the current month by default.

It is not necessary to fill in all the fields of the filter. Set all the filter criteria and click the **Search **button. The table will show you the data corresponding to the filter conditions. To show the detailed table, click the **Filter **button and then the **Clear **button.

## Statistics via Email

Clicking this button opens the [Send statistics via email](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050696792-Statistics-via-Email) page. Here, you can set up the parameters of sending the statistics to your email.

## Data Export

The **gear** button allows you to export the table to MS Excel.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-12-16_15-15-53.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-12-16_15-15-53.png)

## The Sales Funnel – Additional Fields

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050699852-The-Sales-Funnel-Additional-Fields

/[ Reports ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports)/ The Sales Funnel. Additional Field**

**

**Content **

- [Filter ](#h_01ERE8K8886MYHBNH2S9F4GMN0)

- [Visible fields ](#h_01ERE8KJPQ7THQ6KAN439CVZ78)

- [Data export ](#h_01ERE8KREXE7WYZ1JX1DPZ9WSZ)

 |

The current page contains a report on additional fields of the selected [sales funnel](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185591-Sales-Funnel). If your contacts have [additional fields](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177871-CRM-Settings), you can see a comparison of the statistics data over a selected field in this report.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073374271/blobid0.png)

## Filter

The filter allows you to set up the output of statistics data.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073107872/blobid1.png)

The **Retrieve statistics from…****to** field allows you to set a period to calculate the statistics.

The most popular periods of time (7 days, 5 weeks, 4 months, 1 year) are contained in the quick filter at the top of the page.

The **Display by the ****additional**** field** allows you to select an additional field from the list. The report will be made in this field.

The side filter menu contains the **Advertising** and **Tags** tabs, which allow you to retrieve statistics, not from the whole funnel, but just by the particular parameters.

In the **Advertising** tab, you can retrieve statistics by a particular channel.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073374311/blobid2.png)

In the Tags tab, in the field of the same name, you can specify a tag to retrieve the statistics of its funnel.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073374331/blobid3.png)

The **Read the interval analysis** checkbox opens an additional tab where you can set up the parameters of the calculation.

Select **the step of the funnel **you want to calculate. After that, set up the selected calculating **parameter **and the **interval **to sum up the statistics.

The **Cumulative data in the statistics** checkbox allows you to specify the output in a cumulative total or by individual periods.

As you select the **Interval Analysis**, the appearance of the table changes. The **Interval Analysis** block will appear with the statistics on the selected parameter with the specified interval.

## Visible fields

The **View **button allows you to add the additional data output to each step of the funnel.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/2019-12-16_14-38-04.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/2019-12-16_14-38-04.png)

The **Amount** field is displayed by default. To display other fields, tick the checkboxes next to the names of the fields.

In the example above, the % field is activated, so the table will look like that.

The percentage value will be added to each step in addition to the quantitative value.

## Data export

The gear button allows you to export data in the CSV format.

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073374351/blobid4.png)

Click it and select the format in the **Export **field.

## The Sales Funnels – Cohorts

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185971-The-Sales-Funnels-Cohorts

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / The Sales Funnels – Cohorts

**Content **

- [Visible fields ](#h_01EQ062BWE4G5JK0RB9PWSNRE7)

- [Filter ](#h_01EQ062KZYEB1B07JF1116XWFE)

- [Data export ](#h_01EQ062XSY8BQ5S5ZQ070G4MPW)

The page allows you to conduct a cohort analysis by comparing statistics data by groups that have hit [funnels](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185591-Sales-Funnel) for the same period of time.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105332/blobid0.png) The question mark next to the name of a step allows you to get a hint about what actions are calculated at that step.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372411/blobid1.png)

## Visible fields

The **View **button allows you to add the additional data output to each step of the funnel.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105352/blobid2.png)

The Amount field is displayed by default. To display other fields, tick the checkboxes next to the names of the fields.

When the **%** field is activated, the table will look like this.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372431/blobid3.png)

The percentage value will be added to each step in addition to the quantitative value.

## Filter

The filter allows you to set up the output of statistics data.

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372451/blobid4.png)

Retrieve statistics from** ****and to** field allows you to set a period to calculate the statistics.

The most popular periods of time are contained in the quick filter at the top of the page.

The **Display**** by** button allows you to select a period for which data will be combined into one cohort.

The side filter menu contains the **Advertising** and **Tags **tabs, which allow you to retrieve statistics not from the whole funnel but just by particular parameters.

At the **Advertising **tab, you can retrieve statistics from the particular[ channel/source/campaign/advertisement/keys](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550771-New-Campaign-).

![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105452/blobid5.png)

The **Show by click** field allows you to retrieve statistics from the first and last click.

At the **Tag **tab in the field with the same name, you can specify a [tag](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177191-Tags) to retrieve the statistics of the funnel.

![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105472/blobid6.png)

The **Calculate interval analysis** checkbox opens an additional tab where you can set up the parameters of the calculation.

![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372471/blobid7.png)

Select **the step of the funnel **you want to calculate. After that, set up the selected calculating **p****arameters **and the **interval **to sum up the statistics.

The **Cumulative data in the statistics** checkbox allows you to specify the output as a cumulative total or by individual periods.

As you select the **Interval Analysis**, the appearance of the table changes. The **Interval Analysis** block will appear with the statistics on the selected parameters with the specified interval.

![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372511/blobid8.png)

## Data export

The **gear** button allows you to export data in the CSV format.

![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372551/blobid9.png)

Click it and select the format in the **Export** field.

## The Sales Funnels – Making a Funnel

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185531-The-Sales-Funnels-Making-a-Funnel

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / The Sales Funnels – Making a Funnel

**Content **

- [What is an analytical funnel? ](#h_01EREH42KA15VC32D765DDNRMN)

- [Adjusting the funnel ](#h_01EREH57TRB08ENBF4XEMMYV49)

-
[Setting up the events inside the funnel ](#h_01EREH5FZ8R0T71KSJ9FGSV4JJ)

[Subscription ](#h_01EREH8T92FJVHHTFXP5YEVE7R)

- [Processing a bill ](#h_01EREH9BFVH771PHY8KWTXB4VX)

- [Paying a bill ](#h_01EREH9N92K1TJBA9BRV0277RA)

- [Instant emails ](#h_01EREHAD762N6VMYKJJH6XJXRM)

- [Automatic emails ](#h_01EREHAQF7KD12FWMK11846MHT)

The analytical sales funnel is a powerful marketing tool that allows you to find and address the weak points that lose potential clients.

## What is an analytical funnel?

For example, we have got the simplest funnel – the subscription for freebies and the automatic series of letters that offer to buy the first cheap product.

With the help of an analytics funnel, you could break down this chain of actions into steps and follow up on the conversion. The simplest way is to do two-step analytics:

Step 1 – subscribing to newsletters
Step 2 – paying for products

But this funnel doesn’t show anything except the most general conversion from the subscriber to the customer. You could break down the process into several steps:

Step 1 – a person subscribed to newsletters
Step 2 – he or she activated the subscription
Step 3 – he or she read the email
Step 4 – he or she followed a link in the email
Step 5 – he or she processed a bill
Step 6 – he and she paid the bill

Such a detailed funnel will show at what step you lose your potential clients. It also allows you to adjust the most effective selling chain.

## Adjusting the funnel

Let’s see the instruction.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073371911/blobid0.png)

Here, you should name a funnel.

Using the **Add Step** button, you can create the number of steps you need.

You can roll up the steps by clicking their names for your comfort. You should name each step and select an event for the statistics to be calculated.

## Setting up the events inside the funnel

### Subscription

If you have selected the ‘subscription for newsletters’ event, you may select the subscription you want to view.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073104572/blobid1.png)

After that, select which subscribers will be calculated: all, activated, not –activated, or unsubscribed.

### Processing a bill

If the event of processing bills is selected, specify the product for which data will be calculated.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073371931/blobid2.png)

Add some tags, if necessary.

### Paying a bill

If the event of paying bills is selected, specify the product for which data will be calculated. You could also use some tags.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073104612/blobid3.png)

### Instant emails

If the event of actions with instant emails is selected:

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073104632/blobid4.png)

First, select the action:

-
Opened

-
Did not open

-
Clicked

-
Did not click

![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073371971/blobid5.png)

Then select the emails from which statistics will be calculated:

-
All

-
Any

![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372011/blobid6.png)

Select the necessary emails from the list.

![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372031/blobid7.png)

### Automatic emails

If the event of actions with automatic emails is selected:

![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073104672/blobid8.png)

First, select this action:

- Opened

- Did not open

- Clicked

- Did not click

Then select the emails from which statistics will be calculated:

-
all

-
any of the selected emails of the group (you should select the group)

 ![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073104712/blobid9.png)

Select the emails in the group.

![blobid10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073104732/blobid10.png)

After you set up all the necessary steps, click the **Save** button. The funnel will be added to the [funnel list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185591-Sales-Funnel).

## The Sales Funnels – Sources

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051186891-The-Sales-Funnels-Sources

/ [Reports](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133772-Reports) / The Sales Funnels – Sources

**Content **

- **[Filter](#h_01EREJBRFATP0ET144MTZY2MNP)**

- **[Visible fields ](#h_01EQ03VJTD9B33YVK43YAQN3QY)**

- **[Data export ](#h_01EQ03VSHD0Q67W0K1A8R8P5F5)**

This page contains a report on traffic sources of a selected [sales funnel](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051185591-Sales-Funnel). Here, you can see all the channels that are driving traffic to the sales funnel – direct referrals, affiliate traffic, advertising, and so on.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105852/blobid0.png)

The page allows you to track how many people have come to each step of the funnel.

Click the question mark next to the name of a step to get a hint about what actions are calculated at
that step.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105872/blobid1.png)

## Filter

The filter allows you to set up the output of statistics data.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372911/blobid2.png)

Retrieve statistics from** ****and to**** **field allows you to set a period to calculate the statistics.

The most popular periods of time (today, yesterday, this month, last month, 30 days) are contained in the quick filter at the top of the page.

The **Show by click** field allows you to retrieve the statistics by the first and last click.

The side filter menu contains the **Advertising** and **Tags** tabs, which allow you to retrieve statistics not from the whole funnel but just by particular parameters.

At the **Advertising **tab, you can retrieve statistics by a particular channel.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105892/blobid3.png)

At the Tag tab in the field with the same name, you can specify a tag to retrieve the statistics of that funnel.

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105932/blobid4.png)

The** Read the interval analysis**** **check-box opens an additional tab where you can set up the parameters of the calculation.

![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105972/blobid5.png)

Select **the step of the funnel **that you want to calculate. After that, set up the selected calculating parameters and the interval to sum up the statistics.

The **Cumulative data** check-box in the statistics allows you to specify the output as a cumulative total or by individual periods.

As you select the **Interval Analysis**, the appearance of the table changes. The **Interval Analysis **block will appear with the statistics on the selected parameters with the specified interval.

![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372951/blobid6.png)

## Visible fields

The **View** button allows you to add the additional data output to each step of the funnel.

![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073372971/blobid7.png)

The **Amount** field is displayed on default. To display other fields, tick the checkboxes next to the names of the fields.

If the **%** field is activated, the table will look like this.

![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073105992/blobid8.png)

The percentage value will be added to each step in addition to the quantitative value.

## Data export

The **gear** button allows you to export data in the CSV format.

![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073106012/blobid9.png)

Click it and select the format in the **Export** field.
