# § Automation

Section URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245431-Automation
Section ID: 360009245431


## Creating and Editing Processes

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051178071-Creating-and-Editing-Processes

/ [Automation](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245431-Automation) / Creating and Editing Processes

**Content**

- [The name of the process ](#h_01ERDBRW0N2SK21GP30DBVH8XG)

-
[+Add trigger ](#h_01ERDBTGRMTQGZH4K434Q2H89R)

[What can serve as a trigger?](#h_01ERDBV1D5H05RMFTCR1CCEG8E)

- [Trigger settings ](#h_01ERDBV7R46C4PBVMYANNYM89T)

- [+Add the next step of the process ](#h_01ERDBVGJVRQDWKEQ42YR988VJ)

-
[+Add “Action” ](#h_01ERDBVT8C6AQ0G7DK57BXTQXJ)

[“Send email” action ](#h_01ERDC8QQ4P41P3158FAYWVW4S)

- [“End of process” action ](#h_01ERDC9ZBKKB2GMKF2M6EZZ62J)

- [Action settings ](#h_01ERDCAC12RW1R2XN7WRZMDQP6)

-
[+ Add “Condition” ](#h_01ERDCAPAC2CSXFDG29NY1G5BE)

[Filter ](#h_01ERDCAXWA73A117KBCS6SBQD9)

- [A/B Test ](#h_01ERDCB7CSPMASWJ1R3PPK6QPX)

- [Temporary field of the process editing ](#h_01ERDCBHKT23WG3TD1TSYXBJ2T)

- [Frequently asked questions (FAQ) ](#h_01ERDCC1DQK8YHWPCSE4VV92C9)

This section is available from the main menu “Tasks” — “Processes”.

What the process is for and the basic settings of a section have been described in [this article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051179551-Processes).

## The name of the process

When you create a new process, it is named by default as “Process (Date/Time)”. You can change the name to something that will be clear to you. Customers and subscribers will never see this name.

Click on the process name; enter a new name and click “Save”.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/process_edit1.png)

## +Add a trigger

Trigger is an event that occurs with a contact. If this event occurs, the trigger causes the contact to be added to the process and the process execution.

Each process has “Added to process” trigger enabled by default. This trigger allows you to add a contact to the process manually. To do this, you need to go to the Lead card by clicking on the email in the Contacts  —  Lead section. Then click the cogwheel icon and select “Add to process”.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/1576142744427-1024x452.png)

To add an additional trigger, click the plus sign on the right and select the desired trigger.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/2021-01-18_153523.jpg)

### What can serve as a trigger?

Events work by logic “or”. For example, a contact (lead) OR subscribed to the list OR made an order — any of these events, including any combination of them.

List of available events that will cause the process execution:

-
Tag applied

-
Tag removed

-
Subscribed to list

-
Added to list

-
Removed from list

-
New order

-
Paid order

-
Cancelled order

-
Refund by order

-
Activated subscription

-
New leads

-
Visited page

-
Opened an email

-
Custom field value changed

### Trigger settings

By adding a trigger, you can specify a name that you understand, one or an infinite number of repetitions for one contact, set a trigger condition, and add an additional condition.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/2021-01-18_155014.jpg)

When you configure a trigger (other than first-level triggers), you can configure it to move to the next step, not only when the trigger is triggered, but also when the timeout is exceeded.

Let us consider an example.

You want customers who made the order for a product to temporarily not receive a mail-out with other offers and not be distracted from the mailing. You add them to a separate list through the process and want the customers who paid the order to start receiving the mail-out again. Moreover, those who have not paid would begin to receive it 10 days after creating the order.

In this case, we add a “Paid order” trigger to the process, followed by the “Remove from list” action. In the settings of the trigger “Paid order”, select “Go to the next step — when the trigger is triggered or wait time is finished — 10 days.”

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/process_edit5.png)

You can set up a contact to move to the next stage of the process after a certain time or certain date, even if the trigger did not work.

## + Add the next step of the process

Click the “Plus sign” below to go to the setting of the next process step.

A step can be the “Actions”, “Conditions”, or “Triggers”.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/2020-02-24_14-15-50.png)

You can configure the branching of the process. Thus, several different actions, conditions, or triggers will be performed simultaneously for a contact at one stage of the process.

You can use process branching if you want two actions to be performed simultaneously for a contact added to a process, such as adding to the list and adding a trigger.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/process_edit7.png)

## + Add “Action”

Action — is what happens to the contact after the trigger is triggered. If the trigger is in action, one of the following actions can be performed on the contact:

-
Add tag

-
Delete tag

-
Add to list

-
Remove from list

-
Send email

-
POST/GET request

-
Change contact field value

-
Task

-
End of process

### “Send email” action

By this action, you can set up sending an email directly in the “Process”.

We have already learned to change the name of the block. In addition, you can configure one or an infinite number of repetitions for contact. If the toggle switch is off (black background color), an email will be sent to the contact every time he or she gets into the process and reaches this action. If the switch is on (green background), the message will be sent to the contact only once.

An email can be sent as soon as the contact has reached this point, a few days after the previous step, or on a specific date.

You must select the sender’s contact on whose behalf the message will be sent,. then fill in the “Message subject” and write a letter in a familiar visual editor.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/process_edit8.png)

Before saving the action, you can evaluate the email through “Preview”. Test it and add an additional condition, for example, do not send an email to contacts in a certain list.

### “End of process” action

Each chain of actions in the process must end with an “End of process” action. If this action is not at the end of the chain, the process for the contact is not completed and will not get into the statistics “Done”. In addition, if a process can be run for a contact any number of times, but not at the same time, the contact will not get into the process the second time because it is “stuck” in the process.
It is possible to edit the “End of process” action. To do this, click on the “pencil” next to this block.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073095652/blobid0.png)

The block settings will open, where you can set a new name and select the color of the block.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364271/blobid1.png)

### Action settings

In addition to changing the name and number of repetitions, you can specify the time of the action, select a list or tag, and add an additional condition.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364291/blobid2.png)

The execution time of the action can be:

-
after done the previous

-
after done the previous one through

-
after done the previous on date

By selecting “after done the previous one through”, you can choose which days and at what time the action will be performed. For example, the action can run 7 days after the previous one, but only from Monday to Friday or from 08:00 to 21:00.

## + Add “Condition”

You can set a filter or use the A/B Test to distribute contacts into two different chains when certain conditions are performed.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073095692/blobid3.png)

### Filter

In the filter, you can choose whether it is necessary to fulfill one or all the conditions for passing the filter, specify one or more conditions, and add an additional condition.

After you add a condition, you must add an action, condition, or trigger that will trigger when the condition performed and or not performed.

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364331/blobid4.png)

**Examples:**

-
In the sales newsletter, we send out a special offer to buy a new course and give a link to the course’s sales page.
In the Process, we set up a condition that will check the subscriber’s visit to this selling page, and if he visited it, send him an email with an offer to receive an additional bonus or discount on this product. Thus, we “fuel interest” in our offer and stimulate sales of a new product.

-
We want to drive repeat sales. To do this, we set up a condition that will verify the bills payment of the first paid Product no. 1 of our auto-funnel (tripwire) and customers who have paid for it a certain number of days after the purchase. We will send a letter offering discounts on Product No. 2, which will complement Product No. 1 well. Thus, we encourage customers to repeat sales and get more profit in our project.

### A/B Test

When the “A/B Test” condition is applied, the process will go along one of the branches specified in this block. The percentage of distribution of contacts depends on the values set in the variants settings.

![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073095732/blobid5.png)

The percentage value in the variants can be changed.

**Example:**

We launched the “A / B Test” with a distribution of 50/50 variants.
In the first variant, we send a letter with a discount offer for Product No. 1 to customers who have paid bills in the amount of more than 500 dollars, and in the second variant we send a letter with a discount offer for Product No. 2.
Based on the analysis of statistics, they realized that according to the first variant, the process works much more efficiently; letter No. 1 brings the project more profit than letter No. 2.
We change the distribution of percent in variants by 100/0.
The process continues to work with high-performance indicators, and process analytics is not lost. With this approach, the process does not need to be reconfigured.

## Temporary field of the process editing

The upper right corner has the following buttons:

-
“Show statistics” button — when it activated, the “Filter” button appears. And in each action, trigger, and condition, the number of repetitions for each contact is shown, as well as the number of times this action, trigger, and the condition have already been performed

-
Process status button

-
The button of setting, by clicking on which you can rename the process

-
Save button

-
Exit from editing process button

Demonstration of statistics and filter will help you to see the progress of the process, at what stages of the process contacts are stuck. You can use this data to adjust your sales funnel.

![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073095772/blobid6.png)

You can change the location of the elements by dragging them and thus create a convenient visualization of the process.

## Frequently asked questions (FAQ)

**Is it possible to edit a running process?**

Yes, you can edit the process if it is already running. Before saving the changes, the system will ask you what to do with the unfinished sessions. If you have deleted some process steps, the process would complete for the contacts for which these steps performed. You can choose one of the actions “End of process” that you need to apply to these contacts.

For those contacts that are not in the deleted steps, you can choose one of two options: continue the process execution, or select the “End of process” action.

## Processes

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051179551-Processes

/ [Automation](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245431-Automation) / Processes

**Content **

-
[What are the Processes for? ](#h_01ERDEYWCGMD41ZFF4Q7SHCTQ2)

[Make a personal offer to the customer](#h_01ERDEZ2WG3QHGTYRTAE7M5617)

- [Remind the student about the course ](#h_01ERDEZETB3AXT5J9K4YVQ7RCW)

-
[How to add process? ](#h_01ERDEZPGFW4X5ZXZ8CZ9Q0WRN)

[Process name ](#h_01ERDF08X148KENXHC8JBZZCDW)

- [Main elements of the section ](#h_01ERDF0V916NQJZJ0MRA4NHR8F)

- [How many times the process will run for a single contact? ](#h_01ERDF2QV0QH5J77GK5ZYKMAN9)

- [How to edit a previously created process? ](#h_01ERDF31N9PRZ113GV5SAX719V)

-
[How to disable the process?](#h_01ERDF3A1RH60EBY1MJPJ7FS8Z)

- [How to delete the process? ](#h_01ERDF3MK6KZW9ZWE34H5XP561)

## What are the Processes for?

Processes allow you to set up a variable chain of actions for a contact, which will be started and executed, providing the contact fulfillment of one condition (triggers and events). By using the processes, you can segment the base, flexibly configure the sales funnel. Below, we describe the solutions to two of the huge number of tasks implemented by processes.

### Make a personal offer to the customer

**![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073098832/blobid0.png)**

**Task.** Set up the email campaign for contacts who cancelled their orders. Make a special offer to those who paid the bill, depending on the amount of previously paid bills.

-
Add the “New order” trigger and select the desired product

-
Add action “Add to list” and “Made the order“

-
Add the “Cancelled order” and “Paid order” triggers

-
Add the “Send email” action for the “Cancelled order” trigger. Add the “End of process” action

-
Add filter “Total amount paid — greater or equal to — 50,000” to the “Paid order” trigger

-
Add these filter options:
If “Yes”, add the action “Send email “50% discount“
If “No”, add the action “Send email “30% discount“

-
Add the “End of process” action

**Result.** Customers who canceled the order receive an offer to purchase a cheaper product. Customers who have paid the order receive an offer to buy a second product at discount; the discount rate depends on the total amount of previously paid orders.

### Remind the student about the course

**![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073367051/blobid1.png)**

Many students take the course and drop it off halfway or even at the beginning.

**Task**. Send a reminder to students who have not started the course within 7 days after purchase.

-
Using a [Rule](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051178391-Rules), adjust the tag “Lesson1” for students who opened the first lesson.

-
Add a “Paid course 7 days ago” tag. Perform the step after the fulfillment of the previous one in 7 days. This step is necessary in order to set the interval in the process execution.

-
Add a filter “Tags – matches – Lesson1”
If “Yes”, add “End of process” action.
If “No”, add the action “Send email “You didn`t open the lesson”.

-
Add the “End of process” action.

## How to add a process?

To configure a process, go to “Tasks”, “Processes”, and click “Add process”.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073367151/blobid2.png)

### Process name

When you create a new process, it is named by default as “Process (Date/Time)”. You can rename it to something that will be clear to you. Customers and subscribers will never see it.

Click on the process name; enter a new name and click “Save”.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073367171/blobid3.png)

### Main elements of the section

There are “Filter” and “Add process” buttons on the main page of the subsection. In the main part of the window — a list of already created processes, number of triggers for each, number of contacts in the process, and for which the process was completed, toggle on/off, and delete button.

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073367191/blobid4.png)

### How many times will the process run for a single contact?

The process can be executed once, or in an infinite number of times simultaneously or not simultaneously.

![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073099012/blobid5.png)

Let us consider an example.

You added two initial triggers to the process “New order” and “Add to list”.

If a process is to be run for a contact once, the customer who made an order and is in the process according to this trigger will not be in the process again later when another or the same trigger is triggered for him.

If the process is executed for one contact at any number of times, the contact already in the process will be added to it again when the same or another trigger is triggered for the contact again.

However, because the process can be run on a contact for more than 1 day, you can limit the process to contacts for which the process has not been completed. To do this, select “any number of times, if not started.”

### How to edit a previously created process?

Click the name of the created process to start editing.

![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073367211/blobid6.png)

## How to disable the process?

To disable the process, simply move the green slider to the left.

(Green background – on, black – off).

![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073099032/blobid7.png)

## How to delete a process?

To delete a process, click the “cross” next to the desired process. After the confirmation, the process and all information about it (done) will be deleted.

![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073367231/blobid8.png)

**Content **

## General description of the section

An automatic rule sets an action that works if a contact performs one of the conditions (triggers and events).

For example, if a contact pays for a product from the rule settings, then the contact is assigned a “VIP” tag, and the contact is added to “VIP” client list.

## How to add a rule?

Go to “Tasks” – “Automatic rules” to set a rule and create a new rule.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096112/blobid0.png)

To add a rule, click “Add rule”. A page with settings will spring up.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096132/blobid1.png)

### Rule name

Enter a name that you can easily understand. This name will never be seen by the clients and subscribers.

**+ Add trigger **

A trigger is an event that happens for contact. If an event occurs, the trigger executes the associated actions.

**What could serve as a trigger? **

Events follow “OR” logic. For example, the contact OR subscribes to the list OR creates an order — any mentioned event (including any of their combinations).

Here is a list of the available events which trigger the action.

-
Added to list

-
Removed from list

-
Tag applied

-
Tag removed

-
Activated subscription

-
Created order

-
Paid order

-
Refund by order

-
New leads

-
Start lesson

-
Got access to the lesson

-
Custom field value changed – allows you to perform an action if the value of the additional contact field has changed

Here are a few examples that demonstrate the capabilities of a trigger.

**Example 1. Segmentation by gender (in the example, a field with the “switch” type is used).**
**Option 1.**
You are doing active fitness newsletters. With this rule, you can separate women’s fitness from men’s and place women and men in separate groups. In the example from the screenshot below, a girl fills out a form and selects the “Female” gender, automatically falling into the “Women” group (implemented using the action).
**Option 2.**
Suppose you are engaged in active fitness newsletters. Thanks to this rule, you will be able to segment your base and make mailings to the target audience, sharing exercises for men and women. In the example from the screenshot below, a girl fills out a form and selects the “Female” gender, automatically falling into the “Women” group (implemented using the action).

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364591/blobid2.png)

**Example 2. Highlight contacts with a phone number.**** **The screenshot below shows how to configure the automatic addition to the group of contacts that gave you the phone number. This audience is usually warmer and calling them is easy and enjoyable.

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096152/blobid3.png)

### + Add action

Action is what happens with the contact once the trigger runs. If the trigger runs, then the contact can execute one of the following actions:

-
Add to list

-
Remove from list

-
To tag

-
Remove tag

-
Set custom field

-
POST/GET request sends the request via API to a third service or to your own script once the trigger runs. A list of the available transmitted parameters is called by clicking the curved brackets
A link to the script-processor must be securely connected (https)

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096172/blobid4.png)

For analytics purposes, if a contact is added to the list by a rule, then this list will not contain any previous promo tags. If the contact then generates order or subscribes to another list, then the promo tags will definitely appear.

Thus, these functions do not transform the records and the run of the promotional campaigns and partner programs. On the contrary, the subscription lists will display only the actual channels which bring the contact. It will be shown as follows:

![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096192/blobid5.png)

## Key elements of the section

The main subsection page has “Filter” and “Add rule” buttons. The main part of the window displays a list of the created rules, their trigger number, enable and disable button, and delete button.

## ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096232/blobid6.png)

## How many times can an action be executed for one contact?

An action could be executed only once or any (indefinite) number of times.

![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364631/blobid7.png)

Let’s look at the examples:

### Any number of times

You sell a product in different packages (mini, standard, max). You want to sort out the clients with the mini package and the clients with the standard and maxi packages.
They are sure to be in different groups, but we want to add the appropriate tags. For mini packages, the tag is “minimal-tariff”, for the other two — “VIP”. This requires several rules to create. The first rule presupposes:

-
to add “minimal-tariff” tag

-
to delete “VIP” tag (in case of its manual add action by you or your manager)

Adjust the settings of the trigger:

-
to pay for the mini package order

-
to add into the client list (a list from product settings, “Post payment actions“ tab) — in case of manual adding or import

- to add “minimal-tariff” tag — in case of manual adding of a tag by you or your manager

**![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096272/blobid8.png)**

If a client decides to switch from the “mini” to “standard” or “max” package, then you should create a rule when in this case a minimal tariff tag is deleted. The rule will be created in a manner similar to the previous rule:

-
to buy a maxi or standard package

-
to add to a client list (a list from product settings, Post payment actions tab) — in case of manual adding or import

-
to add “VIP” tag — in case of manual adding of a tag by you or your manager

We can set the following actions:

-
to add “VIP” tag

-
to delete the “minimal-tariff” tag (in case of manual adding by you or your manager)

![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096312/blobid9.png)

In this case, the rule must be repeated “any number of times”.

### Once per lead

To select the VIP clients who at least once bought the most expensive package, we create the following rule: we set – paid order for the most expensive tariff or subscription into the client list in the trigger, and we set – to add “VIP-client” tag in the action.

![blobid10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364691/blobid10.png)

## Done

When clicking the number of the executed actions, a page with the following information springs up:

-
Date and time when the action from the rule is triggered

-
First, last, and other names, phone, and email — contact details

-
Rule and trigger — the report is generated by the following formula:
Name of the rule — reason for its execution.
The screenshot below shows:
“Super-VIP” rule is triggered by the payment of “Order Number” by “Product” from the client.

-
Action — what happens with the contact once the trigger works. The screenshot shows the contact was added to the “Super-VIP” test list and was assigned a “VIP” tag.

![blobid11.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364711/blobid11.png)

- Status — whether the action is executed for the contact. A green check means the action is executed, while the red check means it is not. The rule is not executed if the action executed earlier (manually or automatically) has been set. The contact was not added to the VIP client group because the contact had already been added to the group before the rule was executed.

![blobid12.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096352/blobid12.png)

### Filter

A filter in “Done” section is used to find the action executed for a particular contact. You can also enter the personal data of the contact (last, first names, and other info) and look through the actions already executed. The search settings could be combined.

![blobid13.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364731/blobid13.png)

#### Rule

Rule field is used to select one or several rules. If the field is left empty, then the search will be done through all rules.

#### Date

“Date of done from” and “Date of done to” — when the dates are specified in the fields, you can set the date period for search. You can fill in one field only if required, while the second field could be left empty.

#### Search by lead info

This field requires one to enter the last, first, or patronymic names of the client, phone number, or email address. Only one parameter should be entered because the search is not done by all parameters.

### Export

To export the contacts with which the action was taken, click the gear and select “Export to CSV” in the menu that opens

![blobid14.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364791/blobid14.png)

### Add to group

In contrast to the transfer to the group from the “Contacts” or “Subscribers” section, the transfer from the “Run” section triggers the rules. That is, the rule will work when transferring from this section to the transferred contacts.

## How to edit an already created rule?

Click the name of the created rule to switch to an editing mode.

![blobid15.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073364811/blobid15.png)

## How to disable a rule?

To disable a rule, just move the button against the required rule.
(Green color of the background means the rule is enabled, while the black color means that the rule is disabled).

![blobid16.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096372/blobid16.png)

## How to delete a rule?

To delete a rule, click a cross against the required rule. Once the deletion is accepted, the rule and its information will be deleted.

![blobid17.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073096392/blobid17.png)

Warning! Deleted rules and their information are not restored.

## Tasks

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050859551-Tasks

/ [Automation](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245431-Automation) / Tasks

**Content **

-
What are the tasks for?

A call to a website visitor (a simple case)

-
Calls to hot clients by Sales Department (a hot case)

-
Task — automatic Process action

-
Can we assign a Task manually?

From Automation section

-
From Lead or Order cards

-
Subsection features

General view

-
Types of tasks

-
Task filter

-
How to edit and delete the tasks

-
How does an employee work with the tasks?

## What are the tasks for?

This section assigns the tasks to the employees (additional administrators, call center operators) or even to a Department.

Tasks enable you to select the hot leads or doubters to suggest the best offers or provide the best services. It becomes easier to arrange and record the end-to-end interaction process with the clients. This is the main application of tasks (together with the existing Processes). Read two examples of this work below.

Tasks have some extra useful functions. You (or your employees) may, from time to time, need to call a client or to provide him or her with some extra materials or whatever it may be. More often than not, you may not have the proper instrument to record these tasks, and you just text them to your employees in different messengers (or external CRM systems as a better alternative). In the best case, these tasks are executed for a long time, sometimes they are partly done or even lost. Now, you can assign the tasks in InfluencerSoft and monitor their execution.

### A call to a website visitor (a simple case)

**Goal:** You would like to increase sales. You have decided to call your website visitors who, for example, visited a page with a course description and make them a special limited offer. If this offer is not accepted, then a discount on a product could be given.

**What should be done?**

-
Go to Process editor and add “Visited page” in a start trigger. An example below gives a typical page with a list of all courses. You are likely to have a landing page for a particular course or a group of courses.
The trigger is set to 1) “Visited URL”, 2) “Without parameters” to count the visits with the ad tags and without, and 3) enter the page address.[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks1-2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks1-2.png)

-

Add “Task” action. It will automatically generate a task to a call center manager. See the manager’s view of the page at the end of the article. Now, we will focus on business logics design. Let’s consider a simple case: a website visitor would like to either buy a course or not after the call. Let’s write as follows:![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks3-4-1.png)3.Then use already familiar Process instruments to configure the mailout for each case![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks5.png)

**Result:** A task to call is automatically assigned to a manager at the time when a visitor is interested in the course the most. The manager just registers the result since you have already configured the other actions which are automatically generated.

### Calls to hot clients by Sales Department (a hot case)

-
**Goal:** You want to bring the purchase to the clients that 1.) have not asked for order yet 2.) have been sent the order, but have not paid them. Do this ASAP, literally within 5 to 10 minutes after a webpage visit.

**What should be done?**

First, find those clients that have opened the checkout page, then see whether the order has been generated. This determines the next steps. We can generate automatic tasks to the Sales Department, then add call-dependent stages of our sales funnel. So, let’s consider these steps:

Create an auto-list that will collect the unpaid orders by one of the products. This is a two-click action.

- Now, go to [Process](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051178071-Creating-and-Editing-Processes) editor and add “Visited a webpage” to a start trigger. This example gives a typical checkout page.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks6.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks6.png)3.Now, the order page visit triggers the process. How can we understand whether an order has been generated or not? Whether it is paid or not? Here, we use a filter and an auto-list we created earlier. The filter parameters are in the auto-list with the unpaid orders by this product![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks7.png)

-
Assign the task to the Sales Department. The first alternative: a customer 1) visits an order checkout page and 2) the order is not paid. In this case, the Sales Department is assigned a task, and call the customer, and help with the buying process. The tasks are in the Actions field. This is how it looks:![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks8.png)

-
Tasks give certain advantages by two factors: they are automatically generated once pre-defined (by you) settings are reached, and one can configure different scenarios at further stages.  There are two alternatives by default — a task can be either “Done” or “Failed, but the actual sales give various scenarios. A customer can pay the invoice during the call — a perfect scenario, can ask for a discount, or the call can reveal a need in another product, etc. You can add any scenarios as a task result. A call center manager just registers the task result that automatically triggers the process.[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks9.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks9.png)

-
Assign the actions for each case. For example, we can mail letters containing a link to the sales page (and a discount offer), describe other products, or mail some free useful information. These can be accomplished by familiar actions of the [Processes](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051178071#h_01ERDBVT8C6AQ0G7DK57BXTQXJ). Let’s go back to point 4. We have classified a customer’s action 1.) visited a page 2.) generated an order, but did not pay it. What if the order is not generated? In this case, we can automatically set the task to the Sales Department, for them to find out why the order is not generated and to assist in its processing. Ultimately, your process (or much more complicated process) will look like this
[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks10.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks10.png)

**Result.** The system identifies everyone visited the order checkout page. System generated tasks depend on the result from the order processing. Having talked with a potential customer, a manager selects further scenario in 1 click, and the process is automatically run. It becomes faster and more efficiently to work with a customer, more and more potential customers are reached.

- Now all we have to do is to assign the actions for each case. For example, we can mail letters containing a link to sales page (and a discount offer), describe other products or mail some free useful information. These can be accomplished by familiar actions of the [Processes](https://help.justclick.io/archives/5747#_Add_Action), and we will not go deeper here. Let’s return to point 4. We have decided on our actions if a customer 1) visited a page 2) generated an order but did not pay it. What if the order is not generated? In this case we can set an automatically assigned task to the Sales Department to call with a different purpose — to find out why the order is not generated, to assist in its processing. We will not describe all steps — they are the same by nature. Ultimately, your process (or much more complicated process) will look like this:
[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks10.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks10.png)

**Result.** The system identifies everyone visited the order checkout page. System generated tasks depend on the result from the order processing. Having talked with a potential customer, a manager selects further scenario in 1 click, and the process is automatically run. It becomes faster and more efficiently to work with a customer, more and more potential customers are reached.

## Task — automatic Process action

We have talked about a real example above and have not said a word about some settings. These settings are not unique for the Tasks —you can find them in other actions of Processes. But you can select, for example, time and days of the week.

Let’s consider all possibilities on the screenshot below:
[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks11.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks11.png)

## Can we assign a Task manually?

Yes, we can. We mentioned that at the beginning of the article.

### From Automation section

Go to “Automation” – “Task” subsection and click “Create a task”.[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks12-2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks12-2.png)

### From Lead or Order cards

Lead and Order cards have a new tab — Tasks. Here you can see all tasks for this order or lead and add a new task.[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks13.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks13.png)

## Subsection features

### General view

The main page of the subsection displays “Create a task”, “Types”, and “Filter” buttons. The left upper corner shows the overall number of the tasks, as well as the number of tasks by status: opened, closed, overdue.

Chief admin of the profile can see these tasks, the employees see the tasks assigned to them.

The main part of the window displays a list of generated tasks with detailed information about each task. Pink highlights expired tasks, green – the tasks to be completed by today, white – the tasks to be completed in the future.

Tasks generated within a Process will also be displayed here.
[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks14.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks14.png)

### Types of tasks

“Types” button controls the types of tasks: rename them, tailor them, select an icon and color them, reorder them in a list. These can be any types: just a call by default or reading specialized books before having a call to a very important customer. The key point here is that you spend less time on communicating with your employees.
Your newly created tasks will definitely be available in the tasks inside the Process.
[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks15-1.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks15-1.png)

### Task filter

“Filter” button can find all tasks by a pre-defined parameter or a set of parameters. Filter finds a task by its number or name, by type, selects all tasks assigned on particular dates, generated or executed on particular dates, finds the tasks by a manager in charge, by status, result or the tasks generated by a particular employee.

## How to edit and delete the tasks

A task can be edited by the Chief admin only. To do this, open a task by clicking the number, task description or an object. Click task status in the opened lead card and then “Edit” button. Then you can change the task type, its description, dates or assign this task to another employee.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks16.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks16.png)

You can delete a task by clicking a cross to the right of the task description in the overall list of tasks or by going to task editing in a lead card.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks17.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks17.png)

## How does an employee work with the tasks?

An employee sees the tasks in the overall list and opens them as we did it earlier. An employee can comment and select the result in a lead (or order) card, inside a task. The screenshot below gives both options by default. If you have already changed them or added your own, they will also appear in the task.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks18.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/tasks18.png)

*[Processes](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051179551-Processes) *

*[Rules ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051178391)*

# § Contacts

Section URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts
Section ID: 360009245391


## Add and Edit Categories in Contacts

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400832-Add-and-Edit-Categories-in-Contacts

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Add and Edit Categories

This page allows you to add new or edit existing categories.

*Pages for adding and editing categories are identical to each other except for the page title (Add or Edit respectively).*

## Main settings

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/846-01.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/846-01.png)

Enter the **name of the category** (since it will be seen by subscribers, it is advisable to make it meaningful).

Specify which [lists ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists)are included in this category (if you need to select several lists, do this with the **Ctrl** key pressed on the keyboard). To create a new category, you need add to it at least one contact list. After that, you will be able to add new lists to the category at the time of [creation](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List).

Select the [sender](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-) from which letters will be sent in this category.

Depending on the selected sender, the **footer of the letter** will change.

After making the necessary changes, click the **Save **button. The category will be added to the list on the [Categories](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400732-Categories) page.

## Add and Edit Contact Auto-Lists

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400392-Add-and-Edit-Contact-Auto-Lists

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Add and Edit Contact Auto-Lists

**Content**

- [Basic data](#h_01ER9S7PY7TKAZ2DND9M8G2ME8)

- [Conditions ](#h_01ER9S83A438PF74B3C6HT74QG)

This page allows you to add new or edit the existing auto-lists.

The difference between an auto-list and the usual one is that contacts are automatically added to an auto-list when certain conditions are met.

*The pages for adding and editing are identical to each other except for the page title (Add or edit**,** respectively).*

The page consists of two tabs:

-
Basic data

-
Conditions

## Basic data

**![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-02-06_22-49-18.png)**

Enter the name of the auto list in the **Name **field.

Use the **Automated series** checkbox to specify whether the auto list members will continue to receive the [main series](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848451-Email-Series-) mail.

Select the [sender](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-) for the series letters.

The remaining fields are optional.

You can:

-
Arrange auto-lists by combining them into [categories](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400732-Categories) (they must be [created](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400832-Add-and-Edit-Categories) first). Also, the distribution by category can be adjusted at any time.

-
Set the redirect page after unsubscribing.

## Conditions

In this tab, the conditions under which the contact will be added to the auto list are specified.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Add-auto-list-seodpb2-justclick-io.png)

Adding any other [lists](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388332-Products-) or to the list of participants, or customers of a certain product/s with paid, unpaid, or canceled accounts can be configured.

Moving by category is done by clicking on the blue folder. Select a list by clicking on the empty checkbox. It should have a blue tick. All lists in the category can be chosen by clicking on the checkbox category.

For example, there is a course or training that is sold in several packages with different contents. Accordingly, several lists of clients will be formed (by the number of packages). If the participants of lists should receive an informative newsletter during the training or recording of the same lessons, it can be combined into one auto-list for ease of distribution.

It is also possible to create an auto-list by the location of contacts by specifying the value in the **City** field. This can be used when announcing offline events to subscribers.

After making the necessary changes, click the **Save **button. The auto-list will be added to the list on the [Contact lists](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists) page.

## Add and Edit Contact List

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Add and Edit Contact List

**Content**

-
[Basic data](#h_01ER9QZ28N266W011A5VXFYDZ0)

-
[API](#h_01ER9QZA878J995C9RNK12TEHS)

This page allows you to add new or edit existing lists of contacts

*The pages for adding and editing are identical to each other except for the page title (Add or Edit, respectively).*

The page consists of the following tabs:

-
Basic data

-
API

## Basic data

Be sure to enter the list **name** and select the [sender](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/05.png)

The remaining fields are optional.

You can:

-
Arrange lists of contacts by combining them into [categories](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400732-Categories) (they must be [created](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400832-Add-and-Edit-Categories) first). Also, the distribution by category can be adjusted at any time.

-
Change the text of the activation letter.

-
Set the redirect page after unsubscribing.

## API

On this tab, you can specify the address of the script, which will receive notifications when adding a new contact to the list.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-02-06_22-45-20.png)

After making the necessary changes, click the **Save **button. The list will be added to the list on the [Contact Lists](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists) page.

## Adding and Editing a Call Assignment

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051165971-Adding-and-Editing-a-Call-Assignment

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Adding and Editing a Call Assignment

**Content**

- [Main settings ](#h_01ERA7BV0R82KT7S6AV20FCAHM)

-
[Statuses](#h_01ERA7C9AQEBWH2XC5J75G3614)

- [Tooltip for an employee ](#h_01ERA7CVJHAN54PAJQXDPHMY44)

- [Preparation of a letter to the client ](#h_01ERA7DCFQ9H5208VPZNBTQ63X)

This page is intended for forming and editing a call-by-contact task for call center employees.

***Note!**** You can add a call request only if you have *[added](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050690672-Adding-and-Editing-a-User)* at least one employee with **a** Call Center profile.*

*![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-54-1.png)*

*Pages for adding and editing jobs are absolutely identical. They differ only in the heading (Add **or** Edit).*

The page consists of four tabs:

-
Main settings

-
Statuses

-
Tips for the employee

-
Client letter draft

## Main settings

You need to fill in the following data for the call assignment:

-
**Name**

-
**Category**

-
**Responsible employee**** **– select from the drop-down list of employees with the profile type Call Center. It is a required field.

-
**Automatically assign contacts to**** the ****personal**** ****manager **– takes on the task manager to ring up.

-
**Take contacts from these ****lists**** to **allow you to select a [list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists) for calling. If necessary, use the **Exclude contacts list** to remove contacts that are in two lists at the same time.

-
Moving categories in blocks are done by clicking on the blue folders. Select a list by clicking the checkbox; it should have a blue tick.

-
**A****dd contacts only with phone numbers **allows you to download only those contacts from the list that have phone numbers.

## Statuses

By default, there are four statuses:

-
New

-
In work

-
Successfully completed

-
Unsuccessfully completed

This tab allows you to change the possible statuses of the call assignment.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-56-1.png)

Click on the status bar to change its name.

Click **Create intermediate** link to add an additional status.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-57-2.png)

It can also be renamed by clicking on the name. To delete an intermediate status, click the cross at the end of the line.

## Tooltip for an employee

This tab allows you to add a description of the task and a phone conversation script for the employee.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-58-2.png)

## Preparation of an email to the client

This tab allows you to edit the letter templates that are sent to contacts after the call.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-59-2.png)

You can create a letter for each of the following cases:

-
The conversation went through

-
Did not answer the phone

-
Call back

-
Wrong number

-
Renouncement

To do this, switch the radio button to the appropriate template and edit the default version of the letter, if necessary. Editing is carried out using the default text editor, InfluencerSoft.

After making changes on all tabs, click the **Save **button. The task will be added to the [call history list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550811-Calling-Tasks).

## Adding and Editing a Group of Inactive Contacts

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050861631-Adding-and-Editing-a-Group-of-Inactive-Contacts

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Adding and Editing a Group of Inactive Contacts

**Content**

- [Basic data ](#h_01ER9VFFMSANJB46QC4KNKK4Y7)

- [Inactivity ](#h_01ER9V17J03WSF6WY2C9M7DBKP)

This page allows you to add new or edit existing groups of inactive contacts.

A group of inactive contacts is essentially an [auto-group](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List), where contacts are added after a specified period of inactivity (those who do not open emails and do not click on the links in the emails).

*The pages for adding and editing are identical to each other except for the page title (Add or edit**,** respectively).*

The page consists of two tabs:

- Basic data

- Inactivity

## Basic data

**![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-02-06_22-57-52.png)**

Enter the name of the group of inactive contacts in the **Name **field.

Use the **Sequences **checkbox to specify whether members of the inactive contact group continue to receive the [main series](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848451-Email-Series-) mail.

Select the [sender](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-) from which letters will be sent.

The remaining fields are optional.

You can:

-
Arrange groups of inactive contacts by combining their [categories](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400732-Categories) (they must be [created](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400832-Add-and-Edit-Categories) first). Also, the distribution by category can be adjusted at any time.

-
Set the redirect page after unsubscribing.

## Inactivity

In this tab, the conditions under which the contact will be added to the group of inactive contacts are specified.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-10-26_17-27-11.png)

The addition of any other group/s to the group of participants can be configured.

Moving by category is done by clicking on the blue folder. Selecting a group by clicking on the empty checkbox. It should have a blue tick. All groups in the category can be chosen by clicking on the checkbox category.

In the field **Сhoose**** those who****, list down** an inactivity condition, e.g., – they did not open any email or did not click even once.

The **Period **field specifies the number of days of inactivity after which the contact will be added to the group.

The** Enable this list** checkbox allows you to configure whether to track or not the activity of a contact on a group of inactive contacts.

After making the necessary changes, click the **Save **button. A group of inactive contacts will be added to the list on the [Contact groups](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists) page.

## Adding and Editing a User

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050690672-Adding-and-Editing-a-User

/[ Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Adding and Editing a User

**Content**

-
[Profile](#h_01ERD109PG4SQYDME3X61GDEBG)

- [Store ](#h_01ERD10GCVV2PVFJA42KXXCA6R)

- [Site ](#h_01ERD10QSR84W7B8T4T4PEHRCG)

-
[Newsletter](#h_01ERD10YQSF4EFEK4Z26NS81RP)

- [Contacts ](#h_01ERD117VA2724PNW7JRSNJNBN)

- [Tasks ](#h_01ERD12EMB6HV2CGZQCY7FTDWB)

-
[Courses](#h_01ERD12S5RZE0TDZ0BQR3CYMV2)

- [Reports ](#h_01ERD1349J33BPQS257EBVJEGD)

- [Affiliate program ](#h_01ERD13E1FZ7QP2MJFBRJ3D8DT)

- [Call center ](#h_01ERD13N29GDCAWB9DX2W65WS6)

- [Frequently asked questions (FAQ) ](#h_01ERD13XCF3NB63XEN4YXX53GZ)

This page allows you to configure the rights and access of a particular user.

Pages for adding and editing a user are absolutely identical. They differ only in the heading (Add / Edit).

![mceclip0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097128032/mceclip0.png)

The page has basic profile information and tabs:

-
Store

-
Site

-
Newsletter

-
Contacts

-
Tasks

-
Courses

-
Reports

-
Affiliate program

***Note******:**** Depending on the selected rights, a certain set of tabs will be available.*

## Profile

You can set the basic settings for the user through the user profile.

The slider** “At the moment user account enabled” **allows you to activate or deactivate user access rights.

You can also upload a photo of a user here by clicking on the “Change” button.

The **Role **drop-down list allows you to select a [ready-made profile](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177251-User-Role) for rights and accesses from existing ones.

***Note******:**** If the role is selected, the settings on the other tabs will not be available. Individual rights can be set only when ****no role**** is selected.*

The **Access rights **radio button allows you to set the user’s basic rights (if the role is not selected).

There are three types of rights:

-
**Call C****enter** – can change the status and comment on the call in the accounts. If you select this type, the Call Center tab will be available.

-
**Delivery** – product shipping. If you select this type, no other tabs will be available because no added settings are needed.

-
**Additional A****dministrator** – user with configurable rights. If you select this type, all added tabs will be available, except for Call Center.

Next, you need to specify the data of a specific user – first name, last name, phone number, username, email, and password etc.

A confirmation email will be sent to the indicated user’s email. The user will need to click on the link in the email to confirm access to the account.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee2.1.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee2.1.png)

If you select **no role** settings (for Call Center and Additional Administrator types), you must go to the other tabs and tick the checkboxes to configure the necessary rights.

***Note******: ****Some settings are only opened when a checkmark is ticked in the top-level checkbox.*

## Funnels

This tab allows you to add additional administrator rights to work with visual sales funnels. If this checkbox is ticked, the user will be able to see all the funnels in your account.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/03.png)

## Store

This tab allows you to configure the rights of an additional administrator to work with the store. You can restrict a user's access to specific product(s) in the store.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/122.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/122.png)

You can give access to work with all products, a certain category, or an individual product. Set up access to create and edit products, work with accounts, discounts, and co-authors.

## Site

This tab allows you to configure the rights of an added administrator to work within the site.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee3.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee3.png)

You can give access to the [creation and editing of site pages](https://help.justclick.io/archives/1886) and [templates](https://help.justclick.io/archives/1886#Device_editor), set up separate access to [interactive blocks](https://help.justclick.io/archives/5457), access to trainings, [surveys ](https://help.justclick.io/archives/1684)and [viral promotions](https://help.justclick.io/archives/1354).

## Newsletter

This tab allows you to configure the rights of an added administrator to work with the email campaign.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee3.1.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee3.1.png)

You can enable [sending emails](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848431-Broadcasts-) and/or [exporting subscribers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers-#h_01ERAX0TXKPP463W9T49S0H43A). If the checkbox "Send emails to subscribers" is ticked, the user will be able to access your email campaign and send emails to all your subscribers.

## Contacts

This tab allows you to configure the rights of an added administrator to work with Contacts.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2021-01-19_161920.jpg)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2021-01-19_161920.jpg)

You can give access to work with all contact lists, a certain category, or an individual list.

It is possible to [create and edit contact lists](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List) and subscription forms, view [contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050679832-Contacts) and manage [call orders](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550811-Calling-Tasks).

Also, you can restrict user access to the fields that are in the contact card. By default, all fields are visible and editable. However, you can give rights to only view or to change and view.

In this case, if you give permission to “all fields,” then all those fields that are currently available, as well as those that you create in the future, will be available.

## Tasks

This tab allows you to configure added administrator rights to work with [rules](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051178391-Rules) and [processes](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051179551-Processes).

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee5.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee5.png)

## Courses

This tab allows you to configure added administrator rights to work with courses.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee6.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee6.png)

You can give access to either edit lessons, folders, and courses, as well as check reports for all courses, and access to check reports of courses only.

## Reports

This tab allows you to configure the rights of an added administrator to work with analytics.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee7.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee7.png)

You can give access to sales statistics and newsletters, customization of sales funnels, and advertising companies, as well as to manage the sales department.

## Affiliate program

This tab allows you to configure the rights of an added administrator to work with the affiliate.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee8.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/employee8.png)

You can give access to partner management and adding promotional materials.

## Call center

This tab allows you to configure the rights of the call center user.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-71-2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-71-2.png)[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-72-2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-72-2.png)

-
Give access to work with the orders of all products, a certain category, or individual product

-
Configure access options

-
Indicate the percentage of user’s payment

- Set visibility settings for orders

After making all the settings, click the **Save **button. The user will be added to the list on the Users page.

**Note****:** New users must follow the link that they receive in the email. You can also remind them of this address through the Users tab:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2021-02-09_06-35-46.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2021-02-09_06-35-46.png)

## FAQ (frequently asked questions)

-**Why is it when you add a new user's email address it is not displayed in the settings?**

You have added a new user, specified the necessary data in the settings, saved them, but the user’s email address is not displayed in the “Email” field?

When adding / changing an email address, the Email will remain the same (or it will be the account holder's email if the user is being added for the first time) until the user confirms their email address.

When changing a user’s email, a confirmation email will be sent. Subject: “**confirmation of user’s email address changing**.”
A user needs to open this email and follow the link in it. After that, the email will be confirmed and be replaced with a new one in the user settings.

**-Why can't a user log on to their account?**

If a user cannot log into his/her account, the reason in most cases is that:

-
 Invalid login link. The correct login link looks like this: [https://LOGIN.influencersoft.com/shops/bills/](https://login.influencersoft.com/shops/bills/), where “LOGIN” is the login of the main administrator of the account.
The correct link (with the already specified “LOGIN”) is in the registration confirmation letter, which is sent to the user’s mail.

-
The user enters their email in the login field, not the username. It is necessary to use the username to login.

-  The user did not confirm account registration. To confirm, the user needs to click on the link in the activation email.

## Calling Tasks

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550811-Calling-Tasks

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Calling Tasks Calling tasks

**Content **[[Hide](https://help.influencersoft.com/archives/889)]

- [Free information ](#h_01ERA6EV15R2F68C4XQH8K8ZBC)

-
[Filter](#h_01ERA6F79XZWFNZR4FMK2BQ5N6)

- [Deactivate or delete a task ](#h_01ERA6FH3CY412WK1Q4Z16NRFR)

- [Adding and editing an assignment](#h_01ERA6FZAXRK0Q9PGYGEAH9MNY)

- [Information for an individual task ](#h_01ERA6GHD3WGFTA9STK6FYDW6S)

This page shows you how to work with calling tasks (given out to the call center employees).

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360074195851/blobid0.png)

The form allows you to:

-
View summary information on assignments

-
[Create new and edit existing jobs](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051165971-Adding-and-Editing-a-Call-Assignment)

-
Activate, deactivate, and delete tasks

-
View detailed information for each task

-
Select jobs by specified criteria

## Free information

At the top of the page, you can see a summary of all call orders:

-
Number of contacts under which tasks are created (**Leads)**

-
Number of new contacts (**New**)

-
Number of contacts are in the process of calling (**In**** ****process**)

-
Number of calls that received positive results (**Completed**** **successfully)

-
Number of calls that received negative results (**Unsuccessfully completed**)

## Filter

The filter allows you to configure the output of call orders in the table that meet the specified criteria.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975772/blobid1.png)

You can select tasks by date of addition, task title, category, responsible manager, and activity.

It is not necessary to fill in all the filter fields. You must enter the data in the filter and click the **Search **button. To remove the filter, click the **Clear**** **button.

## Deactivate or delete a task

To temporarily disable a call assignment, in the selected task line, move the slider of the **Status **button to the left. The color changes to dark gray and the job will be deactivated.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073975792/blobid2.png)

To activate or reactivate a task, move the slider to the right. The button turns green and the job will be returned to work.

To completely delete a task, click on the **cross**** ****sign **in the last column in the selected task line.

## Adding and editing an assignment

To add a new call, click the **Create Job** button.

To edit an existing task, click on its **name** in the table.

## Information for an individual task

The line of each job contains data similar to the data in the summary table, but related to the current task:

-
 Number of contacts under which tasks are created (**Contact**** **column)

-
 Number of new contacts (**New **column)

-
 Number of contacts are in the process of calling (**I****n**** ****process **column)

-
 Number of calls that received positive results (**Completed ****successfully **column)

-
 Number of calls that received negative results (**Unsuccessfully completed**** **column)

When you click on the number in the task line, you go to the Calling task page where the contacts for the call are filtered by status (according to the selected column).

## Configuring Invisible reCAPTCHA

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050862271-Configuring-Invisible-reCAPTCHA

/[Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Configuring Invisible reCAPTCHA

**Content**

-
[Google reCAPTCHA – protection from spam](#h_01ER9N6VNV1JXJZNEGJ34YDVR6)

-
[How to add Google reCAPTCHA to your forms](#h_01ER9N766JVC0A1SJBNWQNN83W)

## Google reCAPTCHA – protection from spam

InfluencerSoft provides a new option to install invisible Google reCAPTCHA for your subscription and order forms.

Google reCAPTCHA protects the forms on your website against spam and robots. reCAPTCHA verifies a user by the behavior on the website. If the algorithm finds the behavior patterns suspicious, then a window with an image to select will appear for verifying if a subscriber is a robot.

To start using Google reCAPTCHA, you should obtain two special keys and then insert them in InfluencerSoft account settings.

You can obtain these keys with a Google account. Follow this [link](https://www.google.com/recaptcha/admin/) and log into your account. If you have no Google account yet, register in Gmail.

## How to add Google reCAPTCHA to your forms

Let’s follow the steps on how to install and enable Google reCAPTCHA for your forms.

-
Go to [https://www.google.com/reCAPTCHA/admin/](https://www.google.com/recaptcha/admin/) and log in.

-
If you are new to creating reCAPTCHA, then you will see a window to create it. Fill in the fields and check the type of reCAPTCHA (see information about filling in the fields below).

-
In the “Label” field, enter a name for your reCAPTCHA, which can be found in your personal account. You can type any name you like. ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073374911)

-
Choose reCAPTCHA type. For invisible reCAPTCHA, check “reCAPTCHA v2”, then check “Invisible reCAPTCHA badge” in a drop-down menu.![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/2.png)

-
Fill in the field “Domains” field. Type in one or several domains, depending on the number of sites you want to use reCAPTCHA for.
![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/3.png)

In any case, mark a default domain of InfluencerSoft: influencersoft.com. If your own domain is delegated to InfluencerSoft (for example, mysite.com), then mark it too.

You have to register all domains that you use for forms and payment pages. If you lose some domain, the order creation may not work correctly.

-
Accept the reCAPTCHA Terms of Service and click the “Send” button.

-
You will be redirected to the page with the keys. You should copy these keys.![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/5.png)

Site key (required for displaying reCAPTCHA widget on the page with the forms);
Secret key (required for communication with Google services and verifying the user’s response to reCAPTCHA).

**“Go to settings” button** (opens the settings of the reCAPTCHA you created);
“Go to analytics” button (redirects you to the statistics page with all actions for the selected reCAPTCHA).

-
Copy the keys and insert them into the settings of your InfluencerSoft account, in Contacts — Settings — “reCAPTCHA” tab.

Copy the key from the first field on the reCAPTCHA settings page in Google and paste in the "ReCAPTCHA site key” field in InfluencerSoft settings, while the key from the second field should be copied and pasted in “ReCAPTCHA secret key” field.
![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/34585891358740)

-
Enable the bar (it should be green) to add reCAPTCHA to your account.

Please note that reCAPTCHA is disabled if “ReCAPTCHA site key” and “ReCAPTCHA secret key” fields are empty.

- Click the “Save” button.

When a reCAPTCHA is enabled in your account settings, an invisible reCAPTCHA will be added to all your forms. It will be applied to all forms created in your InfluencerSoft account.
It will work for both the forms installed directly on InfluencerSoft pages and the forms added as codes on the third party pages.

This is an easy and quick way to configure and to enable reCAPTCHA for the protection of your forms against spam and robots.

## Contact History

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050397772-Contact-History

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Contact History

Contact history is a new functionality that allows you to see in the [Lead Card](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050399232-Lead-Card) (contact card) what actions and when were performed with it. At the moment, such actions with contact are displayed as:

-
Creating a contact

-
Change additional contact fields

- adding/removing a group;

- adding/removing a tag;

- setting/changing/deleting a name;

- setting/changing/deleting the surname;

- installation/change/removal of middle name;

- setting/changing/deleting the shipping index;

- setting/changing/deleting the delivery country;

- installation/change/removal of the delivery region;

- setting/changing/deleting a city;

- installation/change/removal of a street (indicated on the card as “delivery address 1”);

-
installation/change/removal of the house, apartment number (indicated on the card as “delivery address 2”);

- setting/changing UTC (client’s current time);

- installation/change/removal of a personal manager;

- setting/changing/deleting additional contact fields.

Also, in the contact history, the changes made by the [Zapier service](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050406312-Integration-with-Zapier-com-) will be displayed through the “Add/Update Lead” action (if you have integration configured). In this case, the note (next to the date and time) will indicate “Zapier – Add/Update Lead”.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/2020-02-24_19-59-32.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/2020-02-24_19-59-32.png)
