## Contact Lists

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Contact Lists

**Content**

-
[Filter](#h_01ER9NW3EPPEW2T15YD14HZT0M)

-
[Adding and editing a List](#h_01ER9NX1HAZJJXZK9QP30Z0QRN)

-
[Adding and editing categories](#h_01ER9NWFBF8PKABKVT8NDQG8S6)

-
[Activation and deactivation of auto-series letters](#h_01ER9NXK556NE1WPTV7FNA4HXY)

-
[My Favorites](#h_01ER9NXYHJ1HHQ71GKXYMRCN83)

-
[Testing](#h_01ER9NY92YVXDS1PBHJH8THBTC)

-
[List reports](#h_01ER9NYJDKQW87XDWXTJN4DB56)

-
[Delete](#h_01ER9NYVEHVW78MRJE5XNP3C1Y)

-
[Import](#h_01ER9P03375V053Q9990XNGTAZ)

The contact lists allow you to segment available contacts.

To switch to working with lists, you need to select **Contacts **from the menu on the left and then **Lists** from the opened submenu. By default, several lists are automatically created:

-
All contacts

-
All partners

-
My contacts

-
All customers

All the lists you have created yourself are also displayed on the page.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-06-05_11-18-32-2.png)

The form allows you to:

-
Add and edit lists ([normal](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List), [automatic](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400392-Add-and-Edit-Contact-Auto-Lists), and [for inactive contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050861631-Adding-and-Editing-a-Group-of-Inactive-Contacts))

-
Add and edit [categories](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400732-Categories)

-
Configure the output of lists by certain criteria using filters

-
Add lists to favorites

-
Enable and disable [auto-series of letters](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848451-Email-Series-)

-
Test email series

-
View list reports

-
Delete lists

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-06-05_11-18-32-3-1.png)

## Filter

The filter allows you to select lists by specified criteria.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-25_21-16-45-2.png)

You can select lists by:

-
A certain category

Name – if you enter the whole title, one list will be selected. If you enter a fragment, all lists where the fragment is part of the name will be selected

-
Type

-
Client – those who made a purchase

-
Information – those who are subscribed to the newsletter

It is not necessary to fill in all the fields of the filter. You must specify the filter values and click the **Search **button. The lists corresponding to the filtering conditions will be displayed in the table. To display a complete table, click the **Filter **button, and then click **Clear**.

## Adding and editing a list

To [add an ordinary list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List), use the **Add **button.

To [add an auto list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400392-Add-and-Edit-Contact-Auto-Lists) (the list to which contacts are added automatically when the specified conditions are met), use the **Auto**** L****ist** button.

For inactive contacts, you can use the Inactive button to configure a [specific auto list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050861631-Adding-and-Editing-a-Group-of-Inactive-Contacts) to which the contacts will be added after a specified period of inactivity (do not open the emails or do not click on the links in the emails).

To edit an existing list, choose from the **Name **column.

## Adding and editing categories

[Categories](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400732-Categories) allow you to combine several thematic lists into one array. This can be convenient if you have several areas of work that are radically different from each other, e.g., projects for the early development of children and weight loss. If you have categories, you can select all lists of contacts for the same subject with a single click.

To go to the form for [adding and editing categories](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400832-Add-and-Edit-Categories), click the **Categories **button.

## Activation and deactivation of auto-series letters

You can, if necessary, disable sending an [automatic series](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848451-Email-Series-) of messages configured for a list of contacts. To do this, drag the green button slider in the **Auto-series** column to the left. The button will change its color to black, and the distribution of the auto-series will be stopped.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-06-05_15-35-25.png)

To enable the auto-series, you must move the slider to the right. The newsletter will be resumed.

## My Favorites

Clicking on an asterisk in the first column of the table allows you to mark the list as a favorite. The asterisk will change its color from gray to yellow.

Such lists are displayed at the top of the table.

## Testing

The Test button allows you to send auto-series emails to the test address specified in the [mailing settings](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-). This will allow you to evaluate the appearance of emails in the mail client.

## List reports

Here you can see the report on the sources of the funnel and the report on the cohorts of the funnel of the selected list.

## Delete

To delete a list of contacts, click the X in the last column of the table.

## Import

To import contacts from a file into a list, click the corresponding import icon.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-06-09_10-13-31.png)

Select a file in the specified format from your computer and import the contacts into the list.

For more information on importing contacts from files, see this [Knowledge Base article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401032-How-to-Import-Leads-From-a-CSV-File).

## Contacts

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050679832-Contacts

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Contacts

**Content**

-
[View ](#h_01ER9XXPHC8HXWNMRQW875NHRE)

- [Filter](#h_01ER9XYJHTW1T2FSQVY7AM9CAY)

- [Summary information on contacts](#h_01ER9XYWRMXYKD13D9TKFKZ02W)

- [Detailed information for each contact](#h_01ER9XZBNVE4E6750KJ5R9P5SE)

- [Import contacts ](#h_01ER9XZP4A1739J4FG0DZD6KPC)

- [Add a contact](#h_01ER9Y0CDB2M3HDABRKDVQESZY)

- [Editing contacts](#h_01ER9Y0SNJH2EZ8SDTBDP1TAC0)

- [Add to group](#h_01ER9Y16TG2MZXN1HWRATXC339)

- [Deleting contacts from a group ](#h_01ER9Y1HRVRAN0A6SRT4RYFV5W)

- [Export contacts ](#h_01ER9Y247M91HP8MQG3V9V2D5R)

The concept of Contacts is broader than [subscribers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers-). Subscribers are those contacts who have agreed to receive your newsletters. You can only contact these subscribers, not the other contacts, using InfluencerSoft.

However, you can also have contacts, e.g., received during offline events. You can add such contacts to your database, and then call them or send an email.

You can access the contact page from the **Contacts **menu, then the **Leads** submenu.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/878-01.png)

The form allows you to:

-
View summary information for contacts

-
View detailed information for each contact

-
Import contacts

-
Add new contacts

-
Edit contacts

-
Add and delete contacts to groups

-
Send letters

-
Export contacts

-
Customize the table

## View

The **View **button allows you to adjust the visibility of the columns of the table. When you click on it, the pop-up window **Visible fields **opens.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_11-42-36.png)

By ticking or ticking the checkboxes, you can add and remove certain columns from the screen.

## Filter

The filter allows you to customize the output of table rows (individual contacts) according to the specified conditions. When you open the filter, it looks like this.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_11-46-16.png)

You can customize the output of contacts from a specific group. Moving by category is done by clicking on the blue folder. Select a group by clicking on the empty checkbox. It should have a blue tick. All groups in the category can be chosen by clicking on the checkbox category.

Clicking on the** Add Condition** button allows you to expand additional filter fields.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_11-49-25.png)

You can configure filtering by the following fields:

-
Email and phone number

-
Total amount paid

-
Last name

-
First name

-
Middle name

-
Email exists

-
Customer information

-
Status

-
Date of first registration

-
Tags

-
Date of subscription to a list

-
Personal manager

-
Timezone (UTC)

-
Points

-
Billing address 1

-
Billing address 2

-
Billing city

-
Billing state

-
Billing zip

-
Billing country

-
Shipping address 1

-
Shipping address 2

-
Shipping city

-
Shipping state

-
Shipping zip

-
Shipping country

-
Your gender

For each field, you can specify different match types for the value:

-
Corresponds

-
Does not match

-
More than

-
Less than

-
More than or equal to

-
Less than or equal to

-
Contains

The **+** button allows you to specify multiple values for one condition.

**Add Condition** button – add the required number of conditions.

## Summary information on contacts

At the top of the page, in the **Total **block, the total number of contacts for the account is displayed.

## Detailed information for each contact

When you click on a name or email contact, you will go to the Contact card (Shop-> Account section) containing the complete contact information.

Click the [group](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists) to which the contact belongs to open the [Subscribers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers-) form, with the selection of all subscribers of this group.

The blue number next to the name of the group shows how many more groups this contact contains. When you click on it, a full list of groups is displayed.

## Import contacts

The **Import **button opens a [form](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050680012-Import-Contacts) where you can apply for the transfer of subscribers from another service, or add it manually, e.g., when transferring from one mailing list to another.

## Add a contact

The **Create Contact** button allows you to [fill in the data for a new contact](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050677012-Add-Contact-).

***Note!**** You cannot send e**mails to manually added contacts. However, you can send SMS and make calls.*

## Editing contacts

To edit contacts, you must use the filter to find a specific contact/s. You can also select contacts by ticking the checkboxes of the first column.

After that, you can change one of the following fields:

-
Surname

-
Name

-
Middle name

-
Phone

-
City

-
Description

To do this, click on the button with the gear and select **Edit **in the menu that opens.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-21-2.png)

In the window that opens, select which field to edit and set a new value.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-22-2.png)

## Add to group

To add contacts to a [list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists), you must use the filter to find a specific contact/s. You can also select contacts by ticking the checkboxes of the first column.

Click the button with the gear and select **Add to group **in the menu that opens.

In the window that opens, specify which group the contacts will be added to.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-23-2.png)

Click the **Add to Contacts** button.

## Deleting contacts from a group

To delete contacts from a group, you must select contacts by ticking the checkboxes of the first column. For convenience, you can first find a specific contact/s using the filter.

It is necessary to click the button with the gear and in the opened menu, select **Delete from lists.**

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-24-2.png)

In the window that opens, use the checkboxes to specify which group to delete contacts from. All groups in the category can be chosen by clicking on the checkbox category.

**If you receive**** a request from the subscriber for the complete removal of personal data from the store (GDPR) or want to completely delete your data, then send us a request to the support service. At the moment, it is impossible to completely delete contacts from the store, but we can delete ****one**** contact if you received such a request so as not to violate the GDPR law.**

## Export contacts

To export contacts to a computer, you must use the filter to find the desired contact/s. You can also select contacts by ticking the checkboxes of the first column.

It is necessary to click on the button with the gear and choose the export format from the menu that opens:

-
CSV

-
Excel

-
Plain text

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-25-2.png)

When you click on the selected format, the contacts will be exported to the computer (to the default download folder).

## Creating and Managing Users

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177251-Creating-and-Managing-Users

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Creating and Managing Users

**Content**

-
[Filter](#h_01ERD3KSR769TMRX6MGPMFS78F)

- [Users](#h_01ERD3M1JDE08MNC2EF6S965TY)

-
[Adding and editing a profile](#h_01ERD3M9PEV4KGXA2TFW58JPMZ)

- [Delete profile ](#h_01ERD3MHA790729CAGMTCG6PB2)

- [View user activity](#h_01ERD3MQ1EG2FS1A4A1RZ2D3F0)

This page allows you to work with user role – typical rights and access settings.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-06-15_15-38-18.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2020-06-15_15-38-18.png)

You can:

-
Create, edit, and delete profiles

-
Select profiles by specified parameters

-
View user activity

-
Go to work with the rights settings for an individual user

## Filter

The filter allows you to customize the output to the table of profiles that meet the specified criteria. You can search for profiles either by username, status or access rights.

![mceclip0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360079864752/mceclip0.png)

If the username is entered in its entirety, one line will be displayed; if a title fragment is entered, all the profiles that contain this fragment will be displayed.

It is not necessary to fill in all the fields of the filter. You must enter the data in the filter and click the **Search **button. To remove the filter, click the **Clear**** **button.

## Users

The **Users **button will take the user to the same page where you can see the data on the rights of each individual user. Here you can add a new user, view, modify or delete and existing user.

## Adding and editing a user

To add a new user, click the **Add user** button.

To edit an existing user profile, click on its **name** in the table.

## Deleting user profile

To delete a user profile, click on the cross in the last column of the selected profile row.

## View user activity

**The Click History** button allows you to go to the page where the activity of the selected users is displayed (at what time and which pages were opened). You can filter this date intervals or the username of the specific user.

## CRM Settings

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177871-CRM-Settings

/[ Contacts ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts)/ CRM Settings

**Content **

- [Additional lead fields ](#h_01ERBQT4QG1SRMQH9Z2648120J)

- [reCAPTCHA ](#h_01ERBQTAG8SSH1DP1WCBWFYNQM)

- [Instructions for call assignments](#h_01ERBQTG9834HHGSCDSJ3T8K6P)

- [Messages for call orders](#h_01ERBQTNG0QK4KDFK6V5KJSHC4)

- [Instructions for call orders](#h_01ERBQTVXQ4JWCKYQERQQG3P7F)

To go to the CRM settings, select the **Contacts **item in the main menu and then **Settings **in the submenu.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1576065815500.png)

The form contains tabs:

-
Additional lead fields

-
reCaptcha

-
Instructions for call assignments

-
Messages for call orders

-
Instructions for call orders

***Note******:**** ** Except for the Additional l**ead fields tab, adding instructions **and** editing emails is available**,** if at least one *[*employee*](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050690672-Adding-and-Editing-a-User)* is** added to the system.*

## Additional lead fields

If necessary, you can specify additional fields that will be filled when [adding a new contact](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050677012-Add-Contact-).

To add, click the **Add Field** button and fill out the form in the pop-up window.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_18-27-09.png)

This information should be indicated in the form:

-
Field name

-
Type, which can take the following values:

Integer

-
Fractional number

-
Date

-
Date and time

-
String (up to 255 characters)

-
Text (of any length)

-
Logical type (yes or no)

-
Drop-down list

-
Switches

- The default value (you do not need to fill it in).

If the selected type is a* drop-down list*, the form will change to:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_18-29-56.png)

An additional field **Value 1** appears where you want to enter a possible value from the drop-down list. The **Add Value **button will add the next input field.

After filling all fields, click the **Save **button. The field will be added.

## reCAPTCHA

This tab allows you to configure Google reCaptcha. We described the configuration details in this [article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050862271-Configuring-Invisible-reCAPTCHA).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_19-24-47.png)

## Instructions for call assignments

This tab allows you to add instructions for [calling jobs](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550811-Calling-Tasks)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550811-Calling-Tasks)for [employees](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051351592-Users)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051351592-Users)of the call center.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_18-32-30.png)

To create an instruction, the default InfluencerSoft text editor is used. The **Save **button is used to save the changes.

## Messages for call orders

On this tab, you can set up default letters that are sent by call center employees to customers after a call.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot_2019-10-26_11.png)

You need to use the radio button to select a letter template. The options include:

-
The conversation went through

-
Did not get through

-
Call back

-
Already paid

-
Invalid lead

There is a default letter for each option. However, with the default text editor InfluencerSoft, you can make changes and additions to the text.

The** Reset Default Mail** button returns the original version of the message.

## Instructions for call orders

This tab allows you to add instructions for calling [accounts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851031-Orders-)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851031-Orders-)for employees of the call center.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot_2019-10-26_22.png)

To create an instruction, the default InfluencerSoft text editor is used. The **Save **button is used to save the changes.

## Description

Form Constructor is a simple tool that saves the precious time and creates a modern form in two clicks. The code of the form could be easily copied and inserted into third party websites.

To enter the Subscription Form Constructor, go to “Contacts” – “Forms”. To create an order form, go to “Store” – “Order forms”.
The opened window will show the ready-to-use forms developed by our designers.
To select an empty form, choose the one that fits your needs, and click “Create”.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr1.png)

## Key elements

Here is a screenshot to illustrate the functions of the buttons.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_1.png)

## Exit from the Form Constructor

When you click the Exit icon, a confirmation box will appear. When you exit the constructor, the changes you made in the form will not be saved.

## Create a template

The system does not save the forms, therefore, saving can be done by creating your own template. If you have already created a subscription form and want to use it later (and not to lose it), then click the star icon. Type in the name of the form in the appeared model window and save the template.

### How to find your template

Next time you enter Form Constructor, a new tab “My subscribe forms” will appear. This tab will show the forms you have chosen as a template.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr3.png)

If you point a mouse at your template, three buttons “Create”, “Edit”, and “Delete” will appear.

-
Create — a new form that is created in your template. In other words, the form will be similar to this template, and you can edit it with no impact on the parent template.

-
Edit — in comparison with the “Create” button, this edits a template but does not create a new form.

-
Delete — your created template will be deleted. Be careful, the deleted template cannot be restored.

## Publish

When you click this button, you will see a window with the code of a newly created form.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/001.png)

### JavaScript code

Copy this code and insert it into the required page. Please note that if you save a form as a template, in case of editing, the form published on the website will be edited together with the template.

### HTML code

In comparison with JavaScript code, if published on a website, a form on the website will not be edited together with the template.

## +Add element

This is the key button to work with the Form Constructor. You can open the menu with the available elements of the form by clicking this button.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr5.png)

Let’s look at each component by creating a real form.

Now let’s describe all components one by one.

### Form

This component is enough for creating the simplest form because it contains the functions you need for the work. It is included in every template.

#### Settings

This is how the “Settings” tab looks like:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_2.png)

#### Add to groups

A contact will belong to a group (list) or category which you choose. Please note that when checking a category, a contact will appear in all groups (lists) within this category.

#### Sign up for newsletters

It is crucial to understand how this tool works because if you fail to use it properly, some subscribers could leave you.

-
If the box is checked, the form will add this contact into “Contacts” and send an activation letter. Once the contact follows the link in this letter, he or she becomes an activated (subscriber) and can receive the letters from you.

-
If the box is not checked, the contacts are not activated. The form collects the contacts (responses) and the activation letters are not sent. This can be done if the subscription is optional.

#### Actions

-
Show message — when you fill in the form, a modal window will appear.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr7.png)

- Open link — clicking an action button (“Subscribe”, “Participate” or any other word) will direct a visitor to the specified page. If no action button is given, then a visitor will go to your default page with a request to go to a personal mailbox and follow the link in an activation letter to start receiving the letters.

- Order product — clicking an action button (“Order”, “Buy” or any other word) will place an order for a product, and the users will go to the page with payment methods. If the form settings presuppose a user to check several products, then a user can decide which product should be used to place an order when filling out the form.

#### Delete from groups

Contact will be deleted from those groups (lists) and/or categories you choose. This option is helpful when a subscriber can subscribe to group A and unsubscribe from group B.  For example, subscription to a group “Losing weight. Girls from 50 to 60 kilos unsubscribe from a group “Losing weight. Girls from 60 to 70 kilos”.

#### Advertising tags

They work the same as in “Reports” — “Channels” — “Add ad tag”. The difference is that these parameters will not be displayed in the link to the page, but instead, they will be inserted in the form code. You can track the efficiency of your advertising campaigns by these codes in “Reports” — “Channels”.

#### Design

This tab sets the graphics of the form, colors of the elements, background, etc.

#### Quick settings

The form view can be horizontal, vertical, or it can be displayed in a modal window.

- A vertical form will look like this on a page:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_3.png)

- A horizontal form will look like this on a page:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_4.png)

#### In modal box

If you check “In modal box”, you should click a button to call a form. Two additional tabs for form settings will appear:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr10.png)

**Window opening button style **

-
Form button – a button that opens a form. You can select a type of a button which will open a subscribing form

-
Filling – the color of the button

-
Width – stated in percentage which is calculated from the basic size of the form

-
Border – to illustrate, the screenshot shows a “dotted” type of border and a big size of the border. You can select any border type you like and customize the size.

Border works for all form elements in the same manner. In other words, you outline the element you are setting.

-
Curve – the screenshot shows the forms with rounded edges, the maximum rounding is chosen for illustrative purposes, but you can adjust this parameter by moving a slider.

Curve works for all form elements in the same manner.
![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr11.png)

**Action when hovering over the ****call****-to-action**** button**

This enables you to select the color of the button and will change when pointed.

#### Field label

When you check the “field label”, each field will have its name. We will give the details of how to set the field labels below.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_5.png)

#### Form designer

It enables, disables, and sets the fields for the form.

Enable a field by moving the slider to the right (green), and it will be shown in the form. If you move the slider to the left (grey), you will disable the field and it will not be displayed in the form.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_7_11.png)

Each field has its description. The description is the text which is shown at the background of the field (see the screenshot).

If you check “required”, a visitor can send these forms (click the button) provided he or she fills in all the required fields.

A field can be hidden. If you check “hidden”, the field will not be deleted, but rather will be unseen by the users. The only exception is when you hide a “Name” field, “Dear friend” will appear by default. The contacts of each person who fills in the form with the hidden “Name” field will get into your “Contacts” with a name “Dear friend”.

### Design settings

This menu can be used to personalize the interface of all form elements (button, form, fields, and field labels).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr14.png)

#### Button

-
Samples — 10 preset colors, the color of the button changes upon clicking the colors.

-
Own color — it helps to customize the color from the palette. To open the palette, click the color.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_8.png)

If you select “Own color”, you can adjust the gradient. Check “gradient”, select the appropriate gradient type, and set the starting and the ending color.

#### Border

The border will be applied to the button. You can select the style, size, and color of the border.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_9.png)

#### Text and font

You can select the color, size, font, and width of the text on the button.
In this case, the text size is 20, the font is Open Sans, the width is Bold.

Text settings are similar for all form elements; therefore, we will no longer focus on that.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_10.png)

#### Inside and outside indents

Inside indents are used to set the spaces from the element borders to its content. Refer to the screenshot below.

-
Inside –left indents (red arrow) are 150 pixels, that is why the text of the button is moved by 150 pixels from the left border of the element.

-
Inside –top indents (green arrow) are 150 pixels, that is why the text of the button is moved by 150 pixels from the upper border of the element.

The same principle is true for the outside indents, but we need them to adjust the spaces between the elements. For example, if the outside bottom indents are 150 for the fields of the form, then the distance between the button and the fields of the form will be 150 pixels.

Inside and outside indents are applied to all elements in the same manner; therefore, we will no longer focus on them.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_11.png)

#### Form

Now we will move straight to the field settings, as all settings which deal with the changes in the form design have already been illustrated by changes in the button.

#### Fields

The field settings include a text alignment setting responsible for text positioning inside a field. The screenshot shows that the text is centered because “center” has been chosen. The text can also be aligned to the right or left sides of the fields.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_13.png)

#### Signatures

This tab will not be displayed unless you check the “field label” we spoke about above.
Text alignment affects the field label position. Just like with fields, the text can be aligned to the center, left, and right sides.

#### Action when hovering over the submit button

This helps to customize the color, which will be displayed when pointing at the button. For example, the “Send” button is originally red, while when pointed it turns green.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_14.png)

#### HTML/CSS

Here we register class, the rule for it is added to the head or another place on the page, for example, before the form code. In our example, we have shadow class, the rule for it has already been inserted in the head, now the button has a red shadow.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr21.png)

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_15-269x300.png)

We are done with the settings of the basic and the most challenging element, now it is time to find out the purpose of the other elements.

### Text

Click “+Add element”, press “Text” by the left mouse button, hold down the button, and drag the element to the required area in the form (the text is typically added at the top and at the bottom).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_15_11.png)

When you have dragged the text, “Your text” will appear. Click it for editing. A default editing panel will open (highlighted by the red frame).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_16.png)

For your convenience, you can set different indent values for regular and mobile devices in the Text widget.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/2020-06-29_11-45-39-2.png)

### List

Click “+Add element”, press “List” by the left mouse button, hold down the button and drag the element to the required area in the form.

The screenshot shows that the list is added at the top.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_17.png)

#### List editing

List widget enables you to change the color of the text, picture, margins, and background.

#### Lines

To add or delete a line of a text, go to widget editor and follow the steps in the list constructor:

-
Click “+” to add a new line.

-
Click “- “to delete the line which has been previously highlighted for deletion.

#### Image

The image shown on top of the list can be edited if required. If you click the image path, you will be prompted to upload an image from a computer. If you click “Choose from library”, you will be offered a collection of the appropriate images.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_18.png)

### Social buttons

Click “+Add element”, press “Social buttons” by the left mouse button, hold it down, and drag the element to the required area in the form.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_19.png)

#### Social buttons settings

The settings of this widget enable you to change the icon types, alignment, margins, as well as to delete or to add the social networks

#### Design

**Icon types**

You can select from two types of icons: social-icon-pack-1 — rounded (see the screenshot below),
social-icon-pack-2 — square.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_20.png)

#### Settings

The widget displays the social buttons which are checked in its settings. To place a link to your social network, place the mouse cursor over the name of the social network to see “cogwheel”, which will open the menu to add the link to a social network.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_%D1%81onstr29.png)

### Indent

Click “+Add element”, press “Indent” by the left mouse button, hold it down, and drag the element in the required area in the form.

Unlike other widgets, this one has no Edit button. It can only be vertically adjusted. To change the indent, press the black dot (highlighted by the arrow below), hold it down and pull up or down. This can be helpful when you have no time to match the pixel size for the margins, that is why it could be easier to add the “Indent” widget and to adjust it visually for a couple of seconds.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_21.png)

### Image

Click “+Add element”, press “Image” by the left mouse button, hold it down and drag to the required area in the form.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_22.png)

## General settings of the form

The form has the settings for the widgets and the general settings, which can be applied to the whole form rather than for a particular element.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_23.png)

You need no more than 5 to 7 minutes to create the simplest form with all widgets because there is nothing technically complicated about it., The interface is user-friendly and intuitive.

The screenshot below gives the form as an example, the process took less than 10 minutes, and mind that the form was completely customized.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/form_24.png)

If you have already set the payment methods, then a buyer will have the access to the payment options upon form completion.

## Frequently asked questions (FAQ)

[How to track the subscription conversion, payments in metrics, and analytics?](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050394552-Form-Constructor-Subscriptions-and-Orders-)

Create separate pages where a subscriber or a client is redirected to upon subscription (payment) and install the metrics codes, pixels on this page, add the page links for analytical purposes. These links should be inserted in the Form Constructor in the appropriate fields.

## How to Add a New Lead (Contact)

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050677012-How-to-Add-a-New-Lead-Contact

/[ Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / How to Add a New Lead (Contact)

The Add lead page allows you to fill in the data for a new contact.

![mceclip0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360079631172/mceclip0.png)

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-27-2.png)

***Note!**** You cannot *[send emails](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns)* to manually added contacts.*

It is necessary to enter the data into its corresponding lines (all fields are optional), then click the **Save **button.

## How to enable integration with Zoom for organizing meetings

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/4408979658004-How-to-enable-integration-with-Zoom-for-organizing-meetings

Content

-
[1 Zoom Integration](#h_01FJMPXE1MM1PSM9133QVANQS2)

[1.1 How to remove integration with Zoom](#h_01FJMPY4F5PQEQEFTT57NB3PZ0)

-
[2 How to create an appointment](#h_01FJMPYVC9S9T2R58H7Y3W5CCR)

[2.1 How to add registration to a meeting in the funnel](#h_01FJMPZD8CZVJ6MM3MGTVMF5RX)

- [2.2 An example of an appointment through a calendar in a funnel](#h_01FJMQ02SCBCDBMYYQ7XA1MJHM)

- [2.3 How to edit a meeting request](#h_01FJMQ0SN7SB4N5374BP25AFYT)

- [3 Still have questions? Write to support](#h_01FJMQ1EKHZB20N7WHCM62N66J)

 |

## Zoom Integration

Go to the Profile (admin / employee) section >> Available meeting place >> click the “Connect Zoom” button

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z1.png)

Log in to Zoom or go through a free registration if there is no account in the service [https://zoom.us/](https://zoom.us/)

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z2.png)

After authorization, we accept the agreement by clicking on the button at the bottom of the page.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z3.png)

Now in the section Profile >> Time and place available for meetings, there is a logo of the Zoom service with the inscription “Connected”

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z4.png)

### How to remove integration with Zoom

#### Removal in InfluencerSoft

Attention. You can set up integration with Zoom from several InfluencerSoft accounts, when you delete the integration on the InfluencerSoft side, the integration is deleted only with the profile in which the deletion took place. Integration will be active with the rest of the accounts.

To remove the integration with the Zoom service, go to Profile (admin / employee) >> Available time and place for meetings, click on the cross to the right of the Zoom logo.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z20.png)

#### Removal in Zoom

To completely remove the integration between Zoom and all linked accounts in InfluencerSoft, you must:

- Login to your [Zoom.us](https://zoom.us/) account

- Click “Advanced” – “App Marketplace”

- Click “Manage” – “«Installed Apps”

- Search for the “InfluencerSoft” app and click “Uninstall”
[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/02-is.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/02-is.png)

## How to create an appointment

In order for users to make an appointment, you need to create one. Go to the Contacts section >> Meetings >> Create a meeting.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z5.png)

In the general settings, specify the name of the meeting and select the person in charge.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z6.png)

On the “Schedule and meeting place” tab, specify the time parameters and meeting place (by default, the meeting place is taken from the settings of the person in charge).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z7.png)

On the “Results” tab, you can add or remove a meeting result, change the color and text.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z8.png)

On the “Notifications” tab, select the sender’s name and, if necessary, edit the notification letters to the contact, after which we save the settings.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z9.png)

### How to add registration to a meeting in the funnel

To create a meeting, go to the “Funnels” section and create a funnel or edit the current one.

Adding an appointment “Add appointment entry” is available for the following blocks on the “Action” tab:

- Opt in

- Double opt in

- Single opt in form

- Double opt in form

- Payment page

- Payment form

Let’s take a subscription page as an example. In the editor of the subscription page block on the “Actions” tab, click “Add an appointment” and select the desired meeting from the list.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z10.png)

### An example of an appointment through a calendar in a funnel

When an appointment is added to the funnel, the user will be presented with a calendar when they sign in, where they can select a date and time and then schedule an appointment.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z11.png)

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z12.png)

After sending the form to the user, a window with the data for entering the conference in the Zoom service will open.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z13.png)

By clicking on the link, the user can download the conference file and launch Zoom.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z14.png)

### How to edit a meeting request

After the user leaves a request for a meeting, a tab with meeting data will appear in the admin / employee account in the “Tasks” section.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z15.png)

By clicking on the name, task number or email of the user, a contact card will open, where there will be a link to enter a meeting with the user in the Zoom service.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z16.png)

To delete or edit an appointment, click on the appointment status on the right.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z17.png)

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z18.png)

The meeting data will also be displayed in the Zoom service account in the Conferences >> Upcoming section, where you can delete or edit the meeting.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/z19.png)

## How to Import Contacts From a CSV File

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401032-How-to-Import-Contacts-From-a-CSV-File

/[Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / How to Import Contacts From a CSV File

This function can quickly import a list of leads to any usual group/list. You just need to store the required list of addresses in a CSV format and import the file.

## When can it be useful?

**Case 1: **You need to add customers of one or more products to a separate group/list. If you need to add contacts/subscribers from one group to another within one InfluencerSoft account, then use the “gear” in the “Subscribers” section or through the “Leads” section. Filter the necessary data and add them to another or new group.

-
Use a filter in Store – Orders to select the required orders.

-
Export the filtered data to a CSV format.

-
Go to Import and upload the exported data file to its respective group/list. ![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-54-33.png)

PS: The filter stores information for 5 minutes. If you did not import (add to the group) in five minutes, please filter the necessary contacts again and repeat the procedure, otherwise all contacts in your database will be added to the group.

**Case 2: **You can export filtered data or contacts / subscribers by group via export by clicking on the gear. Then load this data via import in text or via CSV file.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-55-44.png)

To export (upload) data, click on the gear and select the appropriate format

      4. Go to Import and upload the data file to the respective group/list.

      5. Create [call assignment](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051165971-Adding-and-Editing-a-Call-Assignment)s for the employees under the leads group/list.

Please note that this method is applicable for adding subscribers from a database to another. If your InfluencerSoft database does not have any subscribers, then the imported contacts will be given a “Waiting for activation” status and will not receive the emails from you. The contact should subscribe to any of your mailing list first.

**Case 3: **There is a list of existing leads from another provider (e.g Mailchimp) that you would like to import into your InfluencerSoft account.

      6. Go to Import and upload the CSV file to the respective group/list.

### In what status will the contact be added to the new group?

If this is a contact that you already have in the database, it will be added in the same status as at the time of import.

If this is a new contact that you do not have in your database, it will be added in the “Awaiting activation” status. If you import contacts with sending an activation email, then those who activate the subscription will receive an active “Subscribed” status, after which they will be able to receive your mailings.

If this is a new contact and during import you select “Skip sending activation email when importing. It will be possible to send emails to them only through a third-party SMTP server”, then the contact will receive the status “Can only be sent through an external SMTP server” (blue checkmark).

## How to upload a subscriber list through Import from CSV

-
Go to an advanced import of the subscriber list in the **Contacts** – **Leads** section. Select **Import** – **CSV ****Import****.**

**![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-22-35-e1609172445799.png)**

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-24-28.png)

-
On the “Where to import” field, select a group from the dropdown list.

-
Upload a CSV file format in UTF-8.

-
Select a field delimiter (“;” or “,” or “\ t”)

-
Choose whether to send or not a subscription activation message after the import.

-
Click “Next”.![mceclip0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/4401972464276)

### Should I send an activation email or not?

**Do not send an activation email when importing new contacts. Sending emails is possible only from a third-party email server **– if you set this checkbox, then you will NOT be able to send emails to new imported contacts through our servers. You can send an email to uploaded contacts only if you have configured and selected an [external server](https://help.justclick.io/archives/428#Email_server) for sending emails (this server is indicated for an example).

**Send an activation message to new subscribers to confirm the permission to receive email newsletters **– if you check this box, then a subscription activation email will be sent to all imported contacts. You will be able to send them emails only after they click on the link in this email.

**VERY IMPORTANT NOTE!!!**

In order to protect against spammers, this import method cannot be abused, it has limitations:

- **we recommend importing in batches of not more than 500 contacts at the same time;**

- **the ideal percentage of activation emails should be close to 100%;**

- if the **percentage of activation is low**, **DO NOT IMPORT ANOTHER BATCH  ** otherwise the ability to import with activation will be suspended and **your account will be PERMANENT DISABLED**.

Set the field in the tool to match the CSV file fields. It can be interchanged depending on the order of importance or one’s preference. If any columns of your file do not need to be imported, select “Do not import” from the dropdown list.

The “Do not import the first row” option excludes the first row from the imported file, e.g., the column names below. This function is activated by default. To disable it, uncheck the box.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-35-46.png)

- When the fields matches are set, click “Import contacts”.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-49-20.png)

- After the import is complete, the number of contacts that have been imported will be shown. In the example 8 lines were imported and 1 line could not be loaded.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-50-06.png)

If you close the window or click “Finish” before the end of the process, the import will still run in the background, while the progress can be seen in the history table. If there are errors in the list of imported data, you will receive a notification about the line number with an error and the import will be paused. Correct the error and import again.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-50-51.png)

## How to Track Statistics using Tags

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177191-How-to-Track-Statistics-using-Tags

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / How to Track Statistics using Tags

This section is available from the **Contacts **menu and **Tags **submenu. It allows you to track statistics by tags (special tags).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/1575987617186.png)

For example, the same subscription form can be installed on the main page of the site and in the sidebar. To track where the subscribers come from, you can tag each form with a unique tag. A similar label can be set when the order button is generated.

On this page, you can track how many [contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050679832-Contacts), [subscribers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers-), and [accounts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391512-Orders) were received for each tag.

Depending on the selected column, clicking on the number in the row of the table allows you to go to the Contacts page, Subscribers, or Accounts respectively, where the data will be filtered by the selected tag.

The Title tag filter allows you to display the data of those tags with the same text as in their title.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-10-26_12-28-17.png)

If the entire title is entered, one line will be displayed; if a title fragment is entered, then all tags that contain this fragment will be displayed.

You must enter the data in the filter field and click the **Search **button. To remove the filter, click the **Clear**** **button.

## How to view User Click History (Activities)

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050698292-How-to-view-User-Click-History-Activities

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / How to view User Click History (Activities)

This page shows the activity of the selected employees /users (at what time and which pages were opened).

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073373231/blobid0.png)

When you go to the page, a filter window where you must specify at least one of the search parameters opens.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073373291/blobid1.png)

You can choose from:

-
Period of activity (date and time, from and to)

- Login/username of the employee/user

-
IP address from which the login was made

-
Address of the page that was opened

You must enter the data in the filter and click the **Search **button. To remove the filter, click the **Clear **button.

## Importing Contacts through Text Import

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050680012-Importing-Contacts-through-Text-Import

/ [Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Import Contacts

**Content**

-
[Import contacts](#h_01ERA54880KG1J2ZQFKJGDPHAW)

- [List to import the leads ](#h_01ERA54FD30WC56Z7G7RASYCJ6)

- [List to transfer the leads from one group to another ](#h_01ERA55560VHHC6YP6BH9424BT)

- [Automatic emails ](#h_01ERA55CJ8WBBSVV4249ATM7C2)

## Import contacts

This form allows you to import subscribers from other mailing services. You may also use it to transfer the leads from one group to another.

Prepare the list for transfer first.

## List to import the leads

Go to the section “Contacts” – “Leads” – “Import” – “Text Import”.

- In the “Where to import” field, specify the group to which the import will be made.

- In the window “Import data” paste the data in text format

Make sure the inserted data is correct, take into account the order of the data and the separator:

**![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-51-41.png)**

Make sure that the inserted data is correct:

- The first line should contain a list of the imported fields

- The lines that follow should contain the data

-
Divider is ;

- In case the date is the value for the additional field, then it should be typed as follows:
YYYY-MM-DD

If the imported contacts are from an export file that was generated from InfluencerSoft, then inserting only the e-mail address is enough, you do not need to fill in other fields. The contact with the specified e-mail address will be added to the new group, and the contact information will be added automatically. See example below:

email; test@gmail.com;

The “skip automatic emails” field allows you to specify whether subscribers will receive email series in their entirety after import or not. You can add subscribers to a new group by skipping the first 2 emails, then subscribers will start receiving an automatic series immediately from the third message.

## List to transfer the leads from one group to another

To do this, you should follow the steps above, but preparing the list may be easier. Refer to the [Subscribers section](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers-) on how to export the subscriber lists.

Filter stores the information for 5 minutes. If you do not import within the time frame, filter the required leads and import them by clicking the cogwheel. Otherwise, all leads in the database will be imported.

Search and select the required subscribers and export them in a plain text format. Next is to add the first line – it should contain the field names that will be imported.

## Automatic emails

The field defines whether the subscribers will receive all [automatic emails](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848451-Email-Series-) after the import.

Run import and see progress

Click Import once all data is defined.

The bottom part of the window displays the progress bar.

In addition to the methods described in this article for adding a database of addresses to your account, you can integrate with other services through [Zapier](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050406312-Integration-with-Zapier-com-) and [API](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245591-API).

## Helpful information

### What is the difference between importing followers and importing contacts?

**A contact** is data about a potential customer or subscriber that was entered manually through import or when placing an order or filling out a subscription form. For non-activated contacts, it is not possible to send broadcasts to them. You can only send sms if the contact has a mobile number.

However, if the contact was uploaded by importing subscribers with the ability to send email through an external SMTP server, then you can send an email to them without going through our servers and the activation process. Work with letters, texts, settings takes place in your InfluencerSoft account, and mailing is carried out via a [third-party mail server](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-How-to-setup-your-business-Email-Mailing-Settings-#h_01ERAVFCYYAGNMAJX0HXYR3J8J).

**A subscriber** is a contact that is in the “Subscribed” or “Activated” status, that is, the most useful contact. For subscribers, you can send instant, automatic emails and sms through the InfluencerSoft servers. Read more about contact statuses below:

### In what status will the contact be added to the new group?

If this is a contact that you already have in the database, it will be added in the same status as at the time of import.

If this is a new contact that you do not have in your database, it will be added in the “Awaiting activation” status. If you import contacts with sending an activation email, then those who activate the subscription will receive an active “Subscribed” status, after which they will be able to receive your mailings.

If this is a new contact and during import you select “Skip sending activation email when importing. It will be possible to send emails to them only through a third-party SMTP server”, then the contact will receive the status “Can only be sent through an external SMTP server” (blue checkmark).

### Option 1

If you need to add contacts/subscribers from one group to another within one InfluencerSoft account, then use the “gear” in the “Subscribers” section or through the “Leads” section Filter the necessary data and add them to another or new group.у.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-54-33.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-54-33.png)

The filter stores information about the change for 5 minutes. If you did not import (add to the group) in five minutes, please filter the necessary contacts again and repeat the procedure, otherwise all contacts in your database will be added to the group.

### Option 2

You can export filtered data or contacts / subscribers by group via export by clicking on the gear. Then load this data via import in text or via CSV file.

To export (upload) data, click on the gear and select the appropriate format

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-55-44.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/2020-12-26_22-55-44.png)

## Lead Card

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050399232-Lead-Card

/[Contacts ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts)/ Lead Card

**Content**

- [How to search for a lead card](#h_01ER9BF5DQ7ZR1XY0R57GYMGSV)

- [Structure of a lead card](#h_01ER9BQH4M5QE661EPW01ETNM8)

- [Lead’s financial statistics](#h_01ER9BQSPW7HJJYZX0R320V0KR)

- [A lead](#h_01ER9BR1PND57QBTSJTY2E1M4T)

- [Lead’s history ](#h_01ER9BRBAKXTM1P5PCCC9ERZ41)

- [Lists](#h_01ER9BRZ815GGWGBM6RV9H29W8)

- [Pages](#h_01ER9BTMANYVBZQHDCT1B4VSKD)

- [Orders](#h_01ER9BTZKXA2WW7KECM361YWTP)

- [Calls made to confirm orders](#h_01ER9BVC28NPB8Z3J3WDP26NER)

- [Automatic chain and broadcasts messages](#h_01ER9BVV877CMRPK2HA5TKNW8K)

- [Calls of assignments](#h_01ER9BWC0B7M24MFGFZNJNACDT)

- [Related contacts](#h_01ER9BXQG755QEYD4PQC18RAHN)

A lead card is a tool to work with particular clients and subscribers in InfluencerSoft. It will help you get detailed information about any lead.

## How to search for a lead card

There are several ways you can find a lead card: from Contacts – Leads, from Campaigns – Subscribers, and from Store – Orders. In some cases, you can open a card by clicking its name or lead email (in some cases, you just click “No Email”).

Here is the first method:

- Open Contacts – Leads

- Find the required lead by applying filter (or visually)

- Click the email of the required lead in the Email column

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/leadcard1-2.png)

## Structure of a lead card

A lead card contains 14 tabs:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2021-01-09_232652.jpg)

-
A cogwheel icon “To Add” attaches a lead to the selected [process](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051179551-Processes), a [lead list](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050401352-Contact-Lists), or you can apply [rules](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051178391-Rules) to it.

-
General information about a lead’s key information. In this block, in addition to the name, email, and phone number, information on the address, delivery address, time zone, and points accrued will be displayed.

-
[Lead history](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050397772-Contact-History-) displays all changes in a lead.

-
[Tasks](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050859551-Tasks) allow you to look through all tasks for this lead and assign a new task.

-
Information about lead lists in which a lead is attached.

-
A list of all pages visited by a lead.

-
All orders of a lead.

-
Information about the calls concerning the lead’s orders.

-
A list of sent [email series](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848451-Email-Series-) (and [actions of a chain](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050385272-Add-Edit-and-Copy-Email-Series-)).

-
A list of [broadcasts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848431-Broadcasts-) sent to a subscriber.

-
Summarized information about call tasks, which are connected with this lead.

-
Information about click-through with the links with advert (and referral) tags. In other words, lead’s clicks. Read more about the definition of a click in our service in this [article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050390812-The-Settings-of-the-Affiliate-Program-).

-
Information about the leads associated with the lead. Related contacts are the leads that are used to perform some actions (subscription, payment, click-through) in one browser, but they are not merged. In other words, these are the leads of one person, but with different emails.

-
Information about the leads merged with this lead. Merged contacts are the leads which are merged into one lead, while the second lead was deleted.

## Lead’s financial statistics

It becomes available if a lead generates at least one order:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/leadcard3.png)

-
Orders – total sum of all orders generated for a particular email.

-
Expected – total sum of all orders with “Expected” status generated for a particular email.

-
Confirmed — total sum of all orders generated for a particular email with “Confirmed” status.

-
Paid — total sum of the paid orders for a particular lead.

-
Income – total sum of the income from lead’s orders. It is calculated as Paid — Expenses. Find out more about the expenses on a product in this [article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850851-Adding-and-Editing-a-Product-), they can also be defined for the whole store.

-
Profit – a sum that is left when we subtract the expenses (7+8+9) and refunds (10) from the income (5).

-
Affiliate commission – a sum of all payments accrued to the referrals, which bring this client into your sales funnel.

-
Call center – a sum of all payments accrued to the employees who persuade a client to buy your products.

-
Co-authored — a sum of all payments accrued to the co-authors for the sales of the collaboratively developed products.

-
Refund – a sum of all refunds paid to a particular client.

## A lead

The main tab contains general information about a subscriber, including a lead’s email, first name, last name, middle name, phone number, and city. The fields depend on what a subscriber enters in a subscription or order form when creating a lead. Some fields can be edited by you or your staff (for example, a phone number or lead’s names; appoint a personal manager).

Additional fields will be displayed if you define them in [Contacts – Settings](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051177871-CRM-Settings).

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/leadcard4.png)

Status – it shows whether a client can be sent a letter from the system (Activated or Subscribed statuses), or the letters cannot be sent (other statuses).

Here you can also assign a lead to a personal manager and enter extra information about a lead.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2021-02-20_11.png)

-
Personal manager – a manager in charge of this lead (the manager can be assigned, read more in this [article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360044767611-The-Manager-Is-Responsible-for-the-Order-and-for-the-Client-What-Is-the-Difference-)).

-
Customer information – extra information about a client that can be manually added.

-
Points – The points displayed in the contact card are used only for integration with services where gamification is configured.

## Lead’s history

This tab displays information about the previous actions with a particular lead. At the moment, there are the following actions:

-
Creating a lead

-
Changing the general information about a lead

**![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072506671/blobid0.png)**

Also, lead history displays the changes made by the [Zapier service](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050406312-Integration-with-Zapier-com-) through the “Add and Update Lead” action (if you have integration configured). In this case, the note (next to the date and time) will indicate “Zapier – Add and Update Lead”.

## Lists

This tab displays all lists of the selected lead:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/leadcard7.png)

-
List of leads – the name of the list which a lead has joined.

-
Date – when a lead subscribed to this list of leads.

-
Partner – a login of the referral which brought the subscriber to this list of leads.

-
Tag – a tag that subscribed to a user to the list.

-
Source and channel – UTM tags in the link where a user has registered on the list.

-
Campaign, ads, keys – UTM tags for a more advanced level.

-
Status – lead’s status in the system. It describes the possibility to send letters to the lead’s email.

-
Deletion from a list of leads — this button can delete a lead from the list. A lead can be deleted from usual lists, while you cannot delete a lead manually from auto-lists.

## Pages

This tab shows a list of all pages visited by a lead:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/leadcard8.png)

## Orders

This tab contains a list of all orders generated by a particular lead:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/leadcard9.png)

- Number – order number.

-
Created – displays the order generation date and time.

-
Products – displays [product ID](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050391512-Orders) attached to the generated order.

-
Partners – displays the login of a referral who will be accrued [commission](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050526431-The-Commissions-for-the-Selected-Partner-) fee under this order.

-
$ – displays the sum of a particular order.

-
Payment – displays the payment date or the current order status (confirmed, refund, canceled).

-
Source and channel – shows UTM tags attached to a particular order.

- Campaign, ads, keys – shows additional UTM tags.

## Calls made to confirm orders

Information about the calls are displayed like this:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/leadcard10.png)

-
Number – order number.

-
Created – it displays the order generation date and time.

-
Products – it displays the products attached to the generated orders and their prices.

-
Status – order status.

-
Comment – comments from an employee who was making calls.

-
Manager – a login of an employee in charge.

### Facebook pages

Facebook pages visited by the contact.

## Automatic chain and broadcasts messages

The tabs show all automatic and broadcast letters sent to a user.

Automatic chain:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2021-01-10_193017.jpg)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2021-01-10_193017.jpg)

-
List – the name of a list that is selected for automatic chains (if this list is deleted, the field will be blank).

-
Letter number – number of a letter (or action) in an automatic chain, this letter is sent to a subscriber (if the list is deleted, the list will be renumbered).

-
Name – name of a letter sent to a subscriber.

-
Done – date and time of sending a letter.

-
Opened – date and time of opening a letter (if it is blank, the letter is not opened).

-
Clicked – date and time of clicking the link in the letter (if it is blank, no link has been clicked, or [click-through counter is disabled](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848511-Sending-and-Editing-Emails-by-Lists-)).

-
Unsubscribed – date and time of unsubscribing from the mailshot by clicking the link in the letter (if it is blank, the letter is not unsubscribed).

-
Spam – date and time of clicking the button “This is spam” added to the letter by the service (buttons “Unsubscribe” and “This is spam” can be added in [Campaigns – Settings – Mailing settings](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-)), or clicking any button “This is spam” in a letter.

A table with the data in the “broadcasts messages” tab contains the same information, except for the following options:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2021-01-10_193535.jpg)

-
Number –  number of broadcasts letter in the system.

-
Sent – date and time of sending a letter.

## Calls of assignments

If there are no task calls, the tab will not be displayed. It shows the statuses of a particular lead in the call tasks which are connected with this lead:

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2021-01-10_222413.jpg)

-
Show clicks for – helps define the click display period.

-
Time – shows the date and time of click-through with tags.

-
Source – shows a link tag “Source”, which a user followed.

-
Campaign– displays a link tag “Campaign”, which a user followed.

-
Ad – shows a link tag “Ad”, which a user followed.

-
Keys – displays a link tag “Keys”, which a user followed.

-
Find out more about the UTM tag link generation in this [article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051550771-New-Campaign-).

## Related contacts

Related contacts are the leads used to make some actions (to subscribe, to pay, to follow a link) in one browser, but these leads have not been merged. In other words, these are the leads of one person, but with different emails.

These features are very user-friendly as you do not have to search for the old leads of a client, if the client paid from a different email or if the client made a mistake in email address during registration.

## Lead Card in Call Tasks

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050398252-Lead-Card-in-Call-Tasks

/[Contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245391-Contacts) / Lead Card in Call Tasks

**Content**

-
[General View](#h_01ER9H7F4KQRF4M8H011XK45F0)

-
[Lead status](#h_01ER9H7T0DE1XWSXT0M6P6FSNE)

-
[Buttons to change the call results](#h_01ER9H83K05J1Z0Z6R5A40D2WE)

-
[Main info about a client](#h_01ER9H8PHD3R278R23HPTF8873)

-
[Call history and detailed information for client’s orders](#h_01ER9H8WZG4RHFZ9NR2N7CPYV4)

-
[Call script](#h_01ER9H95MZR0XG0YCGP5NG3Y1P)

## General view

To go to a lead card in a call task, go to Contacts — Calls — select call task, click the number in the call task line — and then click the link in a “Name and phone number” column.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls1.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls1.png)

A lead card for a call provides information about the lead and performance progress. Here you can do everything you need:

-
View and edit call [status](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051165971-Adding-and-Editing-a-Call-Assignment)

-
Record the results of the calls to a client

-
Edit the card information

-
Make additional comments about a client

-
View the history of the calls for a call task, orders generated by a client, and calls about the orders

Please find a screenshot with the explanatory comments and a brief description of the page settings below.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls2.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls2.png)

Let us look at the page settings in detail.

## Lead status

Three statuses are available by default:

-
New (no manager works with a client)

-
In process (a manager works with a client)

-
Finished (successfully or not; results of the work with the client)

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls3.png)

A lead status can be edited in the call card, if necessary.
The same changes can be made in the account of a call center employee. If a call center employee indicates the status as Finished, then it will be immediately seen in a lead card (in call tasks) by the account holder.

You can create customized [statuses](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051165971-Adding-and-Editing-a-Call-Assignment) for the tasks in Contacts — Calls.  Click the name of the task, then the Status tab. To find out more, follow the [link](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051165971-Adding-and-Editing-a-Call-Assignment).

## Buttons to change the call results

These are the buttons used by a call center manager (and sometimes by an administrator) to record the results of the calls.

![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls4.png)

Find out more about the features and tasks of each button in this article.

## Main information about a client

Here you can find the zip code, full name of a client, phone number, city, personal manager (or “not chosen”). You can add **tags**. It will be displayed in the lead card under the Lead tab.

-
**Date of first registration. **Date when a user filled out (and sent) the first subscription or order form.

-
**Date created.** Date when a lead appeared to be in a call task. There are two available options: a lead has already been added to a list, and you selected it for a call task or vice versa. The latest date matters.
Case 1: a lead joined the list on January 1 this year. The task was created on January 5. The date of creation is January 5.
Case 2: a lead joined the list on January 1 this year. The task was done last year (for example, on January 15). The date of creation is January 1.

-
**Date of change.** Date when a lead status is updated (e.g., New — In progress).

-
**Closing date.** Date when a lead status is changed to Finished (successful or not).

You can add **additional information** about a client. It will be seen in all orders and in a lead card in the More tab.

## Call history and detailed information for the client’s orders

The next visual block contains a call history for the selected call task, as well as the information about other orders generated by a client and about the calls devoted to these orders.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls5.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/lead_card_calls5.png)

This block has three tabs with extra information.

-
**“Call History” tab**
This tab displays the call history for the task you are working on at the moment. You can track the progress (e.g., status change from New to in process) and see the name of the employee who worked with this lead at any stage within the task.
Please find detailed information about the buttons which record the call results here.

-
**“All orders” tab**
This tab includes all orders which have been generated by a client (this information is backed up in [Lead](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050679832-Contacts) Card in All orders tab).

-
**“****O****rder c****alls****” tab**
This tab displays all calls connected with the orders (this information is backed up in [Lead](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050679832-Contacts) Card in “Calls made to confirm orders” tab).

## Call script

An employee will see a script if a call script (a phone call scenario) is enabled in Contacts — Calls — in the editing mode of a task (“Tips for employee” tab).

The script is displayed under the table of a visual block with the call history (as it is in a call card in the administrator and call center employee accounts).
Find out more about how to add a script for an employee [here](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051165971-Adding-and-Editing-a-Call-Assignment).

Now you can easily track the call task progress for each lead and control the employees dealing with the tasks.
