## Message Constructor 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848491-Message-Constructor

/[Campaigns ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns)/Message Constructor

**Content **

- [1 Introduction ](#h_01ERAW9043DVYR02MRXDNT8VYC)

- [2 How to create a message? ](#h_01ERAW95MCZFS738A432SWJ9EF)

- [3 What are the components of a email template? ](#h_01ERAW9D6KNBCV5JQSN726PG08)

- [4 Collection of ready-to-use sections ](#h_01ERAW9K83JR57XF67PKC51H52)

- [5 How to add new widgets ](#h_01ERAW9S72BMW2ZYN9JFK9JGC4)

- [6 How to move the elements ](#h_01ERAW9Z42VC3HQCZSA91AHH1T)

- [7 Changes in the elements’ design ](#h_01ERAWA81ACACAGGPEVDSF271M)

- [8 How to add variables in a message ](#h_01ERAWAGVJ2EF7JSC7ECGGMP8Y)

- [9 How to create a customized email template ](#h_01ERAWAYNBFVFGJX6TNB7C04BW)

- [10 How to delete or to edit a customized email template ](#h_01ERAWB9R98P9M5TQAZFJSMWGB)

- [11 How to provide access to edit email template to employee? ](#h_01ERAWBM3SY9NE1CH8XCS44Z0E)

## Introduction

We are delighted to present a new service tool which is long-awaited by our clients – a Message Constructor. We hope it will simplify your work with the mailouts.

## How to create a message?

Section **“Campaigns”**, subsections **“Broadcasts”** and **“Email series”** handle all activities with the message constructor.

Switch to **“Message Constructor”** when you prepare a message.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266452/blobid0.png)

To create a message in Message Constructor, click “Choose a template,” then the system will lead you to a page with the email templates:

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266492/blobid1.png)

Select the template you need.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266512/blobid2.png)

If you are satisfied with the design and the look of the template, click “Create email” to go to message constructor:

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266532/blobid3.png)

## What are the components of an email template?

The Editor of a template constructor takes half of the screen. The control buttons are at the bottom:

-
To the left — page settings

-
To the right — adding new elements

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266552/blobid4.png)

Left panel buttons:

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491031/blobid5.png)

The page is divided into **three ****parts**: The header, main content, and footer.
Additional sections can be added to each part. Each section has widgets.

## Collection of ready-to-use sections

Large blocks of a message — **sections** — are divided into categories by the content: content, reviews, footer, products, and header. Ready-to-use sections can speed up the process of message creation.

To add an element into a message, click “Add element” in the right corner below:

 ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266572/blobid6.png)

Then just drag the required section to the place where this section should be dropped. This place will be highlighted in blue.

 ![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266592/blobid7.png)

## How to add new widgets

To add a widget to the message, a section should be placed and selected (by right clicking the mouse).
You can add new widgets by clicking “Add element.” You should select the WIDGETS tab in the pop-up panel on the right by holding the required widget and dragging it to the required place in the section.
An element location is highlighted by a blue line in the same way as the section location.

 ![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266612/blobid8.png)

## How to move the elements

To move a section or a widget in a message, click the block heading. Hold the element by left clicking the mouse and drag and drop it to the required place.

 ![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266632/blobid9.png)

![blobid10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266652/blobid10.png)

Widgets can be moved inside the section and between the sections. When moving a widget from one section to another, this widget will be the first on the list. When moving a widget to a new section, select this section (by left clicking the mouse) and drag and drop the widget to the required place inside this section.

## Changes in the elements’ design

Click the required element of a message — the right panel will display the settings for this element. Each element has ready-to-use styles which save your time.

 ![blobid11.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266672/blobid11.png)

Please note that in the widget “text” you can set different indents for the desktop and mobile versions of the email.
To do this, open the text widget settings and set the necessary indent values.

 ![blobid12.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266692/blobid12.png)

## How to add variables in a message

Variables typical for email can be added by clicking a “brackets” icon in Text widget:

 ![blobid13.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491051/blobid13.png)

Left click the required variable, and it will be added to an email template.

## How to create a customized email template

To create a customized email template, click the “star” in the settings panel.

 ![blobid14.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491071/blobid14.png)

The system will ask you to enter the name of the template, its description, and upload a template cover for the computer and smartphone, then the template can be saved.

When creating a new message, in case you want to use this template, select a “My templates” tab and the required template from the previously created ones.

 ![blobid15.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266712/blobid15.png)

## How to delete or to edit a customized email template

To delete or to edit a customized email template, go to My Templates from Campaigns — Broadcasts or Campaigns — Email series. Click View in the required template.

 ![blobid16.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491091/blobid16.png)

Select what exactly you would like to do: Edit or Delete.

 ![blobid17.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266732/blobid17.png)

Having edited the template, click “Save email” to save the changes.

## How to provide access to edit email template to an employee?

To make an editable email template accessible to an employee, go to “Employees” (in the drop-down menu in the upper right corner of your account), and check the box “Create new pages on sites” in profile editing in the “Site” tab. If you untick the remaining boxes, then the employee will be able to edit both the email templates and the website pages.

 ![blobid18.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491111/blobid18.png)

You have already understood that the Message Constructor follows the same principle as [Template Designer](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder). So, if you have already tried the Template Designer, you can easily and quickly create a message.

## Recommendations for Maintaining Mailings 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings

/[Campaigns ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns)/Recommendations for maintaining mailings

**Content**

-
[1 Basic recommendations for mailing](#h_01EQRRZJ2KTVVWK5B17YQXVNVC)

[1.1 Do what you promised ](#h_01EQRRZTYTATJ8618RCFCQ8BYS)

[1.1.1 Do not burn out the database by mailing excessively](#h_01EQRS05J22P12CMEH5HM101V3)

- [1.1.2 Be careful with reciprocity and advertising ](#h_01EQRS0DM2A4EF12FGCP817A5Q)

- [1.1.3 Be consistent with your email style](#h_01EQRS1MA1WSNDT09N2W9K1SCB)

- [1.7 Refer by name ](#h_01EQRS5D7DCSE84YDWZZWYFGWD)

- [1.8 Write more than 500 characters ](#h_01EQRS62FMAQBHFKBWEBXJB4PC)

-
[1.9 Beware of stop words and watch your spelling](#h_01EQRS7H1K7SC2KYEZY4GD63NY)

- [1.10 Services-abbreviations – email killers ](#h_01EQRS8QKAWYR5N68WT05XXBA5)

- [1.11 No more than two different domains in one email ](#h_01EQRS92K9SP4N5EYPXHKZZD0S)

- [1.12 Do not mess with suspicious domains ](#h_01EQRS9KDH2RQS8YAC76WVC51E)

- [1.13 Do not use dangerous code ](#h_01EQRSA9C00KYQKZXD0DE18PTC)

- [1.14 Use only domain mail](#h_01EQRSB02Q4M1W83FTFFXB34WR)

-
[2 Recommendations for the web programmer ](#h_01EQRSBAY73WJ0FX81R4Q97EFA)

[2.1 Be Easy ](#h_01EQRSBQV7C8HRRH43DBD6DC5H)

- [2.2 Do not create the interface for a particular post service ](#h_01EQRSCBJ6GN6E8GKD2MHNHTYY)

- [2.3 Think about the user ](#h_01EQRSCQ3PB8T7XQ410XV92A8J)

- [2.4 Do not forget to specify the protocols ](#h_01EQRSFE7KSNS987AKA5QFFBM0)

-
[2.5 Choose the correct way to integrate images](#h_01EQRSFQBBE3W80KT0NRBBRVEJ)

- [2.6 Test it! ](#h_01EQRSG1RKDV76581DG9CX5BS7)

- [3 Verification of the email before sending ](#h_01EQRSGAET52T34SFDZKTG5HVP)

- [4 If you are still in spam ](#h_01EQRSGMGTH99T49B5E2AB2WET)

Email is one of the oldest Internet tools, unchanged, and has survived to the present; however, it has gotten a huge number of associated standards and application practices documented nowhere else.

In the email standards themselves, there are no ways to check the sending or prevent unwanted mailings and spam. Therefore, any mail server (Gmail.com, Yahoo.com, etc.) performs several additional checks to weed out unwanted correspondence.

We have compiled a list of tips that will help you pass these additional checks. Many of the recommendations below are not mandatory, but the more of them you will do, the higher the probability that problems with the delivery of emails will not arise.

InfluencerSoft service gives you the opportunity to send emails with pre-defined settings so that your emails will reach the Inbox; however, we remind you that the delivery of emails to the “Inbox” lies with the author of mailings.

## Basic recommendations for mailing

### Do what you promised

The content of the newsletter must match what is stated on the subscription page. Write honestly, do not deceive the recipients.

If the subscriber does not receive what was promised, the best case, he will simply unsubscribe from you, and worst case, he will click on “SPAM.” Each click on the “SPAM” button from the subscribers’ side affects the deliverability of your email and your sender reputation.

The fastest way to be considered as spam is to keep sending ads that do not provide valuable content. To avoid this, follow these three rules:

#### Do not burn out the database by mailing excessively

It is strongly recommended not sending more than one email a day to the same subscriber groups without a good reason, otherwise, it is only a matter of time the mail services are guaranteed to mark you as a spammer.

Many people agree that the optimal frequency of mailings is not more than three times a week and at least once a month. If you send more often, your newsletter may get boring, which will increase the number of clicks on the “SPAM” button. If too infrequent, subscribers will not recognize you and forget that they subscribed to your mailings, which will also increase the number of clicks on the “SPAM” button.

#### Be careful with reciprocity and advertising

Many authors in the pursuit of financial gain begin to actively take part in promotions of mutual piracy or in advertising of other projects.

Of course, there is nothing wrong with moderation on using such methods of monetizing traffic and increasing the subscriber base. But this becomes a genuine problem when advertising or reciprocity becomes:

-
Persistent and intrusive

-
Not belonging to the subject of your newsletter

Email distribution, despite all its mass character, is a means of maximally close communication with your target audience. Respect and take care of your target audience.

In our business, there were cases when authors threw the subscribers dozens of rambling emails a day, starting from computer literacy courses and gardening tools to offers for increasing male virility. Of course, such authors are forever blocked by mail services and were not our customers for long.

#### Be consistent with your email style

Spam filters of email services are extremely complex systems that track tens and hundreds of parameters. They monitor the indicators of your mailings hourly: From which IPs they are committed, from which domain, and with what function. Based on this, the mailing-service workers build a model of your behavior and make a prediction for the future.

If you start to behave atypically for your model of behavior, for example, dramatically increasing the number of emails sent or changing the sending IP server, mailing services can treat this with suspicion.

There are two important points:

-
When moving to a new mailing list service, never start sending your messages right away through the entire database. Select several target segments and carefully increase the number of messages sent.

-
Frequently changing service providers adversely affect the delivery.

### Segment the database

Who said that sending all the emails across the entire database is a good idea? This is an awful idea. It is best to segment the subscription base.

**Segmentation of the base** is the division of the whole subscription base into smaller groups according to the interests and preferences of subscribers. The open rate of your emails is causally related to how well your subscription base is segmented. In addition, segmentation has a positive effect on the delivery of messages by mail services.

Very convenient methods of segmenting the database are:

-
Segmentation through a [survey ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851751-Surveys-)

-
Segmentation via a quick subscription/unsubscribe link

**+**[Briefly, what is a quick subscription/unsubscription link ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)

### Do not be afraid to clean up your database

Do you hope that subscribers who have not opened your emails for many months will suddenly start reading them? This probability is small. Most often these subscribers are no longer interested in your newsletter.

We already wrote about how seriously the mailing system tracks the metrics of your mailings. One such metric is the opening-rate of your emails. The lower it is, the less likely subsequent emails will be delivered.

Accordingly, it is better to get rid of inactive subscribers. For this, you can use the “auto-cleanup of subscribers who did not read 15 emails in 45 days” [settings in the mailing lists](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)and the [auto group of inactive contacts](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-) (if you still want to save them for some reason).

### Do not be afraid of the links “Unsubscribe” and “SPAM”

You do not need to be afraid of the Unsubscribe link and "Report as SPAM link, which InfluencerSoft offers.

If a person wants to unsubscribe, it is better to give him this opportunity and put it in the most prominent place. Of course, this will slightly increase the percentage of unsubscribes, but it will significantly reduce the clicks on the “spam” button in the mailer. With fewer clicks on “SPAM,” the less chance of being tagged as such.

The more interesting question is, why should we put the "Report as SPAM” link? The fact is that if the subscriber still wants to not just unsubscribe, but complain about spam, and clicks on the link, the complaint will go to the InfluencerSoft service and not the mailing service. Ask yourself, who do you want to deal with more: The Support Service of InfluencerSoft or, for example, the support service of Gmail.com? In view of this, the "Report as SPAM” link should be brighter than the “spam” button in the subscriber’s mail client.

### Pay attention to the subject of the email

Even if the subscribers agreed to receive your email, they may not initially recognize who it is from. The subject of the email “Our daily mailing from …” or “Your monthly update from…” will help subscribers to immediately get to know your email.

### The subscriber should understand why there are receiving your email

One of the main reasons why your emails do not reach the subscribers is complaints about SPAM. For subscribers to understand why they received the email, we recommend that you include the following information in the emails (sender’s contacts):

*You received this email because you subscribed to mailings from a SPECIFIC PROJECT on the SITE website. If you do not wish to receive more emails from this mailing list, you can unsubscribe from it by clicking on the link: unsubscribe from the mailing list. SPECIFIC AUTHOR, City, Country, Phone*

**+**[How to do it in InfluencerSoft? ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)

It has become a practice to show this information not only in the “footer” of the email but also at the top of the email. It can just be plain text.

*“You received these mailings as you agreed to receive links from the SPECIFIC PROJECT on the SITE website. If you do not wish to receive more emails from this mailing list, you can unsubscribe (unsubscribe link).”*

You can place this text yourself when making an email and add an unsubscribe link.

### Refer by name

Always use the variable “{$ name}” to contact your subscribers. As practice shows, this increases the loyalty of subscribers to your mailings.

**+**[How to do it in InfluencerSoft? ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)

### Write more than 500 characters

There is a belief that there is a ratio of text/images that affect the delivery of emails. If you do not comply with it, the email cannot reach the subscribers.

The good news is according to the statements of many of our colleagues and competitors and confirmed by statistical data if the HTML-code has more than 500 characters, then the number of images in it does not affect the delivery of emails.

Another point, indirectly related to this rule: you can never send emails that consist ONLY of images (without text). Such emails are guaranteed to go into spam since most professional spammers use this technique to bypass anti-spam filters (more on stop-words below).

### Beware of stop words and watch your spelling

Spam filters of email services do not like certain words that professional spammers often use.

Here are just some of these words and phrases:

**test, test, testing**, dollar, free, advertising, available, gift, bonus, commercial offer, discount, 100%, savings, earnings, ruble, income, guarantee, secret, novelty, limited, transaction, price, account, buy, urgently, only today, do not remove, access, money, benefit, congratulations, freedom, cheap, sex, XXX, investment, easy, earning, mortgage, lottery, million, timeshare, credit, lose weight, etc.

Text triggers on the headers also often get your email reported as SPAM. Do not put “Immediately,” “While free,” “Buy it right now,” or “Register soon” in the headlines! No mention of “freebies” or proposals for instant enrichment.

We also recommend you to follow some rules that will help your emails to successfully pass spam filters:

-
Do not use the <$> character, especially in headings.

-
Do not abuse the exclamation marks <!>. Three exclamation points in a row is already a signal for a spam filter.

-
Use capital emails only where it is necessary. YOU DO NOT NEED TO USE THE CAPS LOCK KEY TO WRITE ENTIRE SENTENCES

-
Do not overdo it with **bold **and underlined font

-
Do not abuse the abundance of multi-colored text in an email and carefully avoid excessively bright colors (for example, spam filters can easily block colors such as #FF0000; #0000FF; #00FF00)

Below is a good example of how easy it is to break all the rules and in the blink of an eye go into spam. We often see this in spam emails.

**WEBINAR ****TOMORROW!!!!!** CATCH THE MOMENT, **BUY A PLACE** WITH A DISCOUNT **50**%!!! $:) $

Despite these filters, many authors successfully send emails with small violations in words and stop-colors and their emails get to incoming subscribers. Why? Because otherwise, their mailings are impeccable, they have a good reputation, high opening-rate, and a small number of complaints about spam. Of course, the example above will drive even the most ideal sender into spam. We are talking about small and rare violations. If you are just starting an email activity, you should not take risks at all. The presence of even a single stop-word can lead to being classified as a spammer.

### Services-abbreviations – email killers

All references in the text of the email should be shown in the form of a fully qualified domain name. You are not allowed to use IP addresses and URL-encoded domain names as references. Goo.gl, Bit.ly, J.mp, tinyurl.com, and the like – just forget about them. Such services are often used by spammers and the trust of the mailing service to such links is minimal.

If the email has a short reference – 9 cases out of 10 your email will get blocked.

### No more than two different domains in one email

Ideal: All links used in the email, as well as domains of return email addresses, must match. Also, we do not recommend using more than three links in the email in total.

System links in the footer of the email from InfluencerSoft (View the history of emails from the InfluencerSoft service, unsubscribe from the newsletter, report spam, link to the site) do not fall under this rule and are not summed up with links in the body of the email. Moreover, the presence of these system references is one of the mandatory rules of the mailing system and is guaranteed to help get your email delivered, not lower the delivery.

### Do not mess with suspicious domains

Do not specify in the email's links containing domain names whose IP addresses are in popular stop-lists.

Find the IP address of any domain at [http://ipaddress.com/ip_lookup](http://ipaddress.com/ip_lookup)

You can check the location of the domain’s IP address in popular stop-lists on the following sites:

[http://whatismyipaddress.com/blacklist-check](http://whatismyipaddress.com/blacklist-check)

[http://mxtoolbox.com/blacklists.aspx](http://mxtoolbox.com/blacklists.aspx)

The stop-list can be either global or local, that is, only for certain mail service, for example, only for Gmail.com or only for Yahoo. Therefore, if the mailing service has fixed your IP as spam, no matter which mailing service you use, the emails will still be sent to spam. In this case, even redirects will not help.

### Do not use dangerous code

If the broadcast is in HTML-format, you’re not allowed to use ActiveX, JavaScript, VBScript frames, or IFrames. Mailers regard them as potentially malicious programs. The result is blocking the mailing or cutting the message.

We also recommend writing the text of the email, either directly in the editor of the email in InfluencerSoft, or in the Notepad program, and then copy the text to the email editor. Do not copy the text of the email from Microsoft Word, Evernote, or even Google notepad. The copied information will be guaranteed to have an HTML code, which will either spoil the layout of the email or lead to blocking the mailing.

Another tip in terms of mailings – to not copy emojis from social networks or from the Internet into emails. Their presence can be negatively perceived by mail programs, and they can cut them along with a solid piece of the rest of the content. In this case, it is also possible for the mailing to be classified as spam.

### Use only domain mail

Just **forget **about using email sender for mail on free domains.

InfluencerSoft service is also familiar with similar (so far one-time) use cases with mail on @ Gmail.com, etc.

There is only one way out: Use corporate mail on a personal domain of the form, for example [xxxxxx@yoursite.com](mailto:xxxxxx@yoursite.com)

## Recommendations for the web programmer

### Be Easy

Do not forget that web mails must filter some tags and attributes for security reasons, and they all do it differently. Avoid using classes, minimize the use of styles, especially for positioning. Layout on the tables is recommended.

### Do not create the interface for a particular post service

Users often configure redirection, mail collectors, or read emails in email programs.

### Think about the user

He can open your email on a huge retina display or on an old phone on top of Mount Everest, trying to grab a GPRS connection. So, the email should load quickly, but look beautiful even when pictures are off.

### Do not forget to specify the protocols

In all URLs, please specify the protocol (http: //, https: // or mailto:).

The use of URLs without a protocol, for example “//example.com/”, is unacceptable and can lead to freezing of the message in some email applications due to attempts to access the network. The use of protocols other than those listed is not recommended because they can be cut down by filters.

### Choose the correct way to integrate images

Choose the most proper way to embed images. Below are the following options, each with its own positives and negatives:

-
**External images**. From the point of view of the speed of sending, this option is the most preferable. External images do not weigh anything and do not complicate the structure of the email. However, many applications and mail services require the user’s permission to display such images. In addition, the server on which they are found should be reliable enough that when opening a message, they do not lead to freezing because the picture is inaccessible. Use them when the presence of pictures is optional.

-
**Inline images**. They are sent along with the contents of the email. They complicate the structure of the email and increase its weight, but can be large enough and usually displayed by default.

-
**Data URI**. The content image is inserted directly into the tag. They do not complicate the structure of the email, and are always shown in web mail, sometimes even with pictures disabled. As a rule, they have a size limitation, and so are suitable for small icons. However, please note that Gmail users may have problems displaying images in this format.

-
**Font images**. Images of Unicode characters from default fonts or using embedded custom fonts. A unique property – can be scaled along with the text. They may not display correctly, depending on the version of the operating system and the installed updates, device, mail program, or service.

### Test it!

Test each new layout of the message on different devices in different web mail before sending it to “live” users.

## Verification of the email before sending

When sending mass mailings, always use the function “[Test](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848511-Sending-and-Editing-Emails-by-Lists-)[ the distribution for spam](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848511-Sending-and-Editing-Emails-by-Lists-).”

If testing shows a hit in spam, first check the semantics of the email according to the algorithm:

-
Change one word in the subject, conduct testing

-
Change the second word in the subject, conduct testing

-
Remove the first sentence, conduct testing

-
Remove the second sentence, conduct testing

By the method of sequential exclusion of sentences or paragraphs of the email, it is possible to determine whether the problem lies in semantics (which means that it can be corrected operatively), or whether it is worth “digging deeper.”

We also recommend you register to two to three well-known email providers (Gmail, Yahoo, etc.), with 12 to 15 emails and place into a separate group of subscribers.

This group should be created specifically for these mailboxes and there should not be other emails in it, except for your test mailboxes.

It is better to sign emails with real names – John, Thomas, Olivia etc. You do not need to configure any filters or exception lists on these mailboxes. Leave as many settings as you intended by the creators of the email. Then, send the email with problems with the test results ONLY to this special group.

Based on the delivery of real emails to real addresses, you can already conclude:

-
If the messages are not spammed, try sending the scheduled email to the desired subscriber group. Even though email testing is almost identical to the actual mailing, it has micro-differences in several instances and can sometimes be perceived by email-service providers in a slightly different way.

-
If the emails are still spammed, you at least now have specific addresses for which the problem arose, and you can write to the support team of your email service provider with a request based on these data to give an answer why the emails were placed in spam.

Of course, sending out to such a small number of subscribers may not be considered mass, so the method is not foolproof, but it helps a lot when communicating with the services if the emails still go into the spam. Eighty percent of users of the service do not perform such actions, due to which the time of solving problems with mailings grows many times, which is simply not permissible at the speed of the information business.

## If you are still in spam

We strongly recommend using the suggestion given in this [article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848311-What-Should-I-Do-if-My-Emails-Go-Into-Spam-).

[*Creating a G Suite account for your business mail* ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848231-Creating-a-G-Suite-Account-for-Your-Business-Mail)

[*What should I do if my emails go into spam?* ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848311-What-Should-I-Do-if-My-Emails-Go-Into-Spam-)

## Sending and Editing Email by Activity 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050385632-Sending-and-Editing-Email-by-Activity

/[Campaigns ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns)/ Sending and editing email by activity

**Content **

-
[1 Main settings ](#h_01EREHWFQAT95B6K79JBKVSX8Q)

[1.1 A/B Testing ](#h_01EREHWMV2CZFHC4WYPCTK1W88)

- [2 Restrictions ](#h_01EREHWSFH1QW46TTFHPF0Y1NE)

- [3 Additional Settings ](#h_01EREHWZ90CZ271GB2WKR7ZGNP)

This page allows you to send an instant message to subscribers depending on the behavior (according to the activity criteria from earlier emails).

*Pages for adding and editing emails are identical to each other except for the page title (Add or Edit respectively).*

The page has four tabs:

-
Main settings

-
Restrictions

-
Additional settings

-
Testing the distribution of spam

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491191/blobid0.png)

## Main settings

On the** Main Settings** tab, you must select the date and time when the message was sent.

***Note****! **Even though** the tool is called “instant messaging” there can be a certain time lag** **depending** on the number of recipients**. In addition, the actual time of receiving a message depends on the recipient’s mailbox.*

You can prepare an instant message in advance (for example, schedule the email send out to the following day). Then by clicking the **Send **button the email will be put on hold and sent at the specified time.

Next, select the desired  activity parameter.

List of parameters:

-
The email was opened: All selected emails or any of the selected emails

-
The email was not opened: All selected emails or any of the selected emails

-
Subscriber clicked on the link in the email: In all selected emails or in any of the selected emails

-
Subscriber did not click on the link in the email: In all selected emails or in any of the selected emails

Choose the email(s) from the list the recipients of which, based on the selected activity, will form a mailing list for this email: Blue background – the email is selected, white – not selected. By default, the last five emails are displayed. **The Show 5** button opens the next five emails in reverse chronological order.

In the **Send on behalf** field, select one of the pre-added, and confirmed [senders](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-). Depending on the selected sender, the message will change.

The **Subject of the ****email** field is intended for entering the header of the message, which will be displayed in the subscriber’s mailbox.

The** ****Email**** Format **radio button allows you to choose in what form the message will be generated – HTML or plain text. If you select the plain text, no methods of formatting the message are available, but the message is guaranteed to be displayed in the same way in all mailers. When selecting HTML, advanced editing capabilities for messages (editor and HTML-markup mode) are available.

After that, in the editor window, you need to insert the message text or change the existing one. Editing text is done using the default text editor on InfluencerSoft.

Data substitution variables allow you to insert individual values into the message text for each subscriber. For example, when clicking on the **Subscriber name **button, the variable **{$ name}** will be inserted in the message text, which will be replaced with the name of a specific subscriber when the message is sent, taken from the database.

Variable **Link for ****subscribing**** or ****unsubscribing** allows you to insert a link into the message, by clicking on which the subscriber will automatically be moved from one group of subscribers to another without entering any data into the subscription form. This is a valuable tool that allows you to segment the subscription base.

Click on the title **Option ****Number** … allows you to minimize or expand the current version of the email. This is convenient if you are using split testing (A/B testing) to switch between message variants.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266832/blobid1.png)

### A/B Testing

Split testing allows you to choose an option with better open, clicks, and conversion rates by analyzing the response of the audience to changing any element of the message.

To conduct A/B testing, click the **Add option** button. Under the first option, a similar editor window will be added, allowing you to enter the second variant of the email. Similarly, you can add the 3rd, 4th, and so on options.

***Note****. The total value in the window is 100%. **If **we test **two** variants, we **split recipients 50/50 between the two**, if **three **variants, then** **33%, 33%, and 34%, and so on.*

The **Preview **button shows a view of how the message will be displayed to the subscriber. Click the **Test** button on the mail to send a test email to the specified recipient.

## Restrictions

On the **Restrictions** tab, you can specify which subscriber will not receive this email.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491231/blobid2.png)

For example, you can specify a date in the **Only signers with** … field to avoid resending the message to subscribers who have already received the information contained in the email earlier.

The **Exclude by Groups** window allows you to configure which other groups will not receive this email. For example, the message suggests buying a product at a discount. It can be received by customers who bought the product at full cost. To avoid this situation, just tick the checkbox in front of the *Customers group of the Product* … This group of subscribers will not receive the current email.

## Additional settings

On the tab **Additional settings**, the **count followed links from the message**** **checkbox, lets you enable or disable click-through-link counting in the message. This will allow you to track the number of emails opened, but also the conversion of the email. In addition, you can send emails to those that passed or did not click on the link.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491251/blobid3.png)

Here you can specify, if necessary, a personal redirect page after unsubscribing.

After making changes on all tabs, you can click the **Send **button. Sending will begin at once, or the email send out will be scheduled and will begin at the time specified in the settings.

When you click the **Save **button, the email will be paused. To start sending it, you need to go to the [**Instant Mailing**](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848431-Broadcasts-) page and click the submit button.

[Broadcasts ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848431-Broadcasts-)

[Email series ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848451-Email-Series-)

## Sending and Editing Emails by Lists 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848511-Sending-and-Editing-Emails-by-Lists

/[Campaigns ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns)/ Sending and editing emails by lists

**Content**

-
[1 Main settings ](#h_01ERE27WN0J487DZRVTEE1H0HR)

[1.1 A/B Testing ](#h_01ERE284E5XES71STGHJRPGJ1C)

- [2 Restrictions ](#h_01ERE28ASRBXYTNJZGDYGVRW39)

- [3 Additional Settings ](#h_01ERE28JD2J5C56SZXR742WMCW)

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266872/blobid0.png)

This page allows you to send an instant message to the selected subscriber groups specified in the CRM.

*Pages for adding and editing emails are identical to each other except for the page title (Add or Edit respectively).*

The page has three tabs:

-
Main settings

-
Restrictions

-
Additional settings

## Main settings

On the **Main Settings** tab, you must select the date and time when the message was sent.

***Note****! **Even though** the tool is called “instant messaging**,**”** there can be a certain time lag (**depending** on the number of recipients). In addition, the actual time of receiving a message depends on the recipient’s mailbox.*

You can prepare an instant message in advance (for example, scheduling send out to the following day). Then by clicking the **Send** button the message will be put on hold and the email will be sent at the specified time.

Further, select the desired group or group of contacts. Moving by category is done by clicking on the blue folder. Select a group by clicking on the checkbox (empty box). It should show a blue tick. You can select all the groups in the category by clicking on the checkbox of the category.

In the **Send on behalf** field, select one of the pre-added, and confirmed [senders](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-). Depending on the selected sender, the email will change.

The **Subject of the ****email**** **field is intended for entering the header of the message, which will be displayed in the subscriber’s mailbox.

The **Email**** Format** radio button allows you to choose in what form the email will be generated – HTML or plain text. If you select plain text, no methods of formatting the email are available, but the message is guaranteed to be displayed in the same way in all mailers. When selecting HTML, advanced editing capabilities for messages (editor and HTML-markup mode) are available.

After that, you need to insert the message text or change the existing one in the editor window. Editing text is done using the default text editor InfluencerSoft.

Data substitution variables allow you to insert individual values into the message text for each subscriber. For example, when clicking on the **Subscriber name** button, the variable **{$ name}** will be inserted in the message text, which will be replaced with the name of a specific subscriber when the message is sent, taken from the database.

Variable** Link ****to subscribe****/****unsubscribe** allows you to insert a link into the message, by clicking on which the subscriber will automatically be added from one group of subscribers to another and, if necessary, then removed from the group. This is a valuable tool that allows you to segment the subscription base.

Click on the title** ****Option number** … allows you to minimize or expand the current version of the message. This is convenient if you are using split testing (A/B testing) to switch between message variants.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266892/blobid1.png)

### A/B Testing

Split testing allows you to choose an option with better opens, clicks, and conversion rates by analyzing the response of the audience to changing any element of the message.

To conduct A/B testing, click the **Add option** button. Under the first option, a similar editor window will be added, allowing you to enter the second variant of the message. Similarly, you can add the 3rd, 4th, and so on options.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266932/blobid2.png)

***Note****. The total value in the window is **one hundred percent**. For example, if** we test **two** variants, we expose **fifty perc**ent**, if **three variants,** **then thirty-three percent**, **thirty-three percent,** and **thirty-four percent**, and so on.*

The **Preview **button shows a view of how the message will be displayed to the subscriber. Click the **Test **button to send a test email to the email recipient you specified.

## Restrictions

On the **Restrictions **tab, you can specify which subscriber will not receive this email.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072266952/blobid3.png)

For example, you can specify a date in the **Only signed with …** field to avoid resending the message to subscribers who have already received the information contained in the email earlier.

The** Exclude by Groups** window allows you to configure which other groups will not receive this email. For example, the message suggests buying a product at a discount. It can be received by customers who bought the product at full cost. To avoid this situation, just tick the checkbox in front of the *Customers group of the Product* … This group of subscribers will not receive the current email.

## Additional settings

On the Additional settings tab, the **count followed links from the message**** **checkbox, lets you enable or disable click-through-link counting in the message. This will allow you to consider not only the open rate, but also the conversion of the email. In addition, then in the instant mailing, you can [send emails ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050385632-Sending-and-Editing-Email-by-Activity-)for the ones that passed or did not click on the link.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072491271/blobid4.png)

Here you can specify, if necessary, a personal redirect page after unsubscribing.

When you click the **Save **button, the email will be paused. To start sending it, you need to go to the** **[**Instant Mailing**](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848431-Broadcasts-) page and click the submit button.

## Set up Digital Signatures 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050385192-Set-up-Digital-Signatures

/[Campaigns ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns)/ Set up digital signatures

**Content **

- [1 Why is this necessary? ](#h_01ERAGXRHTNFXPZJVW9B59KFV0)

-
[2 What sequence? ](#h_01ERAGY0V1SC3HKGNCW4Z0KB5J)

[2.1 Your domain ](#h_01ERAGY9RHDQDPC3H0683BW1Z7)

- [2.2 Corporate Mail ](#h_01ERAGYHEH10DPEVRATSVAZSX4)

- [2.3 Dedicated IP ](#h_01ERAGYR6SX5V7SB0EVBFE0SH3)

- [2.4 DKIM signature ](#h_01ERAGZ2H1Q4QJA7ARY5PQM38W)

- [2.5 SPF and DMARC ](#h_01ERAGZAF8ZFSRYMTE4RM880YE)

- [2.6 Connecting Monitoring Tools ](#h_01ERAGZKCGSGBJ9MF9SF0HZDRH)

- [2.7 FBL for your domains ](#h_01ERAGZXBZMHXBZ0NDQKVRC7BV)

## Why is this necessary?

So, you have decided to take the delivery of emails under **your**** control** and want to set up digital signatures for your domains? We have articles where we provide information on how to do this.

In the same article, we decided to give a general look at the technology and describe the sequence of settings, without going into detail. Also, we noted everything that is needed in the process, except for the signatures themselves.

The essence of the technology is simple: you as the owner of the domain from which the mailings are conducted can register in the DNS of your domain a policy that decides what to do with emails that are recognized as counterfeit. Implementation may seem intricate, but the picture from Gmail.com perfectly visualizes the essence.

## What sequence?

### Your domain

Of course, you will need your domain. We only note that we recommend using the services of trusted registrars. For example, [GoDaddy](https://godaddy.com/).

You can bind the purchased domain to us or not. You can find variants and binding possibilities [here](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851711-How-to-bind-your-own-domain-or-subdomain-).

### Corporate Mail

Undoubtedly, you will need your own corporate mail and not only one. Often this service is provided by your host, but you can also use the free services from the mailing giants. More detailed instructions are [in this article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848251-Creating-Corporate-Mail-on-Your-Domain-).

### Dedicated IP

If everything described above is already there, then contact support@influencersoft.com.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072265972/blobid0.png)

You need to send a request to connect a dedicated server to an IP with a good reputation. Example query:

*Subject**: “Providing a dedicated IP for mailings”*

*Message: “My tariff is Guru. My login: login Configure, please, the dedicated IP for mailings.”*

Dedicated IP is connected in the period from 1 to 5 working days.

### DKIM signature

DKIM is one way to make sure that the letter is not forged and has been sent by the actual owner of the mailing address. Its configuration is the first step in setting up digital signatures of the email. This step is not mandatory, but necessary for you to be able to get information about what happens to your emails first-hand, from the mailing services your subscribers and customers use. You can configure the DKIM signature simultaneously with the configuration of the dedicated IP. That is, you can send two requests at once. Detailed instructions for configuring the DKIM signature can be found [in this article.](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848191-Configuring-the-Digital-Signature-of-DKIM-)

DKIM is connected in a period of 1 to 3 working days.

### SPF and DMARC

Thanks to the SPF (Sender Policy Framework), you can check whether the sender’s domain has been tampered with.

DMARC is a specification designed to reduce the number of spam and phishing emails based on the identification of the sender’s email domains by other characteristics that do not consider DKIM or do not fully consider the SPF.

Altogether, these settings give the best results. A detailed description and instructions for setting up these records can be found [here](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050385032-Configuring-the-SPF-Record-and-DMARC-Policy-).

SPF and DMARC are connected in a period of 1 to 3 working days.

### Connecting Monitoring Tools

Connect the “Post Office” from Postmaster in Gmail.com to track the delivery, opening-rate, and spamming-rate of your emails using Gmail services.

### FBL for your domains

FBL is the standard for issuing information about complaints, about spam from an email service provider to the sender of emails. Mail.ru, Yandex, and Google are the only mail services that use this technology. For more information about this setting, see [this article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050384772-Configuring-FBL-for-Your-Domains-).

### Articles:

[*Creating a G Suite account for your business mail* ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848231-Creating-a-G-Suite-Account-for-Your-Business-Mail)

[*Recommendations for **maintaining** mailings* ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)

## Subscribers 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850591-Subscribers

/[Campaigns ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns)/ Subscribers

**Content **

-
[1 Filter ](#h_01ERAWZHYXMAXXNDEDDDE0DXGM)

[1.1 The Partnership tab ](#h_01ERAWZQS4PXJRXVVMPBQDCFDB)

- [1.2 Advertising tab ](#h_01ERAWZXBM3WK6K3HE6Q7H1DT8)

- [1.3 Status and activity tab ](#h_01ERAX037MTJBBXR1VZS51K52K)

-
[1.4 Other tab](#h_01ERAX09RKP58YTFP8PR12WFF3)

- [2 View contact cards ](#h_01ERAX0JHVNMJZ6771DRGBZ498)

- [3 Export Subscribers ](#h_01ERAX0TXKPP463W9T49S0H43A)

- [4 Adding subscribers to a group ](#h_01ERAX12XJ8W5ZHJB5XJ77VWES)

- [5 Group unsubscribe ](#h_01ERAX198TRNC37N9XTTAY5MFW)

This form allows you to work with the list of subscribers.

To go to it, you must select the **Mailing **list in the main menu, and then the subsection **Subscribers**.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072492431/blobid0.png)

The form allows you to:

-
View summary information by subscribers (number of unique, activated, and new)

-
View information on each subscriber (mailing address, mailing lists for which it is subscribed, number of received autographs, binding to partner, tag, and advertising channel)

-
Delete a specific subscriber (a dagger in the last column of the table)

-
View reasons for unsubscribing

-
Select subscribers according to specified criteria

-
To carry out group subscription and cancellation, and export of subscribers.

## Filter

The filter allows you to configure the output in the subscriber table according to certain criteria.

When you open the filter, it looks like this:

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072268352/blobid1.png)

You can find subscribers by the address, contact groups, date of subscription, tag, and additional information about the client.

Clicking on the menu on the left side of the filter expands the additional settings fields.

### The Partnership tabs

This tab allows you to configure the output of subscribers attached to a particular partner.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072268392/blobid2.png)

### Advertising tab

This filter allows you to select subscribers in the context of advertising campaigns.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072268412/blobid3.png)

You can choose subscribers by:

-
Channel

-
Source

-
Advertising company

-
Ad

-
Keywords

In addition, using the radio button, you can specify whether to search by the first or the last click.

### Status and activity tab

This filter allows you to select subscribers according to their behavior.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072268432/blobid4.png)

You can choose subscribers by status:

-
Any

-
Activated

-
Signed

-
Unsubscribed

-
Waiting for activation

-
Canceled by the service

-
Only new ones

and by their activity:

-
Opened, did not open all or at least one message

-
Clicked, did not click on the links in all or at least in one message

-
Delivery errors

-
Unsubscribed

You can also select existing/non-existent subscribers.

### Other tab

This filter allows you to select subscribers by territory. This is possible only if the city (required when delivering physical goods) was indicated when registering a subscription or an order.

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072268452/blobid5.png)

It is not necessary to fill all the fields of the filters. You must set the filter values and click the **Search **button. The table lists the records that meet the filtering criteria. To display a complete table, click the **Filter **button, and then click **Clear**.

## View contact cards

When you click on the subscriber’s address, you will be transferred to the contact card (section Store => Accounts), where detailed information on the subscriber will be available:

-
Contact Information

-
Account

-
Calls

-
Activity in emails

-
Fixed manager

## Export Subscribers

This option allows you to download the list of subscribers to your computer.

***Note****! Subscribers will be unloaded in accordance with the specified filtering conditions. If you need to unload the entire list of subscribers, first clean the filter.*

 ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072492471/blobid6.png)

It is necessary to click on the button with the gear and select the export format from the drop-down menu, then report preparation begins.

 ![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072268472/blobid7.png)

After the bar turns green, the report will automatically be downloaded to the computer (in the default download folder).

## Adding subscribers to a group

This option allows you to re-subscribe a group of subscribers from one mailing list to another.

***Note****! Subscribers will be added in accordance with the specified filtering conditions.*

Click the button with the gear and select **Add to group**. Next, in the window that opens, specify which group to add the selected subscribers to.

 ![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072492511/blobid8.png)

## Group unsubscribes

This option allows you to unsubscribe a group of subscribers from the selected or all mailings. This can be useful, for example, if you disabled auto-deletion of inactive subscribers in the [distribution settings](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848471-Mailing-Settings-). Or, after adding a group of subscribers to a new mailing list, you can unsubscribe them from the old one.

You must use the filter to configure the output of the desired group of subscribers, and then do the export. Next, open the exported file on the computer and copy the address list.

Click on the gear and select the** Group unsubscribe**. In the **Email** field, paste the copied addresses. Select from the checkboxes on where you want selected subscribers to unsubscribed from. Click the **Unsubscribe** button.

### ![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072268492/blobid9.png)

## What Should I Do if My Emails Go Into Spam? 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848311-What-Should-I-Do-if-My-Emails-Go-Into-Spam

/[Campaigns](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245371-Campaigns) / What should I do if my emails go into spam?

**Content **

- [1 How can InfluencerSoft support help? ](#h_01ERAJMJNV4QHCZKFYJ5DRXJW9)

- [2 What should I immediately inform the mailing service about? ](#h_01ERAJMTH3QQFQA0FJP3M6GGTX)

- [3 If your emails are in spam on Gmail.com ](#h_01ERAJN45TNVASVJEAXGFXT5JC)

All emails sent from InfluencerSoft initially have several settings designed to maximize their delivery. The service department relentlessly monitors the reputation of its sending servers, blocks potential spammers, and keeps a constant dialogue with the largest mail servers. This allows you to achieve extremely high rates of delivery – up to 95% of the emails delivered to the “inbox” folder per month.

However, it is worth acknowledging that the greatest responsibility for the delivery of emails always lies with the author of the email. We can only provide basic conditions that allow you to deliver your message to the inbox. But neither we nor anyone else can save the mailing from rejection by the email service provider or placing it in spam if the basic recommendations described [in this article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)are not observed. **We strongly recommend you to read it and follow the advice**** given in it****.**

This article will discuss what next steps to take should your email still end up as SPAM even after following the recommendations we have provided.

## How can InfluencerSoft support help?

If the emails go into spam, then only the support of the mail service, which determines your mailings as spam, can help you. It is the mail-service provider support service, such as Gmail or Yahoo Mail, and not the InfluencerSoft Support Service.

Unfortunately, the InfluencerSoft service does not have enough resources to defend the reputation of each author of the email to email service providers. From our side, we can only give you recommendations on how to send emails, but you are working on your own reputation as the author, the content of emails, and the deliverability.

Therefore, if your messages are spammed:

-
Write in support of the mail service on which you are tagged as spam

-
Get them to give exact and specific information about the real reason you are going into spam

-
Implement the recommendations on how to eliminate the causes of spamming

-
Inform about this support of the mail service and achieve unlocking of newsletters

If your messages are not delivered even to the Spam folder, but blocked completely by the mail service, InfluencerSoft Support can provide you with a mail log of the email sent and you may ask the mail service provider the reason for your email getting blocked.

To receive this log about the error, submit a request to the InfluencerSoft technical support. In the request you must provide the following information:

-
Type of distribution (instant or automatic distribution).

-
Unique email number (for instant distribution, you can find the number in the “Progress” column in the section “Newsletters” ==> “Instant.” The number of each sent instant message is unique).

-
Date and time of its sending (for automatic distribution).

-
Email address to which the message was not delivered.

After sending the request, the support staff will provide you with instructions for working with this log within 1 to 2 working days.

## What should I immediately inform the email service provider about?

-
Describe as much as possible that you are engaged in “white” email marketing, for example report that subscribers are added only when confirmed from the activation email (Double opt-in), show pages where this can be verified, report that you are constantly segmenting the database, show the headers of your emails, report that you send email only from the mail on the corporate domain. In other words, show awareness of the rules of mailings and prove that you observe them. The most important thing is not lying and not trying to subvert the rules.

-
Describe when the problem arose, clearly and understandably. Which email with which headline, when exactly on what email address got into spam.

-
Show which email service you use to send emails, specify its address. If the mail is made on your domain (and it should be created on a [personal domain](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848251-Creating-Corporate-Mail-on-Your-Domain-)!), also give the domain and its [IP address](http://ipaddress.com/ip-lookup/) separately.

-
Immediately attach the eml-version of the email that went into spam (this can help [test groups](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848271-Recommendations-for-Maintaining-Mailings-)), or if this is not available, immediately clearly convey the idea that you do not have a copy of the saved spam email from the folder and you cannot get it.

## If your letters are in spam on Gmail.com

In this case, there are two possible solutions to this problem:

First, try to solve the problem in automatic mode.
If the problem is not resolved in this way, then you need to write Gmail's support team through [this form](https://support.google.com/mail/contact/bulk_send_new?rd=1).

[*Creating a G Suite account for your business mail* ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050848231-Creating-a-G-Suite-Account-for-Your-Business-Mail)

[*Set up digital signatures*](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050385192-Set-up-Digital-Signatures-)

[*Configuring the SPF record and DMARC policy* ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050385032-Configuring-the-SPF-Record-and-DMARC-Policy-)

# § Website

Section URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website
Section ID: 360009245331


## Adding and Editing a Promotion 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851291-Adding-and-Editing-a-Promotion

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ Adding and editing a promotion

**Content **

- [1 Basic information](#h_01ERE46Q37C26FZF3B0F09PQTB)

-
[2 Additional information](#h_01ERE46WN775S7QZJCNNQR0GC1)

[2.1 Gift for recommendation ](#h_01ERE471Y7EMRT4C9756GQA68K)

The page is for setting up a [viral promotion](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851671-Recommendations-Viral-Promotion-and-Viral-Action-).

The page consists of three tabs:

-
Basic information

- Additional information

-
A gift for recommendations

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072270652/blobid0.png)

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495011/blobid1.png)

## Basic information

This tab specifies the name of the promotion and description of the participants.

The description is the text that will be on the individual page of each participant (where they can track the progress of attracting subscribers).

In the **Where ****to invite friends**** to**** **field, specify the URL on which the InfluencerSoft subscription form can be found. The page and subscription form can be either on the service or on any third-party resource.

## Additional information

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495031/blobid2.png)

Choose whether the action will be perpetual, or has a validity period. If action is limited in time, specify the end day and time.

Enter the text that the participants of the promotion can use when placing their personal link in social networks. The more interesting and catchier the text, the higher the response.

The title and text of the email to participants contain instructions, which the participants of the promotion will receive immediately after their subscription. This letter has a link to *{$ link}* on a personal page (the description for it is on the Basic tab).

### Gift for recommendation

Here you need to specify the name of the gift for taking part in the promotion and the number of subscribers signed up to receive a gift.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495051/blobid3.png)

![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495071/blobid4.png)

Here you can see a link to download a gift or instructions on how to receive it.

You can set up a multi-stage viral campaign, for example, to offer one gift – for one subscriber referred, the second – for three referrals, and third for the purchase by paid subscribers of a certain number of paid products.

To configure such a multi-stage promotion, click on the Add another gift button.

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072270672/blobid5.png)

The second (and subsequent) products need to choose the type of gift – subscribers or money. In the first case, a gift will be given for attracting a certain number of subscribers, in the second case, for the purchase of paid products by attracted subscribers. The goal for the subsequent promotions, following the first one, need to be identified – is the goal to gain more subscribers or increase spend with the customers? If the goal is to gain more subscribers, a gift for a certain number of referrals can be set. If the goal is to increase customer spend, then the amount referred subscribers spend can be set to receive a gift. In the second case, you will need to specify the amount in dollars.

 ![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072270692/blobid7.png)

After making the necessary changes, click the **Save **button. The promotion will be added to the list on the [Viral promotion](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851671-Recommendations-Viral-Promotion-and-Viral-Action-) page.

## Adding and Editing Surveys 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851311-Adding-and-Editing-Surveys

/ [Website /](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website) Adding and editing surveys

**Content**

- [1 Main settings ](#h_01ERE1M7RQ5WQ8ZC8KDV2KPAG4)

-
[2 Pages ](#h_01ERE1MJ4KVVQ4R44MN8FMQ79C)

[2.1 Adding a page ](#h_01ERE1N956XX7DG158T7RGRFS7)

- [2.2 Adding questions ](#h_01ERE1NF7B46W81HRESQ17ZW6Y)

- [3 Actions ](#h_01ERE1NW3V4MCH095N30W786FX)

- [4 Additional settings ](#h_01ERE1P3GJ9MTVYCAM0GEQ5X40)

Pages for adding and editing surveys are identical, they differ only by name (Create or Edit Survey).

The page consists of four tabs:

-
Main settings

-
Pages

-
Actions

-
Additional settings

## Main settings

On this tab, you must specify the name of the survey and its description. In the **Description **field, for example, you can add a short explanatory instruction for the interviewers.

If you want to reach out to as many subscribers as possible with the survey, you may send an email to the database several times with a request to fill out the survey. The **Add to list** field will dedupe those who have already answered questions. You may create a separate group named “Polled,” for example, and specify it in this field. When sending a repeat reminder email for the survey, specify in the settings to exclude those who are in this group.

 On this page also, using the radio button, you can specify whether the survey will be unlimited, or if it is valid until a certain date.

![mceclip3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097209291/mceclip3.png)

## Pages

On this tab, the questions themselves are configured directly. By default, your store's primary domain is automatically associated with your survey page URL.

![mceclip16.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097278772/mceclip16.png)

You can add all the questions to one page or distribute them on several pages for better readability.

### Adding a page

To add new pages to the survey, use the **Add page** button. It will appear below the first page as a similar-looking block, Page 2. If necessary, you can add more pages.

![mceclip4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097277852/mceclip4.png)

On each page, you need to specify a description. Then you can start adding questions.

### Adding questions

Clicking the **Add Question** button opens a pop-up window.

![mceclip5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097277872/mceclip5.png)

You must select the type of question. Depending on the option selected, additional fields will appear that need to be filled.

For any type of question selected, you need to provide the question itself in the Question Text field, and if necessary, specify a description. Use the checkbox to show whether the answer to this question is mandatory.

**One answer**. The answer is selected using the radio button. You must specify the answer options.

![mceclip6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097277912/mceclip6.png)

By default, 2 options are added, if you need more, use the button to** add the ****response ****option****.**

The arrows to the right of the answer options allow you to change their positions.

**Multiple answers**. The answers are selected using the checkboxes. You must specify the answer options.

![mceclip7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097277972/mceclip7.png)

By default, two options are added, if you need more, use the button **to add the ****response option**.

The arrows to the right of the answer options allow you to change their positions.

The Add option “Other” button allows you to add a text field to the answer options, where you can enter any text if none of the proposed options are suitable.

![mceclip8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097278012/mceclip8.png)

This field will always be the lowest, the X to the right of it allows you to remove this option.

**String field**. Reply with custom text with up to 255 characters. If you select the **Allow to enter only digits** check box, you cannot enter anything except digits in the field.

![mceclip9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097278032/mceclip9.png)

**The text block** allows you to enter custom-length text. It is necessary to set the block size in lines (if the size of the response in the visible part of the block exceeds the scroll bar).

![mceclip10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097278052/mceclip10.png)

## Actions

For questions with fixed answers (one or multiple answers), you can specify adding and deleting to and from groups when selecting answers.

Clicking the **Add action** button opens a pop-up window.

![mceclip11.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097278072/mceclip11.png)

It is necessary to choose a question where the answer to which entails an action.

![mceclip12.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097209711/mceclip12.png)

After selecting a question, additional form fields appear.

![mceclip13.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097278132/mceclip13.png)

If we want to add or delete only those participants who answered the question in a certain way, then in the **Contact **field we must choose* answered*. If we want to add or delete all the participants, except those that the question in a certain way, then in the **Contact **field we choose *did not** respond*.

Next, use the radio button to select the answer.

After that, specify the group(s) to which the respondents and groups will be added, or from which they will be deleted. You can move by category by clicking on the blue folder. Select a group by clicking on the checkbox (empty square). Choosing all groups in the category can be done by clicking on the checkbox category.

Then click the **Save **button.

![mceclip14.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097278372/mceclip14.png)

The added action can be deleted by clicking on the X.

## Language settings

On this tab, you can specify the default text that would be on your survey fields.

![mceclip2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097277632/mceclip2.png)

The default page looks like that:

![mceclip15.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360097209951/mceclip15.png)

However, you can, for example, offer a gift or bonus to everyone who takes part in the survey. Then you can make the page on which to place the reward. You can set the address of this page here.

The **Save **button saves the survey and adds it to the [Surveys](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851751-Surveys-)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851751-Surveys-)page.

## Creating and Editing Pages in the Page Builder

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder

**Content**

- [Where are the pages in my account? ](#h_01ERE5P08X6Y0ANTX4FR3XTZX3)

- [Template Selection ](#h_01ERE5P5JY715AP39YWK47P2SD)

- [Device editor ](#h_01ERE5PBJC7SJEDTZHPDBZXZTH)

- [Collection of ready-made sections ](#h_01ERE5PHNM8CWKN9GAFXADPPYD)

- [Adding New Widgets ](#h_01ERE5PQWCMBVRMZG11TXZAN39)

- [Moving items ](#h_01ERE5PZV3K36W319H8XNAF5FB)

- [Changing design elements ](#h_01ERE5Q6YKGSF4BH55R9A44N5Z)

- [Site settings ](#h_01ERE5QF1VZS4JBJSYSZF6KF16)

- [Creating a page through an HTML editor ](#h_01ERE5QTN289BMDQY2Z5HQY09Z)

- [FAQ (frequently asked questions) ](#h_01ERE5R8RKVD6H1DEGPK1VWC7Z)

## Where are the pages in my account?

All operations with pages are made in the section** “Websites -> Pages**.”

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072270972/blobid0.png)

For each site, the default Homepage is:

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072270992/blobid1.png)

You can edit it or create a new page using the **“Add”** button, the address of which will be compiled from the main domain and page ID.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271012/blobid2.png)

## Template Selection

The next step is to select one of the predefined templates or create your own from scratch. Each of the templates can be previewed so you can decide whether it fits for your page or not. To do this, hover over any of the images and click the “View” button.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271032/blobid3.png)

On the page, you can open a preview of the template and see how it will look on a computer or on mobile devices. Also, you can move on to creating a page on the selected template if you already find the template suits your page.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495411/blobid4.png)

## Device editor

The editor of the template designer takes up the entire width of the screen. The controls are at the bottom:

-
On the left – page settings

-
On the right – adding new items

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495431/blobid5.png)

Left panel buttons:

 ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271052/blobid6.png)

The page is divided into **three logical parts**: the header, the main content, and the footer.

In each of the parts, you can add the sections.

Inside the section there are [widgets](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Template-Designer-).

## Collection of ready-made sections

Large blocks of pages – **sections **– are divided into categories by content type: promo, content, cap, footer, goods, etc. Finished sections will speed up the development of the site.

To select them and add them to the page, click on the “Add item” button at the bottom right:

## Adding New Widgets

To add a widget to the page, a section should be placed and selected (by clicking the left mouse button). To add new widgets, click on the “Add item” button. Select the “Widgets” tab on the panel that appears on the right, hold down the desired widget, and drag it to the desired location in the section.

**The insertion point is marked with a blue line.**

Video Player

00:00

00:00

## Moving items

To move a section or widget, click **on the block header**. While holding the element with the left mouse button, move it to the desired location.

 ![blobid8.gif](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271112/blobid8.gif)

## Changing design elements

Click on the desired item – the settings for this item will appear in the right panel. There are ready-made styles that help save time on design development for each element. In the html/CSS tab, you can add CSS classes to the block.

 ![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495491/blobid9.png)

## Site settings

This menu is called by clicking on the gear in the lower left corner and allows you to perform some advanced actions. For example, using other fonts to the page (from the list of proposed ones), selecting a background for the site, enabling or disabling image compression (more on this below). You can also insert additional code in the header (it can be your personal style or, the usual programming language such as, JavaScript), conduct basic SEO optimization (specify title, description), or upload an image for social networks.

### Images

Ticking the “Compress images when loading” checkbox will compress images as much as possible without losing image quality. This will help the page load faster.

By default, image compression is enabled for all pages, but you can turn it off by clicking on the “gear” when editing a page. Then, on the “images” tab, you need to uncheck the “Compress images when loading” checkbox.

 ![blobid10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271132/blobid10.png)

When loading an image into the page maker, it is immediately saved on our servers in several resolutions. Visitors to your pages see the option that is most suitable for their device.

If the “Compress images when loading” checkbox is unchecked, then users of desktop devices (computers, laptops, and netbooks) will be shown the original image size and quality, and mobile device users will still see a more suitable option for their phone or tablet model, but without compression.

## Creating a page through an HTML editor

You may use a specially designed landing page. Just insert the code you received from the programmer to the HTML editor.

The HTML editor is in the same place as the rest of the templates.

 ![blobid11.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271152/blobid11.png)

When you select the HTML editor, a page opens with a field into which you need to insert the page code, and save the changes.

 ![blobid13.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495511/blobid13.png)

**Please note:** the page will only have what you write or insert. That is, the code from the Additional tab (Additional HEAD code) is not inserted into pages created through the HTML editor. As well as the code from the same settings field of the entire site.

This means that if for the entire site (in the settings) you have, for example, a Google Analytics counter, then on this page it will need to be placed separately (your programmer can do this at your request).

## FAQ (frequently asked questions)

**How to set ****indentation**** for the mobile v****ersion in the text widget of the page****?**

In the settings for the text widget, it is possible to set different indents for the desktop and mobile versions of the lesson separately.
Open the widget “text” settings and set the necessary indent values.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2020-06-29_11-45-39.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/2020-06-29_11-45-39.png)
