## File Manager 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388792-File-Manager

**Content **

- [Creating a folder ](#h_01ERE8GGRXRVARGRQ11N0AXP9E)

- [Moving files ](#h_01ERE8GNTNHYW15Y1QEJJ42C0F)

- [Editing and deleting objects ](#h_01ERE8GTCDE4T2C9PPPNEZME9C)

- [Viewing Files ](#h_01ERE8H0142H6DN3SKZBPKP964)

- [Adding a file ](#h_01ERE8H5FM28NHRT4QMXP6VV4C)

Each user of the system is provided with a certain amount of space for storing files.

The file manager allows you to download, delete, and organize these files.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271212/blobid0.png)

The top of the page shows how much memory is used and how much space is still available.

The table has a list of folders and files stored on the InfluencerSoft server.

## Creating a folder

To arrange the files, it is recommended to categorize them. To create a folder, use the **+ New Folder** button.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495551/blobid1.png)

You must enter a folder name and click the Create button.

*Latin letters, numbers, periods (.), **underscores** (_), **and **hyphens (-) are allowed in the name.*

The folder will be added to the table.

To go to a folder, click on the folder icon next to the name.

The appearance of the subfolders differs slightly from the root directory.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495591/blobid2.png)

The first line in the table is the folder icon with … – clicking on it returns one level up.

The **Start** button at the bottom of the page returns directly to the root directory (if a complex hierarchical structure with multiple subfolders is created).

## Moving files

To move a file from one folder to another, you must copy it by clicking on the button in the last column.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271232/blobid3.png)

When there is a file on the clipboard, a new** Paste from clipboard** button is added to the file manager interface.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495611/blobid4.png)

When you click on it, the copied file will be moved (**not copied!**) to the selected folder.

## Editing and deleting objects

Clicking on the name of a file or folder allows you to rename the selected object. An editing window opens where you can specify a new name.

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271272/blobid5.png)

The **Apply **button saves the changes you made.

To delete a file or folder, click on X in the last column of the table.

## Viewing Files

Clicking on the document image next to the file name opens it for viewing in a new tab.

If the file format does not allow you to view it with the help of the file manager (for example, the .zip format), then clicking on the file will download the file to the computer.

## Adding a file

The** Download Files** **here** button opens the Explorer window on your computer. Select the desired file or files and they will be downloaded to the selected folder.

## How to bind your own domain

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851711-How-to-bind-your-own-domain

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ How to bind your own domain/subdomain

##

**Content **

- [1 Why do I need to bind an additional domain? ](#h_01EREE2DJX9ZM46QC9HKFYQTZT)

- [2 Delegating (setting) a domain ](#h_01EREE2K6KDPY82XAKZVSP1RCS)

-
[3 Working with a delegated (configured) domain in InfluencerSoft ](#h_01EREE2VF3VFCBB08655DWGFZ8)

[3.1 How to make the store pages open on their own domain? ](#h_01EREE33TVV025T31YNGHWFXTK)

- [3.2 How do I place pages on an alternate domain? ](#h_01EREE3ATJ10SW23ZHANB25X0B)

- [3.3 DNS Editor for Second-level Linked Domains ](#h_01EREE3JMV02960VXS5TQS5CMG)

## Why do I need to bind an additional domain?

When registering with InfluencerSoft, you will receive a domain named “yourlogin.influencersoft.com” for all pages of the store and mini-site. However, there are often situations where it is required to you must:

-
Observe the “corporate spirit” and make sure that the pages of the store are in the address space of your existing external site

-
Hide the login that appears in the default domain from InfluencerSoft

-
Bind the domain to the store in order to make it easier to approve in some payment systems

-
Bind a personal domain in order to undergo moderation on advertising platforms

-
Add a separate domain for the alternative store

In all the listed situations, the additional domain to your InfluencerSoft account is a solution. And then visitors will see a nice address like shop.yoursite.com or mydomain.com.

Domain registrars like GoDaddy.com let you choose a domain name and register it for a fee (usually ranging from $3 to $70).

***Note:** if** you already have a site that is **located **at **mydomain**.com, it cannot be bound – otherwise the existing site will be lost! Therefore, you need to choose either a free domain of the 2nd level mydomain2.com or a new unused subdomain (domain of the third level), of the form: shop.mydomain.com.*

Ensure that the Name Servers are generated automatically from our system (Name Servers used in the video are based on the domain being added).

**Also, our system sees name servers ***.cloudflare.com for your domain because influencersoft.com has them. But physically, these records are not in the Cloudflare DNS editor. You can find your Domain DNS Zone in your InfluencerSoft account once it's completely delegated and shows activate. Kindly go to Websites>Settings>click the domain to add records. **

## Delegating (setting) a domain

You can add a new domain to your domain list at any time. To do this, go to the Website – Settings and click on the “Add domain” button:.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496571)

Enter the domain name and click “Next”..” For example, if you chose shop.moyblog.com, then this is exactly what you need to enter in the verification field. If you chose your-domain.com, then enter this particular domain.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496591)

The data of your domain will display, specifying the status of your domain as follows:

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/40734641787412) - After buying a domain or any changes in its settings.

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/40734641791124) - If your domain was pointed to another host.

If there is no specified error that shows read above this photo below, then you can click the "Get DNS settings for your domain" to generate the name servers that you need to add on your domain:

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/40734641791764)

After that, the service will show you a message with instructions on what entries you need to make to your domain settings. Please note that the jobs and leah name servers below are only sample, you must copy the one that display above you clicked the "Get DNS settings for your domain".

![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/40734641794452)

If your domain does NOT have a site (a free second-level domain like mydomain.com), then to edit the domain settings, go to the DNS control panel at your domain registrar (the domain registrar is the service in which you purchased the domain itself).

To enter the DNS control panel, instructions on the websites of the registrars themselves will help. If you cannot do it yourself – contact the registrar support for help.

If there is a site on your domain  (and you want to bind a subdomain of the form shop.mydomain.com), then to edit the domain settings, go to the DNS control panel on your host (the host is the service where the site is located on the main domain).

Depending on the host, this section may have different names: “DNS Management”,” “DNS Editor”,” “DNS Master”,” “DNS Server”,” or “DNS Zones”..”

*Note: **I**f you have several sites and several domains hosted **with that host**, select the domain that you want to edit.*

If you cannot find the necessary section or you are afraid of breaking something, consult your host’s support team by copying the message text with the settings that the service offered you.

Some hosts prohibit the creation of subdomains by the user. To create a subdomain in this case, also contact the host’s support team to create a domain according to this instruction on their part.

After completing the domain setup at the registrar (host), after a while it will be possible to activate the domain.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496631)

You can check in 2-4 hours after changing the settings for the domain and then at the same interval. The maximum waiting time is 48 hours. This process is not up to us.

After the records are updated on all network devices and the domain is successfully activated, you will see its active status in your account. Here is a video tutorial on [how you can build your domain in InfluencerSoft](https://admin.influencersoft.com/lms/course/1025/module/2247/lesson/5132/).

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496651)

## Working with a delegated (configured) domain in InfluencerSoft

### How to make the store pages open on their own domain?

A domain that starts at www. (for example, www.domain.com) cannot be selected as the main one for the store. To make it possible to choose your domain as the main one, please connect the domain without "www".

To change the primary domain for the store, you must:

-
Go to the “Website -> Settings” section and click on the “Domains” button.

-
Scroll down the page and find the table with domains.

-
Set a marker in front of the desired domain in the “Store” column.

When changing the main domain, you need to regenerate the subscription forms, order forms, and order buttons, and replace them on your websites (pages).

### How do I place pages on an alternate domain?

After the new domain has been attached to the personal cabinet, the question “**how to attach it to the pages of the mini-site**” arises. You need to attach it to the pages of the mini-site.

To do this, go to the “Website –>> Pages” section. Here, by default, when creating an account, “Main Site” is added, the pages of which open on a standard domain with the form “yourlogin.influencersoft.com”.

Two possible options are as follows:

**Option 1.**

If the **“Main Site”** has already created pages that now need **to be configured on a new attached domain**, then you need to edit it. that is, you need to click on the “Set Up” button opposite the name “Main site”..”

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272452)

**Option 2.**

If the pages already created must remain on the previous domains and **on the new domain you need to create other pages** – you need to create a new site by clicking on the “Create” button.

 ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496671)

**Further actions are identical for both options:**

-
On the “main parameters settings” tab in the “Domains” field, click on the empty space and select the required domain from the drop-down list

-
Save changes

 ![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496691)

### DNS Editor for Second-level Linked Domains

Go to the Website – Settings:

 ![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272492)

The DNS Editor page opens when you click on the name of the second-level domain when the status is marked “Active..” You can add /  or change domain records in the Editor. Most often this is necessary if you need to configure domain mail on a connected domain using services such as G Suite.

The first time you open the DNS Editor for a domain, you will see a data loading window. You need to wait until the data is updated (up to 2 minutes). Then you can already start adding the records you need.

Click on “Adding a record” to add a new record.

![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272512)
Select the type of record you need, specify its value, and click on “Adding a record”.
Available record types:

-
A

-
AAAA

-
MX

-
TXT

-
CNAME

 ![blobid10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496711)

By default, the record is added as Enabled.

If you need to temporarily disable the record, click on the switch button in the “Status” column to turn it gray. Pressing the button activates the record.

 ![blobid11.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496731)

## How to bind your own subdomain

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360058485492-How-to-bind-your-own-subdomain

[Website](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ How to bind your own subdomain

There are instances where you already have your website built somewhere else e.g in WordPress and you do not want to recreate it in InfluencerSoft. In this case, creating a sub-domain may be a good idea for you to be able to build your landing pages within InfluencerSoft. It is important to recognize that when you move over your [domain to InfluencerSoft](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851711-How-to-bind-your-own-domain-or-subdomain-), the hosting for that domain gets pointed to the InfluencerSoft server, so in the event you already have a website built on that domain, the website will no longer be reachable. In order to avoid this, it is best to create a sub-domain within your domain registrar and bind it to your InfluencerSoft account.

When binding your sub-domain, your second-level domain (e.g **example**.com) on your host will continue to work, and at the same time in InfluencerSoft you will have a personal third-level domain (e.g **hello**.example.com).

If you haven’t created your sub-domain yet, you can create one from your host. Note that the instructions on how to create a sub-domain varies per host. See the below instructions when creating a [sub-domain on GoDaddy](https://ph.godaddy.com/help/add-a-subdomain-4080).

- Log in to your GoDaddy Domain Control Center.

-
Select your domain name from the list to access the Domain Settings page.

-
Under Additional Settings, select Manage DNS.

-
Below the Records section, select Add.

-
Select A from the Type drop-down menu.

-
Complete the required fields:

-
Host: The host name, or prefix, for the subdomain. For example, enter blog to create a subdomain for blog.yoursite.com.

-
Points to: The IP address you are setting as the destination for the host. This is usually the IP address of a hosting account where the site for your subdomain lives.** Note: InfluencerSoft IP address is 176.9.85.146**

-
TTL: How long the server should cache information. The TTL is set to 1 hour by default.

      7. Select Save to save your record.

Please allow up to 48 hours for your DNS changes to take full effect globally.

For reference, you can visit the link: [https://ph.godaddy.com/help/add-a-subdomain-4080](https://ph.godaddy.com/help/add-a-subdomain-4080)

Once your sub-domain is setup, you can start binding it in InfluencerSoft by following the below instructions:

     1. Go to website settings and click on add domain:

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360090481312)

     2. Add the 3rd level domain/sub-domain as shown below:

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360090458991)

     3. Add the CNAME record in domain settings:

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360090481352)

 And "Check" settings (it may take 24-48 hours to update records on the server).

Below are some resources on how to create a subdomain with the following registrars:

[Hostgator](https://www.hostgator.com/help/article/what-is-a-subdomain-name-how-do-i-create-and-delete-one)

[Namecheap](https://www.namecheap.com/support/knowledgebase/article.aspx/9776/2237/how-to-create-a-subdomain-for-my-domain/)

## How to Block Cookies on the Site Until the Visitor Agrees to Their Use 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388812-How-to-Block-Cookies-on-the-Site-Until-the-Visitor-Agrees-to-Their-Use

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/How to block cookies on the site until the visitor agrees to their use

**Content **

- [1 Obtaining the banner code ](#h_01EREAKNCYNT0Z0NYYPS4N2ZW9)

- [2 Installing the banner code on your site ](#h_01EREAKTQPFHTG3BQS0JB0HBQB)

- [3 Checking if the banner is working correctly](#h_01EREAM0REAPEZFN4Y9Z0685T0)

You must block the use of cookies on the site until visitors agree to the use of cookies in accordance with the GDPR policy.

We will show you one of the easiest ways how you can add a banner with the consent to the use of cookies to your website in this manual.

The task will be completed in three stages:
1. Obtaining the banner code on the site [https://www.iubenda.com/en](https://www.iubenda.com/en).
2. Installing the banner code on your site.
3. Checking if the banner is working on your site.

## Obtaining the banner code

-
 Register on the service [https://www.iubenda.com/en
](https://www.iubenda.com/en)Click on the “Sign up” button in the upper right corner and enter your email and password. After registration, click on the link in the confirmation email:

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495811/blobid0.png)

-
 Go to your account on the website[https://www.iubenda.com/en/dashboard
](https://www.iubenda.com/en/dashboard)Click on the “Start generating” button:

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271512/blobid1.png)

In the settings, select “Website;” enter the domain of the site; select the language of the site and click on “Start generating.”

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271532/blobid2.png)

-
 Click on the “Generate Now” button in the “Cookie Solution” field.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495831/blobid3.png)

-
 Set up the desired design and structure of the banner ontheconsent to use Cookies and click “Next”.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271572/blobid4.png)

-
 Return to your personal account in iubenda.com.
Click on the embed button.

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271592/blobid5.png)

-
 Click on the “Copy” button.

 ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495851/blobid6.png)

You now have a banner code.

## Installing the banner code on your site

-
Go to your InfluencerSoft account.

-
Open the “Websites” – “Pages” section and click on the “Set up” button of the site on which you want to set the consent banner using cookies. ![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495871/blobid8.png)

-
Select the “More” settings tab. Paste the iubenda.com banner code into the “Add HEAD code” field and save the settings.

![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271692/blobid9.png)

Now the banner has been added to the site.

## Checking if the banner is working correctly

-
Clear all cookies in the browser where you plan to check. You can do this by following these instructions. An alternative way is to use the incognito browser mode.

-
Go to any page of your site. It should display a banner. **Do not click** “Accept.”  ![blobid10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496011/blobid10.png)

-
Press Ctrl + Shift + I (for Windows) or Shift + Cmd + I (for MacOS) – the browser will open the console. In the console, select “Applications,” “Cookies,” then – the site – and check if cookies are displayed. Select your domain from the list in field 3 – cookies should not be displayed in field 4. ![blobid11.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496031/blobid11.png)

-
Click on the “Accept” button in the banner without closing the console. Cookies should appear immediately.

![blobid12.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496051/blobid12.png)

If everything happens as shown above, it means the banner works correctly.

## How to Build Website Pages

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389112-How-to-Build-Website-Pages

**Content **

- [Selecting and configuring a site ](#h_01ERED2GJDQMN9ZYE0CEJAZB20)

- [Filter ](#h_01ERED2NYCFYGVGHC81ZDJXNVS)

- [Adding and editing pages ](#h_01ERED2VWM30YTVH93SMS2NE9A)

- [Deactivate or delete pages ](#h_01ERED30XMZQVB4T5NXAZNP3R0)

- [Statistics ](#h_01ERED36BM2B4F2WZ6DA3WAWCQ)

- [View pages ](#h_01ERED3E5K968BP5Q8F4A4GX48)

- [Create sub-pages ](#h_01ERED3MDVGKWM7EVTNV8S6GAV)

- [File manager ](#h_01ERED3WMTS2EXTGYTNGDK1Q49)

- [HTML Templates ](#h_01ERED437J0KCYRJX7EE2CXPB4)

This page is available from the main menu of the **Websites** >> **Pages **sub-section.

It is designed to work with pages of your site in the InfluencerSoft system.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496471)

The **Pages **section allows you to:

-
Choose a site to work with

-
View statistics for each page for the selected period

-
Add and edit pages

-
Activate, deactivate, or completely delete pages

-
Work with the [file manager ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388792)

## Selecting and configuring a site

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496491)

In order to get to work with the pages of a particular site, in the Site – Pages section, click on the name of the site that is currently needed.

Here you can also go to the settings of the site itself – assign a domain to it, add code to the header or copyright text.

You can read more about additional site settings [in ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389252-Site-Settings-)[this article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389252-Site-Settings-).

## Filter

The filter allows you to select the data to display according to the specified criteria.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272392)

You can customize the output of pages with a specific identifier. If the entire page identifier was entered, one page will be displayed. If you entered a fragment of the page identifier – all pages that has the search term in the title will be displayed.

You can also display active or inactive pages (selected by switching the radio button).

The **Hide pages without views** checkbox allows you to remove from search results pages that did not have views for the selected period.

The **Period since… till** block allows you to configure the period for which statistics will be displayed in the table.

For convenience, the most popular periods are rendered in a quick filter at the top of the page.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496511)

## Adding and editing pages

The **Add **button is used to create new pages.

To edit an existing page, click on its name in the **Pages **column.

## Deactivate or delete pages

To make the page temporarily unavailable, you must move the slider in the second to the last column to the left. When the color on the slider is dark gray, it means it is disabled.

To enable the page, move the slider to the right. Green shows that the page is active.

To completely delete a page, click on the X in the last column of the table.

## Statistics

Columns

Clicks/@/Sales/Conversion/Profit/Profit from a visitor

Show statistics for each page for the time specified in the filter.

The button** with the round arrows** in the last column resets the statistics for the selected period.

The **A/B **button expands the detailed statistics for each test case (if a split test was configured when creating the page).

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496531)

## View pages

The button **with the green eye** next to the page name allows you to go to the page for viewing. This will open in a new tab.

## Create sub-pages

InfluencerSoft allows you to make nested pages.

That is, if the pages have the sub-pages i.e. influencersoft.com/id_page, then the sub-pages will have the address of your login. influencersoft.com/id_pages1/id_page2

To create such pages, click on the folder next to the page name.

To return to the upper level, click on … (three dots) in the **Pages **column.

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272432)

## File manager

Each user of the system is provided with a certain amount of space for storing files.

The **File Manager** button allows you [to switch to working with the files](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388792-File-Manager-) stored.

## HTML Templates

In InfluencerSoft, there are “default” page templates. However, if you want to create or upload your own unique templates, it can be done on the html-templates page. To go to it, use the button with the same name at the top of the page.

## How to Choose Hosting? 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388832-How-to-Choose-Hosting

/[Website](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website) /How to choose hosting?

**Content **

- [1 What is Hosting? ](#h_01EREAW58XY13AQ1R311FT9AX1)

- [2 InfluencerSoft’s ability to store files ](#h_01EREAWAFD1RDNMPJ914FH768F)

- [3 In what situations do you need to buy hosting? ](#h_01EREAWFGYBEY4XTV34WQH7WW4)

- [4 Top Hosts](#h_01EREAWP45RMAYRRADTA6DJNYY)

## What is Hosting?

Hosting is a service that provides a virtual space for storing your files and providing access to these files to other Internet users.

Hosting is needed to display your site (web pages, blog) to each visitor 24 hours a day, for example. You can host the site on your home computer, but then you must keep it on all the time. In addition, from the point of view of security and reliability, this is the worst solution. Therefore, this task is done by hosting providers.

## InfluencerSoft’s ability to store files

If you are just starting your business, you will not need to buy hosting, as InfluencerSoft will be able to perform some of the storage tasks.

If you are planning to create only subscription, selling pages, as well as simple ones from the point of view of layout and functionality of a web page with information for visitors, then you have enough built-in cloud storage in our service.

Please note that this volume is sufficient for storing images and site styles. If you want to upload your book, audio or video file, course, or training for downloading, we recommend to use free cloud storage, for example, [Google Drive](https://www.google.com/drive/) or [Dropbox](https://www.dropbox.com/).

*We recommend you to buy a domain name and *[*tie a subdomain*](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851711-How-to-bind-your-own-domain-or-subdomain-)* to your store. By itself, having your own domain will allow you to create a domain email on it and send emails from a domain name (for example, *[*info@domain.com*](mailto:info@domain.com)*), which nowadays is a **default. You can also create a subdomain (for example, shop.domain.com) and make sales from it. In the future, you can post your blog at *[*http://dom**ai**n.com*](https://www.domain.com/)* and all the pages will work. This way you will save a single, corporate style of the project.*

## In what situations do you need to buy hosting?

As part of our file repository, we do not support downloads, for example PHP (only .css and .js) or work with MySQL. Therefore, if you need a blog or great opportunities for the operation of your pages, for example, connecting additional scripts, in this case you should already buy hosting.

If you use WordPress, then there must be support for PHP and MySQL. Be sure to pay attention to the amount of disk space. The “bare” WordPress engine does not take more than 20-30 megabytes, but when you start uploading articles, images, and so on can take up gigabytes of occupied space.

## Top Hosts

The most trusted hosts (and most popular):

[https://www.bluehost.com](https://www.bluehost.com/)

[https://www.hostgator.com](https://www.hostgator.com/)

[http://godaddy.com](http://godaddy.com/)

[https://www.digitalocean.com/](https://www.digitalocean.com/)

If you need VPS, this solution is more suitable for you:

[https://www.hetzner.de/en/hosting/produktmatrix_vserver/vserver-produktmatrix](https://www.hetzner.de/en/hosting/produktmatrix_vserver/vserver-produktmatrix)

The largest registrars of domain names:

[https://godaddy.com/](https://godaddy.com/)

[https://namecheap.com/](https://godaddy.com/)

Choose a free domain, the lowest price on these sites, and register.

## How to Create and Edit an Autowebinar? 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851531-How-to-Create-and-Edit-an-Autowebinar

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ How to create and edit an auto webinar?

**Content **

- [1 Settings ](#h_01EREB7D922G703S2NYV0NSF8R)

- [2 Schedule ](#h_01EREB7JEK78S5ECDMDKCKBZVS)

- [3 Preview ](#h_01EREB7QZTT1FTB20B5HWKBH1H)

- [4 Room ](#h_01EREB7Y5KJRM25EBRXBEY71WS)

-
[5 Chat ](#h_01EREB83WSGSMHR078B5680T44)

[5.1 How to insert a clickable hyperlink to the auto webinar chat? ](#h_01EREB8B7S44EYQG1DTH9HFS6G)

To create an auto webinar, go to «Website» — «Webinars» and click «Create a webinar».

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343071/blobid1.png)

Enter the name of the auto webinar, click «Create webinar».
![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343091/blobid2.png)

Then enter the link to your video from YouTube in the shown format and click «Next».

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073075252/blobid3.png)

Then you will see the Auto webinar Settings Panel with several tabs. We will go through each tab.

## Settings

Define the Main Settings for your auto webinar in the Settings tab.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073075272/blobid4.png)

-
Name of the auto webinar. It will be displayed on the subscription page

-
The topic of the auto webinar. The topic will be displayed at the subscription, timer, and auto webinar broadcasting pages.

-
This picture will be displayed in the upper middle part of the auto webinar broadcasting page.

-
Code counter to the reference page. This field helps set the metrics code at a timer page to get the webinar attendance data. ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343111/blobid5.png)

- and 6. Name and photo of the speaker. When you add the name and the photo of the auto webinar speaker, they will be displayed at the subscription and countdown timer pages at the beginning of the auto webinar.

7. Internal address. Enter the name of the auto webinar in Latin characters. It will be displayed at the end of the auto webinar subscription page link.
8. Domain. You can choose one of your personal domains from the drop-down list [delegated to InfluencerSoft](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851711-How-to-bind-your-own-domain-or-subdomain-) by clicking the arrow to the right in the line. In this case, the auto webinar link will be displayed in the chosen domain.

 ![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073075292/blobid7.png)

Click Save and the Main Settings are now defined *Note**: **Changes** at each tab could be saved separately.*

## Schedule

This tab sets the schedule for the auto webinar broadcast.

![blobid8.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343151/blobid8.png)

1.Select the dates for the auto webinar. They could start from the subscription date, on particular days of the week (for example, each Saturday), or on specific dates. An auto webinar cannot be repeated endlessly. It is closer to a live event.
2. This will show the subscriber the number of dates available for viewing the webinar.
3. If the date is the start of the subscription date, you will need to specify how many days after the subscription date a subscriber can watch a webinar.
4. You can specify the time options for watching a webinar.

Under the time settings window, you will see more settings. Here you can:

![blobid9.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343171/blobid9.png)

1. Adds the exact time of the auto webinar sessions.
2. Adds auto webinars every 5, 10, 15, etc. minutes (in this case, all time values in the interval you specified will be added to the time window).
3. Deletes all values from the time settings window.
4. Selects the option to redirect a participant in an auto webinar. Depending on the value you have selected, by clicking on the link of the auto-webinar, the participant will open either the first auto-seminar that has not yet ended or the last of the webinars broadcast at the moment less than the time you set.

Save these settings and move to the next tab.

## Preview

This tab shows two links, by clicking them at any moment you can see how the main page of the auto webinar will be displayed.

![blobid10.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343211/blobid10.png)

1. Page with timer. Here a subscriber will see how much time left to the event.

![blobid11.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343231/blobid11.png)

2. Webinar room. This page displays how the auto webinar broadcasting page looks like.

 ![blobid12.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343251/blobid12.png)

## Room

Let us move to the settings of the webinar room.

This tab looks as follows:

![blobid13.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343271/blobid13.png)

1.URLto YouTube video. Here we can see a video link which we enter when creating an auto webinar. But it can be changed at any time in the Room tab, if necessary.
2. URL to redirect after the webinar. If you enter the link to your landing page, the user will be automatically redirected to this page once the auto webinar is over.
3. Timer for display text. Auto webinars provide you with a way to increase sales – a pop-up button that appears with the link to a fee-based offer.
Here you can set the time after the start of the video, when the text will pop up. The time is entered as HH: MM: SS.
4.  Here you can write the details of your fee-based offer, or add a button to the landing page, or a checkout page.

For example, if you add this button:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-03-05_16-56-59.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/2019-03-05_16-56-59.png)

It will look as follows on the broadcast page.

 ![blobid15.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073075352/blobid15.png)

5.Counter code for the broadcast page. Here you can add analytics code (or another html/css/js code) to get the statistics about the page visits and to understand when and how many subscribers visit your auto webinar.

## Chat

This tab sets the presentation of the comments to make the event look like a live event.

There are three options for comment presentation.

**No comments.** No comments will be displayed in the auto webinar.

**HTML-code.** You may embed the code of Facebook comments or the comments of other social media platforms and answer the questions of the participants online.

 ![blobid16.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073075372/blobid16.png)

**Automatic comments**. You may upload the names of the commentators and their comments in chronological order.

![blobid17.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360073343291/blobid17.png)

1. Checking the box allows visitors to comment. If this option is enabled, then a visitor can ask questions or write comments during the auto webinar.
2. You can enter an email address that will receive the comments from visitors to the webinar.
3. Names. Here you can add a list of visitors' names (just like in a live webinar where we can see a list of the attendees).
4. The percentage of the visitors at the start of the webinar. Like a live webinar, not all visitors join the event at its start, and you can set the percentage of the webinar visitors at its start.
5. Import messages. Pay attention to the format they are imported into for correct view. This is shown under the message insert field.
6. Upload messages from a file. Also, pay attention to the format of the messages given in this field.

Click Save when the settings on this tab are ready.

### How to insert a clickable hyperlink to the auto webinar chat?

Comments with clickable links should be uploaded in this format:

1

 |

1|Alex Grey|<a href="https://example.com/">website</a>

 |

Where:

1 – Is a numerical number of a comment.
Alex Grey – Is the name and surname of the commentator.
https://example.com/ – Is the address of the page which opens by clicking the link.

Note that the quotation marks in the comments must be straight to make a clickable link work.

## How to create Automated Webinars 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388652-How-to-create-Automated-Webinars

**Content**

- [Filter ](#h_01EPZBH1P7QS8VCRJ3DW2FE4QG)

- [Adding and editing a webinar ](#h_01EPZBHB4DKF2HZJCFKQ7WCHS8)

- [Deactivate and delete the webinar ](#h_01EPZBHYBFPK0HAQ6MCYK8NG1X)

Auto-webinar is a video that simulates a webinar. The participant listens to the recording and at some point, he/she can be offered to write a comment. You can download this text and the presenter will answer these questions. The “Buy” button pops up during the webinar at appropriate times.

By recording and configuring such a simulation of a webinar once, you can embed this proposal in the auto-series of emails, when each new subscriber receives an invitation to watch the webinar at a certain time after subscribing.

![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495371/blobid0.png)

## Filter

The filter allows you to search for a webinar by name. If you enter a part of the name, all webinars, with that part in its name, will be displayed. If you enter the whole name – one webinar will be displayed.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495391/blobid1.png)

In addition, you can set a date range in the filter to get statistics on the number of views and the cost of the service for the selected period.

It is not necessary to fill in all filter fields. Enter the required information and click **Search**. To display the full table, click **Clear**.

## Adding and editing a webinar

To add a new webinar, use the** Create webinar** button at the top of the page.

To edit the webinar, click on its name

## Deactivate and delete the webinar

To temporarily disable the webinar, move the slider to the gray position. To enable the webinar, move the slider to the green position.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072270952/blobid2.png)

To completely delete the webinar, click on X.

**Related Articles: **

## How to Make a Broadcast Page for a Webinar in 5 Minutes 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851551-How-to-Make-a-Broadcast-Page-for-a-Webinar-in-5-Minutes

/[Website](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website) / [How to make a broadcast page for a webinar in 5 minutes](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851551)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851551)

**Content **

- [Create a page ](#h_01EPZDM9W50CNFE8GEX4MFXRAY)

-
[Interactive blocks ](#h_01EPZDMPVKM9SNTQJAWB1B9PG3)

- [Interactive Block Management ](#h_01EPZDN57B81Z7V3G0N6WAZ7HS)

- [Add a broadcast link to your page in InfluencerSoft ](#h_01EPZDNKASB6C7GVVZMGWSBP2G)

The functionality of InfluencerSoft has a new opportunity to set the broadcast code from YouTube directly on the page created in our service.

You can conduct free live broadcasts and manage interactive ad units during the event. Pages are also configured for mobile devices too.

Using interactive blocks, you can easily set a button to link to a proposal, and during the broadcast, turn on the button at the right time.

You can create and configure the broadcast on your page in 5 minutes.

## Create a page

First, create and prepare a page for broadcast. For this:

Go to the section “Websites/Pages” => select the desired site

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496171/blobid0.png)

On the page that opens, click on the “Add page” button.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272052/blobid1.png)

Next, select the template you like from the “Webinars” tab (they are already configured and prepared for the webinar) and edit (change) the template in the editor.

![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272072/blobid2.png)

You can learn more about how to create and edit a page in the template designer from [this article](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Template-Designer-).

## Interactive blocks

These will be on the page we have prepared. On this page, there are already interactive blocks for managing them during the webinar (this is a block with a button, a block with comments, a block with the name of the webinar in the page header). When you configure the page, you can either leave it or remove it if there is no need for any.

### Interactive Block Management

You can manage interactive blocks on a separate page in the “Interactive blocks management” section.
You can go to this section from the main page settings by clicking on the “Interactive blocks management” button.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272092/blobid3.png)

You can find out more about the interactive block management section [here](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389092-Interactive-Blocks-).

## Add a broadcast link to your page in InfluencerSoft

We only need to insert the broadcast link on the webinar page in InfluencerSoft.

**For this:**

-
In your personal account on InfluencerSoft, open the created webinar page in the editor.

-
Click on the video on the page with the left mouse button.

-
A blue popup will appear.

-
Click on the edit icon in this panel. ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496191/blobid4.png)

-  In the settings menu that opens, in the video field, delete the link that is there by default and paste the link to your broadcast on YouTube.

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272112/blobid5.png)

So, in just a few simple steps you can prepare a page for a webinar.

## How to Paste Your Landing Page Into Influencersoft 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851631-How-to-Paste-Your-Landing-Page-Into-Influencersoft

You have ordered a new beautiful model of the selling page from freelancers or a specialized studio, but do not know what to do next and how to place the abundance of the provided files on our system? Then let us figure it out.

A normal landing page is a set of html-layout, css-files, and images. Sometimes JS scripts and jQuery libraries are added to it.

So:

-
**Download all images to the Site => Pages => File Manager** After the images are downloaded, our system will automatically provide links to their placement – the path to the image. ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496251/blobid0.png)If you plan to create a site with a complex structure, or if more than one landing page is expected, we recommend creating several folders and downloading files by category for ease of use.
Cataloging options:
IMG – folder for images
CSS – folder for css styles
JS – folder for JS scripts and jQuery
or
Main – all files for the main page
Lanpage1 – all files for the selling page
etc.
Your imagination here is not limited. In this example, the paths for the root (main) directory of the file manager are considered, while the paths to the folders in the file manager may differ slightly.

-
**In the html-code and css-styles, we find and change addresses for all images**
Files with the extension .html and .css are opened with notepad or any other text editor.
Typically, the default path to the picture is prescribed as “… / image.png.” In this case, you need to change the link, for example, to:
“http: //your_domain_to_influencersoft.com/media/content/your_login/image.png”
Also, you can provide not absolute paths, as in the example above, but relative (from the links we remove the domain):
“/media/content/your_login/image.png”

-
**We load ****css****-styles, ****js****-****s****cripts,**** and ****jquery****-libraries**
Just like the images, we have these files in the Site => Pages => File Manager. Copy and save paths to files.

-
**Create a new page in the section Site => Pages**
When creating a page in templates, select the HTML editor.
![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496291/blobid1.png)
The page with the editor opens.
Assign a unique identifier for the page. Please note that the identifier is added to the address of the page, and will be visible to site visitors.
![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272172/blobid2.png)

-
**Copy the entire html code and paste it by selecting the “****HTML**** editor****.”**** We talked about this in more detail **[**here**](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder)**.**
The code inserted on the “Additional” tab in the “Additional HEAD code:” field does not work in conjunction with the HTML editor, that is, will not appear on the page. In the HTML editor you need to embed all the code in your page.
If there are written JS-scripts in the copied html-code, carefully check them for the presence of links to the files downloaded to the File Manager.
Do not forget to change the paths for css-styles, scripts, and libraries. Let us look at an example of how to do this correctly. **By default, paths can be written like this:**
for CSS:
<link href=”…/style.css” rel=”stylesheet” type=”text/css” />
for JS:
<script src=”…/jquery-1.8.3.min.js” type=”text/javascript”></script>
**You need to replace the path either with an absolute one like this:**
for CSS:
<link href=”your_domain_on_influencersoft.com/media/content/ваш_логин/style.css” rel=”stylesheet” type=”text/css” />
for JS:
<script src=”your_domain_on_influencersoft.com/media/content/ваш_логин/jquery-1.8.3.min.js” type=”text/javascript”></script>
**E****ither relative like this:**
for CSS:
<link href=”/media/content/your_login/style.css” rel=”stylesheet” type=”text/css” />
for JS:
<script src=”/media/content/your_login/jquery-1.8.3.min.js” type=”text/javascript”></script>

-
**Save the changes and check the template display.**
You can check it simply by typing the address of the created page into the browser address bar.

## Integration With Google Analytics and the E-Commerce Module 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851651-Integration-With-Google-Analytics-and-the-E-Commerce-Module

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ Integration with Google Analytics and the e-commerce module

You can use UTM tags for paid traffic and track in Google Analytics which ad campaigns are most effective.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272192/blobid0.png)

Thanks to this, you will be aware of which of your products sell well and, as a result, are the best-suited to your customers, and which are not advertised properly.

Information about the quantity of goods will be available for you for each transaction. You will also find out how much time customers take to make a purchasing decision and how many times they visit your site. You may use this information to estimate the expected amount of sales revenue.

## To retrieve order information and display it in your Google Analytics account:

-
**Register in Google Analytics and post the code on all pages of your site.
**The code must be for Google Universal Analytics. To check which version of your code (GA or GU) you have, you just need to look at the code itself: if there is a **ga.****js** file there, then it is the old one. If it has **analytics.****js**, then it is new and correct.

-
**Check that the code is installed on all pages of the site.**
a) Goto **Websites -> Set up** and select the desired site.
![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272232/blobid1.png)
b) On the **More **tab, paste the code in the field “Add HEAD code” and save the page.
c) If the code is inserted correctly, it will be installed on all pages of the store.

-
**Create or update an existing resource to Universal Analytics in your GA account.**

-
**Enable eCommerce tracking for the resource****.**

If everything is done correctly, then information about the paid orders and the advertising channels that led to the sale will be sent to Google Analytics.

It should be noted that orders will not start at once, but gradually within a few hours everything will come back to normal.

## Interactive Blocks 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389092-Interactive-Blocks

/[Website](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website) / Interactive blocks

**Content **

- [1 What are the interactive blocks for? ](#h_01ERECJM35BKF0GTGD2N30ZNN5)

- [2 How to handle interactive blocks? ](#h_01ERECJSCWE0AP06DV2CTGWETJ)

- [2.1 Enabling the function ](#h_01ERECJYED7DY0RPW3NK3JJQEQ)

- [2.2 Changing the status ](#h_01ERECK4CMWH8C56429GVBACKF)

## What are the interactive blocks for?

Interactive blocks are used in [a constructor when you create or edit pages](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder). These blocks could be easily hidden by one click with no need to refresh a page.

Let us look at the following situation: you run an online webinar and want the button “Order now” pop up once you discuss your offer. But the webinar is live, so it is hardly possible to predict when this happens. Or you want to show this button several times for short periods of time at the moments when the participants are prepared for it the best. How could this be done? For example, you can edit the page during the webinar, or you can choose other alternatives, but they all have their own disadvantages: no block will appear (and disappear) on the page which has already been opened by a user unless the user refreshes it. This very problem is solved by the interactive blocks. They are typical [widgets](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder#h_01ERE5PQWCMBVRMZG11TXZAN39) we get used to: a text, forms, buttons, images, timer — any widget could be interactive. This is true for whole [sections](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder#h_01ERE5PHNM8CWKN9GAFXADPPYD): you can show and hide them if necessary.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272292/blobid0.png)

## How to handle interactive blocks?

### Enabling the function

The widget becomes interactive once it is [added to the page](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder#h_01ERE5PQWCMBVRMZG11TXZAN39) in the template constructor, and the option is ticked in the widget settings. See below:

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496391/blobid1.png)

A similar process can be followed for the sections. Click “Settings” in the upper left corner of the section and tick interactivity.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272312/blobid2.png)

Do not forget to save the page prior to exiting.

### Changing the status

Now your page has at least one interactive block, and the constructor has a new switch button:

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496411/blobid3.png)

If you click the button, you enter enable and disable mode for the blocks which you have ticked earlier. You can enter the mode without opening the page in the constructor; a new button will appear in the general view of editing the page.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496431/blobid4.png)

However, you can do that even quicker! The section “Website — Pages” displays a list of all pages when you open the site you need (if it is just one site, it will immediately open). If the page has interactive blocks, then the “enable/disable a page” switch button will be next to the “interactivity mixer” button:

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496451/blobid5.png)

You can choose any way to enter the editor where you can enable or disable the blocks by one click. Each has its own switch button.

 ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272332/blobid6.png)

![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272352/blobid7.png)

The page is automatically saved after each switch, and the changes could be seen live by all page users. No extra page save is needed. The save button at the bottom of the page is just part of the page’s template and has no use. Note: if a user opens a page with no interactive blocks yet, they will appear or disappear once the page is refreshed. In other words, if you conduct a webinar and decide to make some blocks interactive, this will not work (with no page reload on the users’ side). However, if you have made necessary preparations and made the required bock interactive, then they will be enabled without the need to refresh the page during the webinar.

## Recommendations (Viral Promotion and Viral Action) 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851671-Recommendations-Viral-Promotion-and-Viral-Action

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ Recommendations (Viral promotion and Viral action)

Viral action is a way to attract new subscribers through the subscribers themselves. When it is conducted, access to any product is given not for money, but for new subscribers who have come through an individual link of the participant.

Page **Promotions** allows you to [add and edit promotion](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851291-Adding-and-Editing-a-Viral-Promotion-), and [view statistics](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389292-Viral-promotion-statistics-) on the promotions held.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496551/blobid0.png)

The **Add promotion** button opens the [page for creating a new viral promo](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851291-Adding-and-Editing-a-Viral-Promotion-).

To [edit an existing action](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851291-Adding-and-Editing-a-Viral-Promotion-), click on its name.

The **Registration form** button allows you to [set up a subscription form](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851391-Viral-Promotion-Registration-Form-) to take part in the promotion.

A button with a bar chart opens [statistics on the action](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389292-Viral-promotion-statistics-).

The X in the last column serves to remove the viral action.

**The subscription entry point** link allows you to view the page where the conditions for participation in the promotion can be found.

## Surveys 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851751-Surveys

/[Website](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website) / Surveys

**Content **

- [1 Filter ](#h_01EREEV3WKHK8VMD29X3MA0841)

- [2 Add and edit a survey ](#h_01EREEV8Y1M8KPX294JJBWH41P)

- [3 Deactivate or delete a survey ](#h_01EREEVE09WC7V9EATTS17EPTC)

- [4 Statistics ](#h_01EREEVKASB8P1H67KJ70JF02C)

InfluencerSoft offers a unique tool – surveys. The biggest difference from most surveys implemented through other services is that in addition to getting a statistical report which in itself is valuable, but you may also segment the survey participants depending on their answers.

For example, you can have one lead magnet, to which all subscribers subscribe. And then in the automatic email send a mini-survey, “Which sub-topic is most interesting?.” Depending on the option selected, the subscriber is added to the new group, and begins to receive a narrow-volume newsletter for the selected topic.

This page allows you to add and edit surveys, as well as view statistics on them.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496771/blobid0.png)

The link in the **Survey Page** column is used to go to the survey completion page.

The link in the** ****Mailing Link** column allows you to embed the survey in the message.

## Filter

The filter allows you to search for a survey by name. If you enter a portion of the title, all surveys with that portion in its name will be displayed. If you enter the entire title – one survey will be displayed.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496791/blobid1.png)

Enter the required data and click the **Search **button. To display the entire table, click the **Clear **button.

## Add and edit a survey

To [add a new survey](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851311-Adding-and-Editing-Survey-), use the **Create Survey** button at the top of the page.

To [edit the survey](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851311-Adding-and-Editing-Survey-), click on its name.

## Deactivate or delete a survey

To temporarily disable the survey, you must move the slider in the **Status **column to the left. It will change the color from green to dark gray. To turn the survey back on, move it to the right.

To completely delete a survey, click on the cross at the end of the line.

## Statistics

To view the [statistics of answers](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389332-Surveys-statistics-), click on the button with the image of the bar chart.

## Surveys statistics 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389332-Surveys-statistics

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ Surveys statistics

The page has data on answers to [survey](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851751-Surveys-) questions.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272612/blobid0.png)

Depending on the type of question, the results look different.

If the question suggests an arbitrary answer, the question line has the **View Responses **button. Clicking on it opens a new window, which has a list of answers given by respondents.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496811/blobid1.png)

**The ****Back to the “Surveys Statistics” page** button closes the answer box.

If the question presupposed the answer choice from the existing options, to view the statistics of answers, click on the line with the question.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496831/blobid2.png)

Statistics on the issue will be developed on the existing page.

The top part has a pie chart. There is a table below with the answers and corresponding statistics.

The **Add to List** button allows, if needed, to add respondents with a specific answer option to the group.

 ![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272652/blobid3.png)

You can select an existing group (from the dropdown list) or create a new list. If a new list is created, you will need to specify a name.

Clicking on the question collapses the statistics. The page takes the original form.

## Viral Promotion Registration Form 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851391-Viral-Promotion-Registration-Form

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ Viral Promotion Registration Form

**Content **

- [1 Main settings ](#h_01EREA5BGCVZND8S1F5EXDFBZ5)

- [2 Form fields ](#h_01EREA5GT474TKZSNV51E74D17)

- [3 Kind of form ](#h_01EREA5PQM86KD1EXTV0KGVYEN)

- [4 Checking the result ](#h_01EREA5WFMT9V4MTFE0C5XRD5P)

To take part in a [viral ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050851671-Recommendations-Viral-Promotion-and-Viral-Action-)promotion, you must register. The viral promotion registration form is configured on this page.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271312/blobid0.png)

At the time of opening, the page has a single **Add to Groups** field.

It is necessary to select a group to which the participants of the promotion will sign up to. The group must first [be created](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050400112-Add-and-Edit-Contact-List). The group is selected by ticking the checkbox.

After that, the page will change its appearance.

There are three tabs:

-
Main settings

-
Form fields

-
Form type

There is the Check the Results block at the bottom of each tab.

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271372/blobid1.png)

## Main settings

You cannot change the **URL after activation**. However, if you have a completed page for the participants of the promotion, you can specify its address.

## Form fields

The tab allows you to select which data to collect from the subscriber as well as email.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495671/blobid2.png)

![blobid3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495691/blobid3.png)

The required fields are selected by ticking the checkbox.

## Kind of form

On this tab, you can select the appearance of the button and the width of the form fields.

 ![blobid4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072271392/blobid4.png)

You can select one of the ready-made button options (by switching the radio button), or set the text on the button.

You can also switch the radio button to the position to load your button and use the file manager to load the button image from your computer.

 ![blobid5.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495711/blobid5.png)

You must click on the **Upload Image** button, in the opened window of the file manager select **Download** again.

 ![blobid6.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495731/blobid6.png)

Select which picture to use as a button.

After loading into the [file manager](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388792-File-Manager-), the button can be re-used for other forms.

## Checking the result

The bottom of the page shows how the form looks at the moment, and below the preview there is a window with the html-code.

This part of the page is duplicated on each tab.

![blobid7.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072495771/blobid7.png)

**Copy this code and paste it into the desired place** on the page. You will find the html code of the form, intended for insertion into the subscription page or site.

## Viral promotion statistics 

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389292-Viral-promotion-statistics

/[Website ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009245331-Website)/ Viral promotion statistics

**Content **

- [1 Select a period ](#h_01EREEFP57YS9KVZD62CP8WJ16)

- [2 Export Subscribers ](#h_01EREEFTW65JK8CYAPBWJQZ4YY)

On this page you can see statistics on the viral promotion – the total number of registered users and the number of subscribers referred by each participant.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272552/blobid0.png)

## Select a period

By default, the data for the entire action period of the promotion is displayed. To view data for a certain period, use the **Set period** button.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272572/blobid1.png)

You must enter the start and end dates of the period of interest and click the **Set** button.

## Export Subscribers

The **Export All **button uploads a list of all the participants of the promotion to your computer.

The **Export by Number of Visits** button allows you to select participants for upload.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272592/blobid2.png)

You must enter the number of referrals and click the **Upload **button.

## Website Page Settings

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360060272152-Website-Page-Settings

Content

-
[1 Basic parameters](#h_01F4K3AZHZ1A8N7ER1KQRVA29X)

[1.1 HTML editor](#h_01F4K3B83D7C1W3K7W090WKG8P)

- [1.2 Timer setting](#h_01F4K3BGNRBPE2CP0F8F1THNZN)

- [1.3 Split testing](#h_01F4K3BSKDQ2QM03MK532Y6AEV)

- [2 Additional](#h_01F4K3C2D0PJJG6V0PZ73EC8CM)

- [3 Rights](#h_01F4K3CBRMXD4QW11ASSKGW1GY)

- [4 FAQ (answers to frequently asked questions)](#h_01F4K3CPP2127DFTWEQDS4CTDX)

 |

In the Website – Settings section, you can select the site and page you want to edit. To edit page settings, click on its name:

 ![mceclip0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360094258152/mceclip0.png)

This page allows you to create and edit pages on the InfluencerSoft website:

![mceclip2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360094258252/mceclip2.png)

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/1595599094300.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/1595599094300.png)

The editor page consists of 3 tabs:

- Basic parameters;

- Additional;

- Rights.

When a new page is created, it is named draft_xxxxxxxxxx. The page identifier is part of its address, so it is advisable to change it to a more meaningful version.

Note! You can use letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9), underscore (_) and hyphen (-) to specify the identifier.

## Basic parameters

### HTML editor

The main parameters tab is used to configure the page layout. To work with the page, use the [InfluencerSoft template designer](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050388752-Creating-and-Editing-Pages-in-the-Page-Builder) or html editor where you can add complete page code:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/2020-07-24_17-08-05.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/2020-07-24_17-08-05.png)

In order for you to be able to use the HTML editor in the page settings, you need to select it at the stage of creating a page, when choosing a site template:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/2020-07-24_17-12-37.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/2020-07-24_17-12-37.png)

### Timer setting

Clicking on the “Off” button opens options for setting the timer:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/2020-07-24_17-15-46-e1595600248402.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/2020-07-24_17-15-46.png)

You can choose the type of timer:

-

with an absolute end time (for example, in the case of a sale that ends at 00:00 on a given day);

- with a repetition of the countdown every X minutes;

- with a relative end time, 2 options are possible here:

-

the countdown starts from the moment you enter the page;

- the countdown starts from the moment the email is sent (this option is used in an automatic email series, for example, when you offer a product with a discount to new subscribers).

Below is the page setup window “after timer expires”.

If the html editor was used, then a field for entering the html page code will be shown:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-34-13.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-34-13.png)

If the Template Editor was used then the “Choose a template” and “+Copy” buttons will be shown:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-36-39.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-36-39.png)

“Choose a template” allows you to create a page after the timer expires from scratch.
“+ Copy” allows you to copy an already prepared page and make changes to it.

### Split testing

Split testing (A/B testing) allows you to choose the option with the best conversion by analyzing the audience’s response to changes in any element of the page.

Note! It is not recommended to change more than 1 page element at a time, because it will not be clear which element change affected the conversion.

Clicking on the title Variant №… allows you to collapse / expand the current version of the page. This is useful for switching between page variations:

![mceclip3.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360094182511/mceclip3.png)

To conduct A/B testing, click on the “Add variant” button. A similar editor window will be added under the first variant, allowing you to enter the second variant of the page. Similarly, you can add 3rd, 4th variants etc.

It is recommended to copy the page from one window to the second and make changes to one element.

Note. The total value in the window should be 100% likely to be shown. Thus if we test 2 variants, we set 50%, if 3 – 33%, 33% and 34%, and so on:

![mceclip4.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360094182551/mceclip4.png)

## Additional

The additional tab allows you to set the code in the <head> section of the page. For example, this is where the retargeting code is placed.

Also on this tab you can enable “Protecting videos from YouTube“. If the checkbox is active, the video will not have the YouTube logo and the player’s appearance will be modified.

And if you check “Hide title of the video”, the player will also hide the title of your video.

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-54-37.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-54-37.png)

## Rights

This tab allows you to configure access to the additional administrators page:

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-59-24.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/2020-07-24_17-59-24.png)

It is necessary to click on the box "Choose additional administrators to have access to this page", and select the required admins from the drop-down list.

After completing all the settings, click the Save button.

## FAQ (answers to frequently asked questions)

**How to insert the code for verifying the page into the head or the code of the metric, pixel?**
Go to the “Website” – “Pages” section. Click on the “Set up” button next to the desired site. In the site settings, select the “More” tab – and add the required code to the “Add HEAD code” field.

**How do I add a favicon (unique icon in the address field) to pages?**
Go to the “Website” – “Pages” section. Click on the “Set up” button next to the desired site. In the site settings, select the “Main Settings” tab – and select the desired image using the “Icon (favicon.ico)” button.

**Why is the page not showing?**
After creating the page, if you click on the link to this page and it does not appear (a blank white page opens), most likely, this indicates that a timer is enabled in the settings of this page, which has expired.
To solve the problem:

- Go to the settings of the page that is not displayed. To do this, go to the Websites – Pages section – click on the name of the desired site – in the list of pages that opens, click on the name of the required page.

- In the page settings, disable the timer by clicking in the page settings, in the drop-down list, on “Disabled” (the timer is located under the editor window). Then save the page settings.

**What is the timer function for in the main page settings?**
The timer function is needed so that you can set the timer for the selected page in the settings. After the timer expires, the page will be hidden and either a blank page or a page you selected will be displayed after the timer expires.

## Website Settings

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050389252-Website-Settings

**Content **

- [Settings for the selected site  ](#h_01EPZ28N6TNS43790HWG30SVW7)

- [Main parameters  ](#h_01EPZ49HXQ5VPRK48H9MFGMRWP)

- [More ](#h_01EPZ50P2B0SSNAB9ZZ5RCGT7R)

You can go to the settings of a specific site through the Site-Pages section by clicking on the “Set up” button opposite the name of the site you need.

 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072496751)

Here you can:

– Add copyright text
– Add more code to the page
– Set permissions for additional administrators

## Settings for the selected site

By clicking on the name of the site, you will go to other settings.

 ![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072272532)

## Main parameters

Here you can indicate the site name, and select the domain that the site will be built on.

Also, in this section, you can download the icon (favicon.ico), which will be displayed on all pages of the site.

## More

## ![](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/40912424527764)

In this tab, you can write the copyright text (it will be displayed at the bottom of each page of the site) and add your own (or third-party services) code.

In the “Code to add to the <head> page” field, you can add your HTML and JS code.

The “Code for adding to <footer> pages” field, in addition to the ability to add HTML and JS code, also supports the addition of plain text.

Most often, the fields are used to insert the code of analytics services (Google Analytics, Facebook pixel code, and others), however this can be any code (callback hunter, pop-up, etc.)

Rights

In this tab, you can select additional administrators who have access to this site. You can create or add an administrator in the “[Employees](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360051351592-Users)” section.

We examined the full functionality of the site settings. Now you can easily customize your site.

## Add and Edit a Series of Payment Reminders via Email

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850751-Add-and-Edit-a-Series-of-Payment-Reminders-via-Email

/[Store](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133412-Store) / Add and edit a series of payment reminders via email

The form allows you to add a new or edit an existing series of payment reminders via email.

*The edit page is completely identical to the add page except for the header (Edit instead of Add**).*

If it is necessary to enter or change the name of the conversation, then select the products for which the chain of reminders is created (tick checkboxes):
 ![blobid0.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072493151/blobid0.png)

Then click the **Save** button.

You will be taken to the [Payment reminders via email](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360044319232-Payment-reminders-via-email-)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360044319232-Payment-reminders-via-email-)page where a new (empty) or modified series of emails will appear in the list of emails.

## Add and Edit a Series of Payment Reminders via Email

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360044767631-Add-and-Edit-a-Series-of-Payment-Reminders-via-Email

The form allows you to add a new/edit an existing series of payment reminders via email.

The edit page is completely identical to the add page except for the header (Edit instead of Adding).

If it is necessary to enter/change the name of the conversation, then select the products for which the chain of reminders is created (tick checkboxes):

[![](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-27.png)](https://help.justclick.io/wp-content/uploads/2016/11/Screenshot-27.png)

Then click the **Save** button.

You will be taken to the [Payment reminders via email](https://help.influencersoft.com/archives/136) page where a new (empty) or modified series of letters will appear in the list of letters.

## Adding and Editing a Co-Author

URL: https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050850771-Adding-and-Editing-a-Co-Author

/[Store ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/sections/360009133412-Store)/ Adding and editing a co-author

**Content **

- [1 Main settings ](#h_01ER4MG73DAQ6QN3KC07H4ZBWR)

- [2 Additional Details](#h_01ER4MHDMCQN383N18F5MZD922)

This page allows you to add new or edit existing co-authors.

*Pages for adding and editing categories are identical to each other except for the page title (Add or Edit respectively).*

The page consists of two tabs:

-
Main settings

-
Additional details

![blobid1.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072269272/blobid1.png)

## Main settings

On this tab you need to set the login and password of the co-author so they can enter their profile), as well as email, and name.

## Additional Details

This tab allows you to specify the bank details for payment to the co-author and his phone number.

 ![blobid2.png](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/article_attachments/360072493211/blobid2.png)

In addition, the **Show co-author client’s contacts** checkbox allows you to configure whether the co-author will see the  personal information of the customers who bought the joint product in his profile.

After making the necessary changes, click the **Save **button. The co-author will be added to the list on the [Co-authors](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050387992-Co-Authors-)[ ](https://help.influencersoft.com/hc/en-us/articles/360050387992-Co-Authors-)page.
